= - \frac {1}{4} \int \left(\frac {5}{\frac {2}{x ^ {4}} + 1} - \frac {4}{\frac {1}{x ^ {4}} + 1}\right) d \left(\frac {1}{x ^ {4}}\right) = - \frac {5}{8} \ln \left(\frac {2}{x ^ {4}} + 1\right) + \ln \left(\frac {1}{x ^ {4}} + 1\right) + C \\
= \frac {5}{8} \ln \frac {x ^ {4}}{x ^ {4} + 2} - \ln \frac {x ^ {4}}{x ^ {4} + 1} + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【1915】 $\int \frac{1 - x^7}{x(1 + x^7)}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{1 - x^7}{x(1 + x^7)}\mathrm{d}x = \int \left(\frac{1}{x} -\frac{2x^6}{1 + x^7}\right)\mathrm{d}x = \ln |x| - \frac{2}{7}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(1 + x^7)}{1 + x^7} = \ln |x| - \frac{2}{7}\ln |1 + x^7 | + C$

$$
= \frac {1}{7} \ln \frac {\left| x \right| ^ {7}}{\left(1 + x ^ {7}\right) ^ {2}} + C.$$

question: 【1908】 $\int \frac{x^4\mathrm{d}x}{(x^{10} - 10)^2}$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x^4\mathrm{d}x}{(x^{10} - 10)^2} = \frac{1}{5}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(x^5)}{[(x^5 - \sqrt{10})(x^5 + \sqrt{10})]^2} = \frac{1}{200}\int \frac{[(x^5 - \sqrt{10}) - (x^5 + \sqrt{10})]^2}{[(x^5 - \sqrt{10})(x^5 + \sqrt{10})]^2}\mathrm{d}(x^5)$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \frac{1}{200} \int \left(\frac{1}{x^5 - \sqrt{10}} - \frac{1}{x^5 + \sqrt{10}}\right)^2 \mathrm{d}(x^5) = \frac{1}{200} \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(x^5 - \sqrt{10})}{(x^5 - \sqrt{10})^2} - \frac{1}{100} \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(x^5)}{(x^5)^2 - 10} + \frac{1}{200} \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(x^5 + \sqrt{10})}{(x^5 + \sqrt{10})^2} \\
= - \frac{1}{200(x^5 - \sqrt{10})} - \frac{1}{200\sqrt{10}} \ln \left| \frac{x^5 - \sqrt{10}}{x^5 + \sqrt{10}} \right| - \frac{1}{200(x^5 + \sqrt{10})} + C \\
= - \frac{1}{100} \left[ \frac{x^5}{x^{10} - 10} + \frac{1}{2\sqrt{10}} \ln \left| \frac{x^5 - \sqrt{10}}{x^5 + \sqrt{10}} \right| \right] + C
\end{array}
$$

question: [1889] $\int \frac{x^2\mathrm{d}x}{x^4 + 3x^3 + \frac{9}{2}x^2 + 3x + 1}.$
solution:
解设 $\frac{x^2}{x^4 + 3x^3 + \frac{9}{2}x^2 + 3x + 1} = \frac{Ax + B}{x^2 + 2x + 2} +\frac{Cx + D}{x^2 + x + \frac{1}{2}}$ ，通分后应有

$$
x ^ {2} \equiv (A x + B) (x ^ {2} + x + \frac {1}{2}) + (C x + D) (x ^ {2} + 2 x + 2).
$$

比较等式两端 $x$ 的同次幂系数，得

$$
\begin{array}{l l} x ^ {3} & A + C = 0, \\ x ^ {2} & A + B + 2 C + D = 1, \\ x ^ {1} & \frac {A}{2} + B + 2 C + 2 D = 0, \\ x ^ {0} & \frac {B}{2} + 2 D = 0. \end{array}
$$

由此， $A = \frac{4}{5},B = \frac{12}{5},C = -\frac{4}{5},D = -\frac{3}{5}$ 于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {x ^ {2} \mathrm {d} x}{x ^ {4} + 3 x ^ {3} + \frac {9}{2} x ^ {2} + 3 x + 1} = \int \left[ \frac {4 (x + 3)}{5 (x ^ {2} + 2 x + 2)} - \frac {4 x + 3}{5 (x ^ {2} + x + \frac {1}{2})} \right] \mathrm {d} x \\
= \frac {2}{5} \int \frac {(2 x + 2) d x}{x ^ {2} + 2 x + 2} + \frac {8}{5} \int \frac {d (x + 1)}{(x + 1) ^ {2} + 1} - \frac {2}{5} \int \frac {(2 x + 1) d x}{x ^ {2} + x + \frac {1}{2}} - \frac {1}{5} \int \frac {d \left(x + \frac {1}{2}\right)}{\left(x + \frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} + \frac {1}{4}} \\
= \frac {2}{5} \ln \frac {x ^ {2} + 2 x + 2}{x ^ {2} + x + \frac {1}{2}} + \frac {8}{5} \arctan (x + 1) - \frac {2}{5} \arctan (2 x + 1) + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【1934】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt[n]{(x - a)^{n + 1}(x - b)^{n - 1}}}$ （ $n$ 为正整数）.
solution:
解当 $a = b$ 时，显然被积函数为 $(x - a)^{-2}$ ，因此，所求的积分为 $-\frac{1}{x - a} + C$ ；当 $a \neq b$ 时，设 $\sqrt[n]{\frac{x - b}{x - a}} = t$

则 $x = a + \frac{a - b}{t^n - 1},\quad \mathrm{d}x = -\frac{n(a - b)t^{n - 1}}{(t^n - 1)^2}\mathrm{d}t,x - a = \frac{a - b}{t^n - 1},\quad x - b = \frac{(a - b)t^n}{t^n - 1}.$

代人得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt[n]{(x - a)^{n + 1}(x - b)^{n - 1}}} = -\frac{n}{a - b}\int \mathrm{d}t = -\frac{n}{a - b} t + C = -\frac{n}{a - b}\sqrt[n]{\frac{x - b}{x - a}} +C.$

question: 【1940】 $\int \frac{\sqrt{x^2 + 2x + 2}}{x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 设 $\sqrt{x^2 + 2x + 2} = t - x$ ，则 $x = \frac{t^2 - 2}{2(t + 1)},\mathrm{d}x = \frac{t^2 + 2t + 2}{2(t + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}t,\sqrt{x^2 + 2x + 2} = \frac{t^2 + 2t + 2}{2(t + 1)}.$ 代入得 $\int \frac{\sqrt{x^2 + 2x + 2}}{x}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \frac{(t^2 + 2t + 2)^2}{(t^2 - 2)(t + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}t$ $$\begin{array}{l} = \frac {1}{2} \int \left[ 1 + \frac {2}{t + 1} - \frac {1}{(t + 1) ^ {2}} - \frac {2 \sqrt {2}}{t + \sqrt {2}} + \frac {2 \sqrt {2}}{t - \sqrt {2}} \right] d t \\ = \frac {t}{2} + \ln | t + 1 | + \frac {1}{2 (t + 1)} - \sqrt {2} \ln \left| \frac {t + \sqrt {2}}{t - \sqrt {2}} \right| + C _ {1} \\ = \sqrt {x ^ {2} + 2 x + 2} + \ln (x + 1 + \sqrt {x ^ {2} + 2 x + 2}) - \sqrt {2} \ln \left| \frac {x + 2 + \sqrt {2 (x ^ {2} + 2 x + 2)}}{x} \right| + C. \\ \end{array}$

question:
【1911】 $\int \frac{x^{2n - 1}}{x^n + 1}\mathrm{d}x.$

提示 分别就 $n \neq 0$ 及 $n = 0$ 两种情况求解。
solution:
当 $n\neq 0$ 时，

$$
\int \frac {x ^ {2 n - 1}}{x ^ {n} + 1} d x = \int \frac {x ^ {n} x ^ {n - 1} d x}{x ^ {n} + 1} = \frac {1}{n} \int \frac {x ^ {n} d (x ^ {n})}{x ^ {n} + 1} = \frac {1}{n} \int \left(1 - \frac {1}{x ^ {n} + 1}\right) d (x ^ {n}) = \frac {1}{n} (x ^ {n} - \ln | x ^ {n} + 1 |) + C;
$$

当 $n = 0$ 时， $\int \frac{x^{2n - 1}}{x^n + 1}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{2x} = \frac{1}{2}\ln |x| + C.$

question: 【1917】 $\int \frac{x^2 + 1}{x^4 + x^2 + 1}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
由于 $\frac{x^2 + 1}{x^4 + x^2 + 1} = \frac{x^2 + 1}{(x^2 + 1)^2 - x^2} = \frac{x^2 + 1}{(x^2 - x + 1)(x^2 + x + 1)} = \frac{1}{2}\left(\frac{1}{x^2 - x + 1} +\frac{1}{x^2 + x + 1}\right),$ 

所以， $\int \frac{x^2 + 1}{x^4 + x^2 + 1}\mathrm{d}x = \frac {1}{2}\int \frac {\mathrm {d}x}{x^2 - x + 1} +\frac {1}{2}\int \frac {\mathrm {d}x}{x^2 + x + 1}$ 

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(x - \frac {1}{2}\right)}{\left(x - \frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} + \frac {3}{4}} + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(x + \frac {1}{2}\right)}{\left(x + \frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} + \frac {3}{4}} \\
= \frac {1}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \frac {2 x - 1}{\sqrt {3}} + \frac {1}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \frac {2 x + 1}{\sqrt {3}} + C _ {1} = \frac {1}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \frac {x ^ {2} - 1}{x \sqrt {3}} + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【1937】 $\int \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{1 + x + x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{1 + x + x^2}} \, \mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{x^2 + x + 1}{\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}} \, \mathrm{d}x - \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{2x + 1}{\sqrt{1 + x + x^2}} \, \mathrm{d}x - \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + x + x^2}}$
$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \int \sqrt{\left(x + \frac{1}{2}\right)^2 + \frac{3}{4}} d\left(x + \frac{1}{2}\right) - \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{d(1 + x + x^2)}{\sqrt{1 + x + x^2}} - \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{d\left(x + \frac{1}{2}\right)}{\sqrt{\left(x + \frac{1}{2}\right)^2 + \frac{3}{4}}} \\
= \frac{2x + 1}{4} \sqrt{1 + x + x^2} + \frac{3}{8} \ln\left(x + \frac{1}{2} + \sqrt{1 + x + x^2}\right) - \sqrt{1 + x + x^2} - \frac{1}{2} \ln\left(x + \frac{1}{2} + \sqrt{1 + x + x^2}\right) + C \\
= \frac{2x - 3}{4} \sqrt{1 + x + x^2} - \frac{1}{8} \ln\left(x + \frac{1}{2} + \sqrt{1 + x + x^2}\right) + C.
\end{array}
$$

question: 【1901】 计算积分 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^4 + 2x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 1}$
solution:
解 $Q = x^{4} + 2x^{3} + 3x^{2} + 2x + 1 = (x^{2} + x + 1)^{2},\quad Q_{1} = Q_{2} = x^{2} + x + 1.$

设 $ rac{1}{x^4 + 2x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 1} = \left( rac{Ax + B}{x^2 + x + 1}ight)' +  rac{Cx + D}{x^2 + x + 1}$ ，从而，

$$
1 \equiv A (x ^ {2} + x + 1) - (2 x + 1) (A x + B) + (C x + D) (x ^ {2} + x + 1).
$$

比较等式两端 $x$ 的同次幂系数，解出 $A =  rac {2}{3}$ ， $B =  rac {1}{3}$ ， $C = 0$ ， $D =  rac {2}{3}$ .于是，

$$
 egin{array}{l} \int  rac {\mathrm {d} x}{x ^ {4} + 2 x ^ {3} + 3 x ^ {2} + 2 x + 1} =  rac {2 x + 1}{3 \left(x ^ {2} + x + 1ight)} +  rac {2}{3} \int  rac {\mathrm {d} \left(x +  rac {1}{2}ight)}{\left(x +  rac {1}{2}ight) ^ {2} +  rac {3}{4}} \ =  rac {2 x + 1}{3 (x ^ {2} + x + 1)} +  rac {4}{3 \sqrt {3}} \arctan \left( rac {2 x + 1}{\sqrt {3}}ight) + C. \ \end{array}
$$

question: 【1926】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \sqrt{x}}.$
solution:
设 $\sqrt{x} = t$ ，则 $x = t^2$ ， $\mathrm{dx} = 2t\mathrm{dt}$ ，代入得

$$
\int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{1 + \sqrt {x}} = 2 \int \frac {t \mathrm {d} t}{1 + t} = 2 \int \left(1 - \frac {1}{1 + t}\right) \mathrm {d} t = 2 [ t - \ln (1 + t) ] + C = 2 \sqrt {x} - 2 \ln (1 + \sqrt {x}) + C.
$$

question: 【1887】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + x)(1 + x^2)(1 + x^3)}.$
solution:
解设 $\frac{1}{(1 + x)(1 + x^2)(1 + x^3)} = \frac{A}{x + 1} +\frac{B}{(x + 1)^2} +\frac{Cx + D}{x^2 + 1} +\frac{Ex + F}{x^2 - x + 1}$ ，通分后应有

$$
\begin{array}{l}
1 \equiv A (x + 1) \left(x ^ {2} + 1\right) \left(x ^ {2} - x + 1\right) + B \left(x ^ {2} + 1\right) \left(x ^ {2} - x + 1\right) + (C x + D) (x + 1) ^ {2} \left(x ^ {2} - x + 1\right) \\
+ (E x + F) (x + 1) ^ {2} (x ^ {2} + 1). \\
\end{array}
$$

比较等式两端 $x$ 的同次幂系数，得

$$
\begin{array}{l l}
x ^ {5} & A + C + E = 0, \\
x ^ {4} & B + C + D + 2 E + F = 0, \\
x ^ {3} & A - B + D + 2 E + 2 F = 0, \\
x ^ {2} & A + 2 B + C + 2 E + 2 F = 0, \\
x ^ {1} & - B + C + D + E + 2 F = 0, \\
x ^ {0} & A + B + D + F = 1. \end{array}
$$

由此，$A = \frac {1}{3}$，$B = \frac {1}{6}$，$C = 0$，$D = \frac {1}{2}$，$E = -\frac {1}{3}$，$F = 0.$ 于是，

$$
\int \frac {d x}{(1 + x) (1 + x ^ {2}) (1 + x ^ {3})} = \int \left[ \frac {1}{3 (x + 1)} + \frac {1}{6 (x + 1) ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2 (x ^ {2} + 1)} - \frac {x}{3 (x ^ {2} - x + 1)} \right] d x
$$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \frac {1}{3} \ln | 1 + x | - \frac {1}{6 (x + 1)} + \frac {1}{2} \arctan x - \frac {1}{6} \int \frac {(2 x - 1) d x}{x ^ {2} - x + 1} - \frac {1}{6} \int \frac {d \left(x - \frac {1}{2}\right)}{\left(x - \frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} + \frac {3}{4}} \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【1918】 $\int \frac{x^2 - 1}{x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + x + 1} dx.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x^2 - 1}{x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + x + 1} \mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\left(1 - \frac{1}{x^2}\right) \mathrm{d}x}{\left(x^2 + \frac{1}{x^2}\right) + \left(x + \frac{1}{x}\right) + 1} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}\left(x + \frac{1}{x}\right)}{\left(x + \frac{1}{x}\right)^2 + \left(x + \frac{1}{x}\right) - 1}$

$$= \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(x + \frac {1}{x} + \frac {1}{2}\right)}{\left[ \left(x + \frac {1}{x}\right) + \frac {1}{2} \right] ^ {2} - \frac {5}{4}} = \frac {1}{\sqrt {5}} \ln \frac {x + \frac {1}{x} + \frac {1}{2} - \frac {\sqrt {5}}{2}}{x + \frac {1}{x} + \frac {1}{2} + \frac {\sqrt {5}}{2}} + C$

question: 【1946】 $\int \frac{x^3 - 6x^2 + 11x - 6}{\sqrt{x^2 + 4x + 3}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解设 $\int \frac{x^3 - 6x^2 + 11x - 6}{\sqrt{x^2 + 4x + 3}}\mathrm{d}x = (ax^2 +bx + c)\sqrt{x^2 + 4x + 3} +\lambda \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{x^2 + 4x + 3}},$
从而有 $x^{3} - 6x^{2} + 11x - 6 \equiv (2ax + b)(x^{2} + 4x + 3) + (x + 2)(ax^{2} + bx + c) + \lambda.$
比较等式两端 $x$ 同次幂的系数，求得 $a = \frac{1}{3}, b = -\frac{14}{3}, c = 37, \lambda = -66.$
于是， $\int \frac{x^3 - 6x^2 + 11x - 6}{\sqrt{x^2 + 4x + 3}}\mathrm{d}x = \left(\frac{1}{3} x^2 -\frac{14}{3} x + 37\right)\sqrt{x^2 + 4x + 3} -66\ln \left|x + 2 + \sqrt{x^2 + 4x + 3}\right| + C.$

question: [1949] + $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x - 1)^3\sqrt{x^2 + 3x + 1}}.$
solution:
解设 $x - 1 = \frac{1}{t}$，则 $\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{t^2}\mathrm{d}t$. 不妨设 $t > 0$，则有

$$
\sqrt {x ^ {2} + 3 x + 1} = \frac {\sqrt {5 t ^ {2} + 5 t + 1}}{t}.
$$

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x - 1)^3\sqrt{x^2 + 3x + 1}} = -\int \frac{t^2}{\sqrt{5t^2 + 5t + 1}}\mathrm{d}t = (at + b)\sqrt{5t^2 + 5t + 1} +\lambda \int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{5t^2 + 5t + 1}}$,

从而有 $-t^{2} \equiv a(1 + 5t + 5t^{2}) + \left(5t + \frac{5}{2}\right)(at + b) + \lambda$.

比较等式两端 $t$ 的同次幂系数，求得 $a = -\frac{1}{10}, b = \frac{3}{20}, \lambda = -\frac{11}{40}$.

question: 【1920】 $\int \frac{x^4 + 1}{x^6 + 1} dx.$
solution:
$\int \frac{x^4 + 1}{x^6 + 1}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{(x^4 - x^2 + 1) + x^2}{x^6 + 1}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{x^4 - x^2 + 1}{(x^2 + 1)(x^4 - x^2 + 1)}\mathrm{d}x + \int \frac{x^2\mathrm{d}x}{x^6 + 1}$
$$ = \int \frac {1}{x ^ {2} + 1} d x + \frac {1}{3} \int \frac {d \left(x ^ {3}\right)}{\left(x ^ {3}\right) ^ {2} + 1} = \arctan x + \frac {1}{3} \arctan \left(x ^ {3}\right) + C

question: 【1916】 $\int \frac{x^4 - 1}{x(x^4 - 5)(x^5 - 5x + 1)}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x^4 - 1}{x(x^4 - 5)(x^5 - 5x + 1)}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{5}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(x^5 - 5x)}{(x^5 - 5x)(x^5 - 5x + 1)}$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \frac {1}{5} \int \left(\frac {1}{x ^ {5} - 5 x} - \frac {1}{x ^ {5} - 5 x + 1}\right) d (x ^ {5} - 5 x) = \frac {1}{5} \int \frac {d (x ^ {5} - 5 x)}{x ^ {5} - 5 x} - \frac {1}{5} \int \frac {d (x ^ {5} - 5 x + 1)}{x ^ {5} - 5 x + 1} \\
= \frac {1}{5} \ln \left| \frac {x (x ^ {4} - 5 x)}{x ^ {5} - 5 x + 1} \right| + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【1931】 $\int \frac{\sqrt{x + 1} - \sqrt{x - 1}}{\sqrt{x + 1} + \sqrt{x - 1}}\mathrm{d}x.$\n\n提示 注意 $\frac{\sqrt{x + 1} - \sqrt{x - 1}}{\sqrt{x + 1} + \sqrt{x - 1}} = \frac{(\sqrt{x + 1} - \sqrt{x - 1})^2}{(x + 1) - (x - 1)} = x - \sqrt{x^2 - 1}$ .
solution:
解设 $\sqrt{\frac{x + 1}{x - 1}} = t$ ，则 $x = \frac{t^2 + 1}{t^2 - 1}$ $\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{4t}{(t^2 - 1)^2}\mathrm{d}t.$ 代人得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {\sqrt {x + 1} - \sqrt {x - 1}}{\sqrt {x + 1} + \sqrt {x - 1}} d x = \int \frac {\sqrt {\frac {x + 1}{x - 1}} - 1}{\sqrt {\frac {x + 1}{x - 1}} + 1} d x = - 4 \int \frac {t d t}{(t - 1) (t + 1) ^ {3}} \\
= \int \left[ - \frac {2}{(t + 1) ^ {3}} + \frac {1}{(t + 1) ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2 (t + 1)} - \frac {1}{2 (t - 1)} \right] d t = \frac {1}{(t + 1) ^ {2}} - \frac {1}{t + 1} + \frac {1}{2} \ln \left| \frac {t + 1}{t - 1} \right| + C _ {1} \\
= \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} - \frac {1}{2} x \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1} + \frac {1}{2} \ln | x + \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1} | + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

如果不限制将被积函数化为有理函数，本题的解法可简单些.事实上，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {\sqrt {x + 1} - \sqrt {x - 1}}{\sqrt {x + 1} + \sqrt {x - 1}} d x = \int \frac {(\sqrt {x + 1} - \sqrt {x - 1}) ^ {2}}{(x + 1) - (x - 1)} d x = \int (x - \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1}) d x \\
= \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} - \frac {1}{2} x \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1} + \frac {1}{2} \ln | x + \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1} | + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【1932】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt[3]{(x + 1)^2(x - 1)^4}}.$\n\n提示 令 $\sqrt[3]{\frac{x + 1}{x - 1}} = t.$
solution: 设 $\sqrt[3]{\frac{x + 1}{x - 1}} = t$ ，则 $x = \frac{t^3 + 1}{t^3 - 1},\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{6t^2}{(t^3 - 1)^2}\mathrm{d}t.$ 代人得\n\n$$\int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt [ 3 ]{(x + 1) ^ {2} (x - 1) ^ {4}}} = - \frac {3}{2} \int \mathrm {d} t = - \frac {3}{2} t + C = - \frac {3}{2} \sqrt [ 3 ]{\frac {x + 1}{x - 1}} + C.$$

question: 【1938】+ $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + x)\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}}.$
solution:
解设 $x + 1 = \frac{1}{t}$ ，则 $x = \frac{1 - t}{t},\mathrm{d}t = -\frac{1}{t^2}\mathrm{d}t,\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1} = \frac{\sqrt{t^2 - t + 1}}{|t|} = \operatorname {sgn}t\frac{\sqrt{t^2 - t + 1}}{t}.$

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + x)\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}} = -\operatorname {sgn}t\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{t^2 - t + 1}} = -\operatorname {sgn}t\ln \left|t - \frac{1}{2} +\sqrt{t^2 - t + 1}\right| + C_1$

$$
= - \operatorname {s g n} (x + 1) \ln \left| \frac {1 - x + 2 [ \operatorname {s g n} (x + 1) ] \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1}}{2 (x + 1)} \right| + C _ {1}.
$$

当 $x + 1 > 0$ 时， $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + x)\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}} = -\ln \left|\frac{1 - x + 2\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}}{x + 1}\right| + C;$

当 $x + 1 <   0$ 时， $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + x)\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}} = \ln \left|\frac{1 - x - 2\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}}{2(x + 1)}\right| + C_1$

$$
= \ln \left| \frac {- 3 (x + 1)}{2 (1 - x + 2 \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1})} \right| + C _ {1} = - \ln \left| \frac {1 - x + 2 \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1}}{x + 1} \right| + C.
$$

总之， $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + x)\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}} = -\ln \left|\frac{1 - x + 2\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}}{x + 1}\right| + C.$

question: 【1942】 $\int \frac{1 - x + x^2}{\sqrt{1 + x - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
$\int \frac{1 - x + x^2}{\sqrt{1 + x - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{(x^2 - x - 1) + 2}{\sqrt{1 + x - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = -\int \sqrt{\frac{5}{4} - \left(x - \frac{1}{2}\right)^2}\mathrm{d}\left(x - \frac{1}{2}\right) + 2\int \frac{\mathrm{d}\left(x - \frac{1}{2}\right)}{\sqrt{\frac{5}{4} - \left(x - \frac{1}{2}\right)^2}}$

$= \frac {1 - 2 x}{4} \sqrt {1 + x - x ^ {2}} - \frac {5}{8} \arcsin \left(\frac {2 x - 1}{\sqrt {5}}\right) + 2 \arcsin \left(\frac {2 x - 1}{\sqrt {5}}\right) + C$

$= \frac {1 - 2 x}{4} \sqrt {1 + x - x ^ {2}} - \frac {11}{8} \arcsin \left(\frac {1 - 2 x}{\sqrt {5}}\right) + C.$

question: 【1898】 $\int \frac{x^2 + 1}{(x^4 + x^2 + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解设 $\int \frac{x^2 + 1}{(x^4 + x^2 + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{Ax^3 + Bx^2 + Cx + D}{x^4 + x^2 + 1} +\int \frac{A_1x^3 + B_1x^2 + C_1x + D_1}{x^4 + x^2 + 1}\mathrm{d}x.$

上述等式右端的积分为非代数部分，因此，只需要求出 $A, B, C, D$ 就可以了。等式两端求导并通分，得

$$
\begin{array}{l} x ^ {2} + 1 \equiv (3 A x ^ {2} + 2 B x + C) (x ^ {4} + x ^ {2} + 1) - (4 x ^ {3} + 2 x) (A x ^ {3} + B x ^ {2} + C x + D) + (A _ {1} x ^ {3} + B _ {1} x ^ {2} + C _ {1} x + D _ {1}) \\ \cdot (x ^ {4} + x ^ {2} + 1). \\ \end{array}
$$

比较等式两端 $x$ 的同次幂系数，解出 $A = \frac{1}{6}$ ， $B = 0$ ， $C = \frac{1}{3}$ ， $D = 0$ ， $A_1 = 0$ ， $B_1 = \frac{1}{6}$ ， $C_1 = 0$ ， $D_1 = \frac{2}{3}$ 。因此，所求积分的代数部分为 $\frac{x^3 + 2x}{6(x^4 + x^2 + 1)}$ 。

question: 【1935】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \sqrt{x} + \sqrt{1 + x}}.$
solution:
提示 设 $\sqrt{x} = \frac{t^2 - 1}{2t}$ ，并限制 $t > 1$ 

解设 $\sqrt{x} = \frac{t^2 - 1}{2t}$ 并限制 $t > 1$ ，则 $x = \left(\frac{t^2 - 1}{2t}\right)^2, \mathrm{d}x = \frac{t^4 - 1}{2t^3} \mathrm{d}t, \sqrt{x + 1} = \frac{t^2 + 1}{2t}, t = \sqrt{x} + \sqrt{x + 1}.$

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \sqrt{x} + \sqrt{x + 1}} = \frac{1}{2}\int \frac{t^4 - 1}{t^3(t + 1)}\mathrm{d}t = \frac{1}{2}\int \left(1 - \frac{1}{t} +\frac{1}{t^2} -\frac{1}{t^3}\right)\mathrm{d}t = \frac{1}{2}\left(t - \ln t - \frac{1}{t} +\frac{1}{2t^2}\right) + C_1

question: 【1960】 $\int \frac{\sqrt{x^2 + 2}}{x^2 + 1}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\sqrt{x^2 + 2}}{x^2 + 1}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{(x^2 + 2)\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 + 1)\sqrt{x^2 + 2}} = \int \left(1 + \frac{1}{x^2 + 1}\right)\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{x^2 + 2}}$

$$
= \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt {x ^ {2} + 2}} + \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x ^ {2} + 1) \sqrt {x ^ {2} + 2}} = \ln (x + \sqrt {x ^ {2} + 2}) + I _ {1}.
$$

对于 $I_{1}$ ，设 $x = \sqrt{2} \tan t$ ，并限制 $-\frac{\pi}{2} < t < \frac{\pi}{2}$ 则 $\mathrm{dx} = \sqrt{2} \sec^2 t \, \mathrm{dt}$ ， $\sqrt{x^2 + 2} = \sqrt{2} \sec t$

代入得 $I_{1} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x^{2} + 1)\sqrt{x^{2} + 2}} = \int \frac{\sec t\mathrm{d}t}{1 + 2\tan^{2}t} = \int \frac{\cos t\mathrm{d}t}{1 + \sin^{2}t} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\sin t)}{1 + \sin^{2}t} = \arctan (\sin t) + C_{1}$

$$
= \arctan \left(\frac {x}{\sqrt {2 + x ^ {2}}}\right) + C _ {1} = - \arctan \left(\frac {\sqrt {x ^ {2} + 2}}{x}\right) + C .
$$

于是，最后得到 $\int \frac{\sqrt{x^2 + 2}}{x^2 + 1} \mathrm{d}x = \ln (x + \sqrt{x^2 + 2}) - \arctan \left(\frac{\sqrt{x^2 + 2}}{x}\right) + C.$

question: 【1961】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 + x + 1)\sqrt{x^2 + x - 1}}.$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 + x + 1)\sqrt{x^2 + x - 1}} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\left[\left(x + \frac{1}{2}\right)^2 + \frac{3}{4}\right]\sqrt{\left(x + \frac{1}{2}\right)^2 - \frac{5}{4}}}$. 当 $x + \frac{1}{2} > \frac{\sqrt{5}}{2}$ 时，设 $x + \frac{1}{2} = \frac{\sqrt{5}}{2} \sec t$ ，并限制 $0 < t < \frac{\pi}{2}$，则 $\mathrm{d} x = \frac{\sqrt{5}}{2} \sec t \tan t \mathrm{d} t$, $\sqrt{x ^ {2} + x - 1} = \frac{\sqrt{5}}{2} \tan t$, $x ^ {2} + x + 1 = \frac{1}{4}(5 \sec^2 t + 3)$. 代入得积分式为 $4\int \frac{\sec t\mathrm{d}t}{5\sec^2t + 3} = 4\int \frac{\cos t\mathrm{d}t}{5 + 3\cos^2t} = 4\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\sqrt{3}\sin t)}{(\sqrt{8})^2 - (\sqrt{3}\sin t)^2} = 4 \frac {1}{\sqrt {3}} \cdot \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {8}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {8} + \sqrt {3} \sin t}{\sqrt {8} - \sqrt {3} \sin t} \right| + C$. 同理当 $x + \frac{1}{2} < -\frac{\sqrt{5}}{2}$ 时仍得到相同结果。综上，当 $\left|x + \frac{1}{2}\right| > \frac{\sqrt{5}}{2}$ 时积分结果为上述表达式。

question: 【1944】 $\int \frac{x^{10}}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解设 $\int \frac{x^{10}}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = (ax^9 +bx^8 +cx^7 +dx^6 +ex^5 +fx^4 +gx^3 +hx^2 +lx + m)\sqrt{1 + x^2} +\lambda \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}},$ 从而有

$$
\begin{array}{l}
 x ^ {1 0} \equiv (9 a x ^ {8} + 8 b x ^ {7} + 7 c x ^ {6} + 6 d x ^ {5} + 5 e x ^ {4} + 4 f x ^ {3} + 3 g x ^ {2} + 2 h x + l) (1 + x ^ {2}) \\
 + x \left(a x ^ {9} + b x ^ {8} + c x ^ {7} + d x ^ {6} + e x ^ {5} + f x ^ {4} + g x ^ {3} + h x ^ {2} + l x + m\right) + \lambda . \\
 \end{array}
$$

比较等式两端 $x$ 的同次幂系数，求得

$$
a = \frac {1}{1 0}, b = 0, c = - \frac {9}{8 0}, d = 0, e = \frac {2 1}{1 6 0}, f = 0, g = - \frac {2 1}{1 2 8}, h = 0, l = \frac {6 3}{2 5 6}, m = 0, \lambda = - \frac {6 3}{2 5 6}.
$$

question: 【1951】在什么条件下，积分 $\int \frac{a_1x^2 + b_1x + c_1}{\sqrt{ax^2 + bx + c}}\mathrm{d}x$ 是代数函数？
solution: 解设 $\int \frac{a_1x^2 + b_1x + c_1}{\sqrt{ax^2 + bx + c}}\mathrm{d}x = (Ax + B)\sqrt{ax^2 + bx + c} +\lambda \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{ax^2 + bx + c}},$ 从而有 $a_{1}x^{2} + b_{1}x + c_{1}\equiv A(ax^{2} + bx + c) + \left(ax + \frac{b}{2}\right)(Ax + B) + \lambda .$ 比较等式两端 $x$ 的同次幂系数，当 $a \neq 0$ 时求得 $$ A = \frac {a _ {1}}{2 a}, \quad B = \frac {4 a b _ {1} - 3 a _ {1} b}{4 a ^ {2}}, \lambda = \frac {8 a ^ {2} c _ {1} + 3 a _ {1} b ^ {2} - 4 a (a _ {1} c + b b _ {1})}{8 a ^ {2}}.$$

question: 【1947】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^3\sqrt{x^2 + 1}}.$
solution:
解设 $x = \frac{1}{t}$ ，则 $\mathrm{dx} = -\frac{1}{t^2}\mathrm{dt}$ ，这里碰到二次无理式 $\sqrt{x^2 + 1}$ 需引用 $\operatorname {sgn}t$ 的问题，不妨设

$$
\sqrt {x ^ {2} + 1} = \frac {\sqrt {t ^ {2} + 1}}{t} (t > 0).
$$

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^3\sqrt{x^2 + 1}} = -\int \frac{t^2}{\sqrt{t^2 + 1}}\mathrm{d}t = -\int \frac{(t^2 + 1) - 1}{\sqrt{t^2 + 1}}\mathrm{d}t = -\int \sqrt{t^2 + 1}\mathrm{d}t + \int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{t^2 + 1}}$

$$
= - \frac {t}{2} \sqrt {t ^ {2} + 1} - \frac {1}{2} \ln | t + \sqrt {t ^ {2} + 1} | + \ln | t + \sqrt {t ^ {2} + 1} | + C

question: 【1928】 $\int \frac{x\sqrt[3]{2 + x}}{x + \sqrt[3]{2 + x}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
设$\sqrt[3]{2+x}=t$，则$x=t^3-2,dx=3t^2dt$.代入得
$$\int \frac{t^3(t^3-2)}{t^3+t-2} dt=3\int \frac{t^6-2t^3}{t^3+t-2} dt=3\int \left(t^3-t+\frac{t^2-2t}{t^3+t-2}\right)dt$$
分解分式后得到:
$$\frac{3}{4}t^4-\frac{3}{2}t^2-\frac{3}{4}\ln|t-1|+\frac{15}{8}\int\frac{2t+1}{t^2+t+2}dt-\frac{27}{8}\int\frac{dt}{(t+1/2)^2+7/4}$$
积分得最终结果并代回$t=\sqrt[3]{2+x}$。

question: 【1952】 $\int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{(x - 1)^2\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2}}.$
answer: \frac {\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}}{2 (1 - x)} - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {2} + \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}}{1 - x} \right| + C.
solution: 设 $x - 1 = \frac{1}{t}$ 则 $\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{t^2}\mathrm{d}t.$ 不妨设 $t > 0$ ，则有 $\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2} = \frac{\sqrt{2t^2 - 1}}{t}.$ 代入得 $\int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{(x - 1)^2\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2}} = -\int \frac{t\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{2t^2 - 1}} -\int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{2t^2 - 1}}$ $$\begin{array}{l} = - \frac {1}{2} \sqrt {2 t ^ {2} - 1} - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \ln | \sqrt {2} t + \sqrt {2 t ^ {2} - 1} | + C \\ = \frac {\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}}{2 (1 - x)} - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {2} + \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}}{1 - x} \right| + C. \\ \end{array}$$

question: 【1953】 $\int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 - 1)\sqrt{x^2 - x - 1}}.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 - 1)\sqrt{x^2 - x - 1}} = \frac{1}{2}\int \left(\frac{1}{x + 1} +\frac{1}{x - 1}\right)\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{x^2 - x - 1}}$

$$
= \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x + 1) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - x - 1}} + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x - 1) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - x - 1}} = \frac {1}{2} I _ {1} + \frac {1}{2} I _ {2}.
$$

对于 $I_{1}$ ，设 $x + 1 = \frac{1}{t}$ 则 $\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{t^2}\mathrm{d}t.$ 不妨设 $t > 0$ ，则有 $\sqrt{x^2 - x - 1} = \frac{\sqrt{t^2 - 3t + 1}}{t}.$

代入 $I_{1}$ ，得 $I_{1} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x + 1)\sqrt{x^{2} - x - 1}} = -\int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{t^{2} - 3t + 1}} = -\ln \left|t - \frac{3}{2} +\sqrt{t^{2} - 3t + 1}\right| + C_{1}$

$$
= - \ln \left| \frac {3 x + 1 - 2 \sqrt {x ^ {2} - x - 1}}{x + 1} \right| + C _ {2};
$$

对于 $I_{2}$ ，设 $x - 1 = \frac{1}{t}$ ，同上可得 $I_{2} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x - 1)\sqrt{x^{2} - x - 1}} = \arcsin \left(\frac{x - 3}{|x - 1|\sqrt{5}}\right) + C_{3}.$

于是， $\int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 - 1)\sqrt{x^2 - x - 1}} = -\frac{1}{2}\ln \left|\frac{3x + 1 - 2\sqrt{x^2 - x - 1}}{x + 1}\right| + \frac{1}{2}\arcsin \left(\frac{x - 3}{|x - 1|\sqrt{5}}\right) + C.$

question: 【1967】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \sqrt{1 - 2x - x^2}}.$
solution:
解设 $\sqrt{1 - 2x - x^2} = xz - 1$ ，则
$$
z = \frac {1 + \sqrt {1 - 2 x - x ^ {2}}}{x}, \quad x = \frac {2 (z - 1)}{z ^ {2} + 1}, d x = \frac {2 (1 + 2 z - z ^ {2})}{(z ^ {2} + 1) ^ {2}} d z, \quad \sqrt {1 - 2 x - x ^ {2}} + 1 = \frac {2 z (z - 1)}{z ^ {2} + 1}.
$$
代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \sqrt{1 - 2x - x^2}} = \int \frac{1 + 2z - z^2}{z(z - 1)(z^2 + 1)}\mathrm{d}z = \int \left[\frac{1}{z - 1} -\frac{1}{z} -\frac{2}{z^2 + 1}\right]\mathrm{d}z$
$$
= \ln \left| \frac {z - 1}{z} \right| - 2 \arctan z + C,
$$
其中 $z = \frac{1 + \sqrt{1 - 2x - x^2}}{x}$

question: 【1945】 $\int x^4\sqrt{a^2 - x^2}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int x^4\sqrt{a^2 - x^2}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{x^4(a^2 - x^2)}{\sqrt{a^2 - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = (Ax^5 +Bx^4 +Cx^3 +Dx^2 +Ex + F)\sqrt{a^2 - x^2} +\lambda \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{a^2 - x^2}},$

从而有 $x^4 (a^2 - x^2) \equiv (5Ax^4 + 4Bx^3 + 3Cx^2 + 2Dx + E)(a^2 - x^2) - x(Ax^5 + Bx^4 + Cx^3 + Dx^2 + Ex + F) + \lambda.$

比较等式两端 $x$ 同次幂的系数，求得

$$
A = \frac {1}{6}, \quad B = 0, \quad C = - \frac {a ^ {2}}{2 4}, \quad D = 0, E = - \frac {a ^ {4}}{1 6}, \quad F = 0, \quad \lambda = \frac {a ^ {4}}{1 6}.
$$

question: 【1956】 $\int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 - 3x + 2)\sqrt{x^2 - 4x + 3}}.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 - 3x + 2)\sqrt{x^2 - 4x + 3}} = \int \left(\frac{2}{x - 2} -\frac{1}{x - 1}\right)\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{x^2 - 4x + 3}}$

$$
= \int \frac {2 \mathrm {d} x}{(x - 2) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 4 x + 3}} - \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x - 1) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 4 x + 3}} = 2 I _ {1} - I _ {2}.
$$

对于 $I_{1}$ ，设 $x - 2 = \frac{1}{t}$ 可得

$$
I _ {1} = \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x - 2) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 4 x + 3}} = - \arcsin \left(\frac {1}{| x - 2 |}\right) + C _ {1};
$$

对于 $I_{2}$ ，设 $x - 1 = \frac{1}{t}$ 可得

$$
I _ {2} = \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x - 1) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 4 x + 3}} = \frac {\sqrt {x ^ {2} - 4 x + 3}}{x - 1} + C _ {2}.
$$

于是，最后得到

$$
\int \frac {x \mathrm {d} x}{(x ^ {2} - 3 x + 2) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 4 x + 3}} = - 2 \arcsin \left(\frac {1}{| x - 2 |}\right) - \frac {\sqrt {x ^ {2} - 4 x + 3}}{x - 1} + C,
$$

其中 $x < 1$ 或 $x > 3$ .

question: 【1957】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + x^2)\sqrt{1 - x^2}}.$
solution:
解设 $x = \sin t$ ，并限制 $-\frac{\pi}{2} < t < \frac{\pi}{2}$ ，则 $\mathrm{d}x = \cos t\mathrm{d}t,\quad \sqrt{1 - x^2} = \cos t.$

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + x^2)\sqrt{1 - x^2}} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{1 + \sin^2 t} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{2\sin^2 t + \cos^2 t} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\sqrt{2} \tan t)}{(\sqrt{2} \tan t)^2 + 1}$

$$
= \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arctan (\sqrt {2} \tan t) + C = \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arctan \left(\frac {x \sqrt {2}}{\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}}\right) + C.
$$

question: 【1964】利用分式线性代换 $x = \frac{\alpha + \beta t}{1 + t}$ ，计算积分： $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 - x + 1)\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}}$
solution:
解 分式线性代换 $x = \frac{\alpha + \beta t}{1 + t}$ 给出

$$
x ^ {2} \pm x + 1 = \frac {(\beta^ {2} \pm \beta + 1) t ^ {2} + [ 2 \alpha \beta \pm (\alpha + \beta) + 2 ] t + (\alpha^ {2} \pm \alpha + 1)}{(1 + t) ^ {2}}.
$$

要求 $2\alpha \beta \pm (\alpha + \beta) + 2 = 0$ 即化成标准形式，当 $\alpha + \beta = 0$ 及 $\alpha \beta = -1$ 时即得上式。例如，取 $\alpha = -1$ ， $\beta = 1$

我们有 $x = \frac{t - 1}{1 + t}$ 或 $t = \frac{1 + x}{1 - x},\mathrm{d}x = \frac{2\mathrm{d}t}{(1 + t)^2},x^2 -x + 1 = \frac{t^2 + 3}{(t + 1)^2},\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1} = \frac{\sqrt{1 + 3t^2}}{t + 1},$

其中不妨设 $t + 1 > 0$ ，于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x ^ {2} - x + 1) \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1}} = 2 \int \frac {t + 1}{(t ^ {2} + 3) \sqrt {1 + 3 t ^ {2}}} \mathrm {d} t = 2 \int \frac {t \mathrm {d} t}{(t ^ {2} + 3) \sqrt {1 + 3 t ^ {2}}} + 2 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} t}{(t ^ {2} + 3) \sqrt {1 + 3 t ^ {2}}} \\ = 2 \left(I _ {1} + I _ {2}\right). \\ \end{array}
$$

对于 $I_{1}$ ，设 $u = \sqrt{1 + 3t^2}$ ，则 $\mathrm{d}u = \frac{3t\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{1 + 3t^2}}, t^2 + 3 = \frac{u^2 + 8}{3}.$

代入 $I_{1}$ ，得

$$
I _ {1} = \int \frac {t d t}{(t ^ {2} + 3) \sqrt {1 + 3 t ^ {2}}} = \int \frac {d u}{u ^ {2} + 8} = \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \arctan \left(\frac {u}{2 \sqrt {2}}\right) + C _ {1} = \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \arctan \left(\frac {\sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1}}{(1 - x) \sqrt {2}}\right) + C _ {1}.
$$

对于 $I_{2}$ ，设 $u = \frac{3t}{\sqrt{1 + 3t^2}}$ 则 $\frac{\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{1 + 3t^2}} = \frac{\mathrm{d}u}{3 - u^2}, t^2 + 3 = \frac{27 - 8u^2}{3(3 - u^2)},$

代入 $I_{2}$ ，得

$$
\begin{array}{l} I _ {2} = \int \frac {\mathrm {d} t}{(t ^ {2} + 3) \sqrt {1 + 3 t ^ {2}}} = 3 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} u}{2 7 - 8 u ^ {2}} = \frac {1}{4 \sqrt {6}} \ln \left| \frac {3 \sqrt {3} + 2 \sqrt {2} u}{3 \sqrt {3} - 2 \sqrt {2} u} \right| + C _ {2} \\ = \frac {1}{4 \sqrt {6}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {3 (x ^ {2} + x + 1)} + (x + 1) \sqrt {2}}{\sqrt {3 (x ^ {2} + x + 1)} - (x + 1) \sqrt {2}} \right| + C _ {2} = \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {6}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {x ^ {2} - x + 1}}{\sqrt {3 (x ^ {2} + x + 1)} - (x + 1) \sqrt {2}} \right| + C _ {2}. \\ \end{array}
$$

于是，最后得到

$$
\int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x ^ {2} - x + 1) \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1}} = - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arctan \left[ \frac {\sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1}}{(x - 1) \sqrt {2}} \right] + \frac {1}{\sqrt {6}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {x ^ {2} - x + 1}}{\sqrt {3 (x ^ {2} + x + 1)} - (x + 1) \sqrt {2}} \right| + C.
$$

question: 【1966】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x + \sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}}.$
solution:
提示 令 $\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1} = z - x$ .

解设 $\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1} = z - x$，则 $x = \frac{z^2 - 1}{1 + 2z},\mathrm{d}x = \frac{2(z^2 + z + 1)}{(1 + 2z)^2}\mathrm{d}z,\sqrt{x^2 + x + 1} = \frac{z^2 + z + 1}{1 + 2z}.$

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x + \sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}} = \frac{1}{2}\int \frac{z^2 + z + 1}{z\left(z + \frac{1}{2}\right)^2}\mathrm{d}z = \frac{1}{2}\int \left[\frac{4}{z} -\frac{3}{z + \frac{1}{2}} -\frac{3}{2\left(z + \frac{1}{2}\right)^2}\right]\mathrm{d}z$

$$= \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {z ^ {4}}{\left| z + \frac {1}{2} \right| ^ {3}} + \frac {3}{4 \left(z + \frac {1}{2}\right)} + C _ {1} = \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {z ^ {4}}{\left| 2 z + 1 \right| ^ {3}} + \frac {3}{2 (2 z + 1)} + C,$$

其中 $z = x + \sqrt{x^2 + x + 1}$

question: 【1959】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 - x^4)\sqrt{1 + x^2}}.$
answer: \frac {x}{2 \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}}} + \frac {1}{4 \sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}} + x \sqrt {2}}{\sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}} - x \sqrt {2}} \right| + C \quad (| x | \neq 1)
solution: 解设 $x = \tan t$ ，并限制 $-\frac{\pi}{2} < t < \frac{\pi}{2}$ 且 $|t| \neq \frac{\pi}{4}$，则 $\mathrm{d}x = \sec^2 t \, \mathrm{d}t$，$\sqrt{1 + x^2} = \sec t$. 代入得 $\int \frac{\sec^2 t \, \mathrm{d}t}{(1 - \tan^4 t) \sec t} = \int \frac{\cos^3 t \, \mathrm{d}t}{1 - 2\sin^2 t} = \int \frac{1 - \sin^2 t}{1 - 2\sin^2 t} \, \mathrm{d}(\sin t)$，进一步拆分积分得到 $\frac {1}{2} \sin t + \frac {1}{4 \sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \frac {1 + \sqrt {2} \sin t}{1 - \sqrt {2} \sin t} \right| + C$，最后替换回 $x$ 得到结果。

question: 【1979】 $\int \frac{(x^2 + 1)\mathrm{d}x}{x\sqrt{x^4 + x^2 + 1}}.$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{(x^2 + 1)\mathrm{d}x}{x\sqrt{x^4 + x^2 + 1}} = \int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{x^4 + x^2 + 1}} +\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x\sqrt{x^4 + x^2 + 1}}$ $$ \begin{array}{l} = \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(x ^ {2} + \frac {1}{2}\right)}{\sqrt {\left(x ^ {2} + \frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} + \frac {3}{4}}} - \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(\frac {1}{x ^ {2}}\right)}{\sqrt {\left(\frac {1}{x ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} + \frac {3}{4}}} = \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {x ^ {2} + \frac {1}{2} + \sqrt {x ^ {4} + x ^ {2} + 1}}{\frac {1}{x ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2} + \sqrt {\frac {x ^ {4} + x ^ {2} + 1}{x ^ {4}}}} + C. \\ = \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {x ^ {2} (1 + 2 x ^ {2} + 2 \sqrt {x ^ {4} + x ^ {2} + 1})}{2 + x ^ {2} + 2 \sqrt {x ^ {4} + x ^ {2} + 1}} + C. \\ \end{array} $$

question: 【1948】+ $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^4\sqrt{x^2 - 1}}.$
solution:
解 不妨设 $x = \frac{1}{t} > 0$ ，则 $\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{t^2}\mathrm{d}t.$ 由 $|x| > 1$ 知必有 $|t| < 1$ ，则有

$$
\sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1} = \frac {\sqrt {1 - t ^ {2}}}{t} \quad (0 <   t <   1).
$$

代人得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^4\sqrt{x^2 - 1}} = -\int \frac{t^3}{\sqrt{1 - t^2}}\mathrm{d}t = \int \frac{t(1 - t^2) - t}{\sqrt{1 - t^2}}\mathrm{d}t = \int t\sqrt{1 - t^2}\mathrm{d}t - \int \frac{t}{\sqrt{1 - t^2}}\mathrm{d}t$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= - \frac {1}{2} \int (1 - t ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {1}{2}} d (1 - t ^ {2}) + \frac {1}{2} \int (1 - t ^ {2}) ^ {- \frac {1}{2}} d (1 - t ^ {2}) = - \frac {1}{3} (1 - t ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} + (1 - t ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {1}{2}} + C \\
= \frac {1 + 2 x ^ {2}}{3 x ^ {3}} \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1} + C. \\
\end{array}

question: 【1943】 $\int \frac{x^3}{\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解设 $\int \frac{x^3}{\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = (ax^2 +bx + c)\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2} +\lambda \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2}},$

两边对 $x$ 求导数，得

$$
\frac {x ^ {3}}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} = (2 a x + b) \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}} + \frac {(a x ^ {2} + b x + c) (1 - x)}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} + \frac {\lambda}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}}.
$$

从而有

$$
x ^ {3} \equiv (2 a x + b) (1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}) + (a x ^ {2} + b x + c) (1 - x) + \lambda .
$$

比较等式两端 $x$ 的同次幂系数，得

$$
\begin{array}{l} x ^ {3} \left| - 3 a = 1, \\ x ^ {2} \left| 5 a - 2 b = 0, \\ x ^ {1} \left| 2 a + 3 b - c = 0, \\ x ^ {0} \left| b + c + \lambda = 0. \right. \end{array}
$$

由此， $a = -\frac{1}{3},b = -\frac{5}{6},c = -\frac{19}{6},\lambda = 4.$ 于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {x ^ {3}}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} d x = - \frac {1 9 + 5 x + 2 x ^ {2}}{6} \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}} + 4 \int \frac {d x}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} \\= - \frac {1 9 + 5 x + 2 x ^ {2}}{6} \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}} + 4 \arcsin \left(\frac {x - 1}{\sqrt {2}}\right) + C. \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【1955】 $\int \frac{x^3}{(1 + x)\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: - \frac {1 + x}{2} \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}} - 2 \arcsin \left(\frac {1 - x}{\sqrt {2}}\right) - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arcsin \left(\frac {x \sqrt {2}}{1 + x}\right) + C.
solution:
解 $\int  rac{x^3}{(1 + x)\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = \int  rac{(x^3 + 1) - 1}{(1 + x)\sqrt{1 + 2x - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x$

$$ egin{array}{l}= \int  rac {x ^ {2} - x + 1}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} d x - \int  rac {d x}{(1 + x) \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} \ = - \int  rac {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} d x +  rac {1}{2} \int  rac {(2 x - 2) d x}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} + 3 \int  rac {d x}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} - \int  rac {d x}{(x + 1) \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} \ = - \int \sqrt {2 - (x - 1) ^ {2}} d (x - 1) -  rac {1}{2} \int  rac {d (1 + 2 x - x ^ {2})}{\sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} + 3 \int  rac {d (x - 1)}{\sqrt {2 - (x - 1) ^ {2}}} - I _ {1} \ =  rac {1 - x}{2} \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}} - \arcsin \left( rac {x - 1}{\sqrt {2}}ight) - \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}} + 3 \arcsin \left( rac {x - 1}{\sqrt {2}}ight) - I _ {1} \ = -  rac {x + 1}{2} \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}} + 2 \arcsin \left( rac {x - 1}{\sqrt {2}}ight) - I _ {1}. \end{array}$$$

对于 $I_{1}$ ，设 $x + 1 =  rac{1}{t}$ ，可得

$$I _ {1} = \int  rac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x + 1) \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} =  rac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arcsin \left( rac {x \sqrt {2}}{x + 1}ight) + C _ {1}.
$$

于是，最后得到

$$\int  rac {x ^ {3}}{(x + 1) \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} d x = -  rac {1 + x}{2} \sqrt {1 + 2 x - x ^ {2}} - 2 \arcsin \left( rac {1 - x}{\sqrt {2}}ight) -  rac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arcsin \left( rac {x \sqrt {2}}{1 + x}ight) + C.$$

question: 【1975】 $\int \frac{\sqrt{x(x + 1)}}{\sqrt{x} + \sqrt{x + 1}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{\sqrt{x(x + 1)}}{\sqrt{x} + \sqrt{x + 1}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\sqrt{x(x + 1)}(\sqrt{x + 1} - \sqrt{x})}{(x + 1) - x}\mathrm{d}x = \int [(x + 1)\sqrt{x} - x\sqrt{x + 1}]\mathrm{d}x$. $$ = \int \left[ x ^ {\frac {3}{2}} + x ^ {\frac {1}{2}} - (x + 1) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} + (x + 1) ^ {\frac {1}{2}} \right] d x = \frac {2}{3} \left[ (x + 1) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} + x ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \right] - \frac {2}{5} \left[ (x + 1) ^ {\frac {5}{2}} - x ^ {\frac {5}{2}} \right] + C.$$

question: 【1950】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x + 1)^3\sqrt{x^2 + 2x}}.$
solution:
解设 $x + 1 = \frac{1}{t}$ 则 $\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{t^2}\mathrm{d}t.$ 先设 $t > 0$ ，则有 $\sqrt{x^2 + 2x} = \frac{\sqrt{1 - t^2}}{t}.$

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x + 1)^5\sqrt{x^2 + 2x}} = -\int \frac{t^4}{\sqrt{1 - t^2}}\mathrm{d}t = (at^3 + bt^2 + ct + e)\sqrt{1 - t^2} + \lambda \int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{1 - t^2}}.$

从而有 $-t^4 \equiv (3at^2 + 2bt + c)(1 - t^2) - t(at^3 + bt^2 + ct + e) + \lambda.$

比较等式两端 $t$ 的同次幂系数，求得 $a = \frac{1}{4}, b = 0, c = \frac{3}{8}, e = 0, \lambda = -\frac{3}{8}.$

于是， $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x + 1)^5\sqrt{x^2 + 2x}} = \left(\frac{1}{4} t^3 + \frac{3}{8} t\right)\sqrt{1 - t^2} - \frac{3}{8}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{1 - t^2}}$

$$
= \frac {3 x ^ {2} + 6 x + 5}{8 (x + 1) ^ {4}} \sqrt {x ^ {2} + 2 x} - \frac {3}{8} \arcsin \frac {1}{x + 1} + C.
$$

再设 $t < 0$ ，则答案前一项不改变符号，但后一项要改变符号，因此，最后得到

$$
\int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{(x + 1) ^ {5} \sqrt {x ^ {2} + 2 x}} = \frac {3 x ^ {2} + 6 x + 5}{8 (x + 1) ^ {4}} \sqrt {x ^ {2} + 2 x} - \frac {3}{8} \arcsin \frac {1}{| x + 1 |} + C,
$$

其中 $x > 0$ 或 $x < -2$ .

question: 【1973】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{2} + \sqrt{1 - x} + \sqrt{1 + x}}.$
solution:
$\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{2} + \sqrt{1 - x} + \sqrt{1 + x}} = \int \frac{-\sqrt{2} + \sqrt{1 - x} + \sqrt{1 + x}}{(\sqrt{2} + \sqrt{1 - x} + \sqrt{1 + x})(-\sqrt{2} + \sqrt{1 - x} + \sqrt{1 + x})}\mathrm{d}x$
$$\begin{array}{l}= \int \frac {- \sqrt {2} + \sqrt {1 - x} + \sqrt {1 + x}}{2 \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} d x = - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \int \frac {d x}{\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {d x}{\sqrt {1 + x}} + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {d x}{\sqrt {1 - x}} \\ = - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arcsin x + \sqrt {1 + x} - \sqrt {1 - x} + C.
$$

question: 【1939】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 - x)^2\sqrt{1 - x^2}}.$
solution:
提示 令 $\sqrt{\frac{1 - x}{1 + x}} = t.$

解 设 $\sqrt{\frac{1 - x}{1 + x}} = t$ ，则 $x = \frac{1 - t^2}{1 + t^2}, \mathrm{d}x = -\frac{4t}{(1 + t^2)^2}\mathrm{d}t, 1 - x = \frac{2t^2}{1 + t^2}, \sqrt{1 - x^2} = \frac{2t}{1 + t^2}$ .

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 - x)^2\sqrt{1 - x^2}} = -\frac{1}{2}\int \frac{1 + t^2}{t^4}\mathrm{d}t = \frac{1}{6t^3} +\frac{1}{2t} +C = \frac{2 - x}{3(1 - x)^2}\sqrt{1 - x^2} +C.$

question: 【1962】 $\int \frac{x^2\mathrm{d}x}{(4 - 2x + x^2)\sqrt{2 + 2x - x^2}}.$
answer: \arcsin \frac {x - 1}{\sqrt {3}} - \frac {1}{\sqrt {6}} \ln \frac {\sqrt {6} + \sqrt {2 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}}{\sqrt {6} - \sqrt {2 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} - \frac {\sqrt {2}}{3} \arctan \frac {(x - 1) \sqrt {2}}{\sqrt {2 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} + C.
solution:
解 $\int  rac{x^2\mathrm{d}x}{(4 - 2x + x^2)\sqrt{2 + 2x - x^2}} = \int  rac{(x - 1)^2 + 2(x - 1) + 1}{[3 + (x - 1)^2]\sqrt{3 - (x - 1)^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$

设 $x - 1 = \sqrt {3}\sin t$ ，并限制 $- rac {\pi}{2} < t <  rac {\pi}{2}$ 则 $\mathrm{dx} = \sqrt {3}\cos t\mathrm{dt},\sqrt {2 + 2x - x^2} = \sqrt {3}\cos t.$

代入得 $\int  rac{x^2\mathrm{d}x}{(4 - 2x + x^2)\sqrt{2 + 2x - x^2}} = \int  rac {1 + 2\sqrt {3}\sin t + 3\sin^2t}{3(1 + \sin^2t)}\mathrm{d}t$

$$ egin {array}{l}
= \int \mathrm {d} t +  rac {2}{\sqrt {3}} \int  rac {\sin t}{1 + \sin^ {2} t} \mathrm {d} t -  rac {2}{3} \int  rac {\mathrm {d} t}{1 + \sin^ {2} t} = t -  rac {2}{\sqrt {3}} \int  rac {\mathrm {d} (\cos t)}{2 - \cos^ {2} t} -  rac {2}{3} \int  rac {\mathrm {d} (	an t)}{1 + 2 	an^ {2} t} \
= t -  rac {1}{\sqrt {6}} \ln \left |  rac {\sqrt {2} + \cos t}{\sqrt {2} - \cos t} ight | -  rac {\sqrt {2}}{3} \arctan (\sqrt {2} 	an t) + C \
= \arcsin  rac {x - 1}{\sqrt {3}} -  rac {1}{\sqrt {6}} \ln  rac {\sqrt {6} + \sqrt {2 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}}{\sqrt {6} - \sqrt {2 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} -  rac {\sqrt {2}}{3} \arctan  rac {(x - 1) \sqrt {2}}{\sqrt {2 + 2 x - x ^ {2}}} + C. \
\end {array}$$

question: 【1994】 $\int \sin^2 x\cos^4 x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \sin^2 x\cos^4 x\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{4}\int \sin^2 2x\cos^2 x\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{8}\int \sin^2 2x(1 + \cos 2x)\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= \frac {1}{8} \int \frac {1 - \cos 4 x}{2} d x + \frac {1}{16} \int \sin^2 2 x d (\sin 2 x) = \frac {x}{16} - \frac {1}{64} \sin 4 x + \frac {1}{48} \sin^3 2 x + C.
$$

question: 【1976】 $\int \frac{(x^2 - 1)\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 + 1)\sqrt{x^4 + 1}}.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{(x^2 - 1)\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 + 1)\sqrt{x^4 + 1}} = \int \frac{\frac{x^2 - 1}{(x^2 + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{\frac{x^4 + 1}{(x^2 + 1)^2}}} = \int \frac{\frac{x^2 - 1}{(x^2 + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 - \left(\frac{x\sqrt{2}}{x^2 + 1}\right)^2}}.$

下面我们先考虑积分 $\int \frac{x^2 - 1}{(x^2 + 1)^2} \, \mathrm{d}x$ . 设 $x = \tan t, -\frac{\pi}{2} < t < \frac{\pi}{2}$ , 则有 $\mathrm{d}x = \sec^2 t \, \mathrm{d}t$ . 代入得

$$
\int \frac {x ^ {2} - 1}{(x ^ {2} + 1) ^ {2}} d x = \int \frac {\tan^ {2} t - 1}{\sec^ {4} t} \sec^ {2} t d t = \int (\sin^ {2} t - \cos^ {2} t) d t = - \int \cos 2 t d t = - \frac {1}{2} \sin 2 t + C _ {1} = - \frac {x}{1 + x ^ {2}} + C _ {1},
$$

从而，可得 $\frac{x^2 - 1}{(x^2 + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{x\sqrt{2}}{1 + x^2}\right)$ 于是，

$$
\int \frac {(x ^ {2} - 1) \mathrm {d} x}{(x ^ {2} + 1) \sqrt {x ^ {4} + 1}} = - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(\frac {x \sqrt {2}}{1 + x ^ {2}}\right)}{\sqrt {1 - \left(\frac {x \sqrt {2}}{1 + x ^ {2}}\right) ^ {2}}} = - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arcsin \left(\frac {x \sqrt {2}}{1 + x ^ {2}}\right) + C.

question: 【1958】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 + 1)\sqrt{x^2 - 1}}.$
solution:
解当 $x > 1$ 时，设 $x = \mathrm{sect}$ ，并限制 $0 < t < \frac{\pi}{2}$ ，则 $\mathrm{dx} = \mathrm{sect}\tan t\mathrm{dt},\quad \sqrt{x^2 - 1} = \tan t.$

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(x^2 + 1)\sqrt{x^2 - 1}} = \int \frac{\sec t\mathrm{d}t}{1 + \sec^2t} = \int \frac{\cos t}{\cos^2t + 1}\mathrm{d}t = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\sin t)}{2 - \sin^2t}$

$$
= \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {2} + \sin t}{\sqrt {2} - \sin t} \right| + C = \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {2} x + \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1}}{\sqrt {2} x - \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1}} \right| + C.
$$

当 $x < -1$ 时，仍设 $x = \sec t$ ，但限制 $\pi < t < \frac{3}{2}\pi$ ，经计算可获得同样的结果。

总之，当 $|x| > 1$ 时，

$$
\int \frac {d x}{(x ^ {2} + 1) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1}} = \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \frac {x \sqrt {2} + \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1}}{x \sqrt {2} - \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1}} \right| + C.
$$

question: 【1991】 $\int \cos^5 x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \cos^5 x\mathrm{d}x = \int \cos^4 x\cos x\mathrm{d}x = \int (1 - \sin^2 x)^2\mathrm{d}(\sin x)$

$$
= \int (1 - 2 \sin^ {2} x + \sin^ {4} x) d (\sin x) = \sin x - \frac {2}{3} \sin^ {3} x + \frac {1}{5} \sin^ {5} x + C.
$$

question: [1974] $\int \frac{x + \sqrt{1 + x + x^2}}{1 + x + \sqrt{1 + x + x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x + \sqrt{1 + x + x^2}}{1 + x + \sqrt{1 + x + x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{(x + \sqrt{1 + x + x^2})(1 + x - \sqrt{1 + x + x^2})}{(1 + x)^2 - (1 + x + x^2)}\mathrm{d}x$
$$
= \int \frac {\sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}} - 1}{x} d x = \int \frac {\sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}}{x} d x - \ln | x |.
$$
对于积分 $\int \frac{\sqrt{1 + x + x^2}}{x} \mathrm{d}x$ ，设 $x = \frac{1}{t}$ ，则 $\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{t^2} \mathrm{d}t$ ， $\sqrt{1 + x + x^2} = \frac{\sqrt{t^2 + t + 1}}{|t|}$ 。

不妨设 $t > 0$ ，代入得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {\sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}}{x} d x = - \int \frac {\sqrt {t ^ {2} + t + 1}}{t ^ {2}} d t = \int \sqrt {t ^ {2} + t + 1} d \left(\frac {1}{t}\right) \\
= \frac {\sqrt {t ^ {2} + t + 1}}{t} - \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {2 t + 1}{t \sqrt {1 + t + t ^ {2}}} d t = \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1} - \int \frac {d t}{\sqrt {1 + t + t ^ {2}}} - \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {d t}{t \sqrt {1 + t + t ^ {2}}} \\
= \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1} - \ln \left(t + \frac {1}{2} + \sqrt {1 + t + t ^ {2}}\right) + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(\frac {1}{t}\right)}{\sqrt {\left(\frac {1}{t}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {1}{t}\right) + 1}} \\
= \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1} - \ln \frac {2 + x + 2 \sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}}{2 x} + \frac {1}{2} \ln \left(\frac {1}{t} + \frac {1}{2} + \sqrt {\frac {1}{t ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{t} + 1}\right) + C _ {1} \\
= \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1} - \ln \frac {2 + x + 2 \sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}}{2 x} + \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {2 x + 1 + 2 \sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}}{2} + C _ {1} \\
= \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1} + \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {2 x + 1 + 2 \sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}}{(2 + x + 2 \sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}) ^ {2}} + \ln x + C . \\
\end{array}
$$

于是，当 $x > 0$ 时，最后得到

$$
\int \frac {x + \sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}}{1 + x + \sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}} d x = \sqrt {x ^ {2} + x + 1} + \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {2 x + 1 + 2 \sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}}{(2 + x + 2 \sqrt {1 + x + x ^ {2}}) ^ {2}} + C.
$$

当 $x < 0$ 时，可获得同样的结果

question: 【1995】 $\int \sin^4 x\cos^5 x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int \sin^4 x\cos^5 x\mathrm{d}x = \int \sin^4 x(1 - \sin^2 x)^2\mathrm{d}(\sin x) = \frac{1}{5}\sin^5 x - \frac{2}{7}\sin^7 x + \frac{1}{9}\sin^9 x + C.$

question: 【1998】 $\int \frac{\cos^4x}{\sin^3x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\cos^4 x}{\sin^3 x} \mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\cos^3 x}{\sin^3 x} \mathrm{d}(\sin x) = -\frac{1}{2} \int \cos^3 x \mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{\sin^2 x}\right)$

$$
= - \frac {\cos^ {3} x}{2 \sin^ {2} x} - \frac {3}{2} \int \frac {\cos^ {2} x \sin x}{\sin^ {2} x} d x = - \frac {\cos^ {3} x}{2 \sin^ {2} x} - \frac {3}{2} \int \frac {1 - \sin^ {2} x}{\sin x} d x
$$

$$
= - \frac {\cos^ {3} x}{2 \sin^ {2} x} - \frac {3}{2} \ln \left| \tan \frac {x}{2} \right| - \frac {3}{2} \cos x + C
$$

question:
【1985】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt[3]{1 + x^3}}.$

提示 令 $x^{-3} + 1 = z^3$
solution:
解 $\frac{1}{\sqrt[3]{1 + x^3}} = x^0 (1 + x^3)^{-\frac{1}{3}}, m = 0, n = 3, p = -\frac{1}{3}; \frac{m + 1}{n} + p = 0$ 这是二项微分式的第三种情形.

设 $x^{-3} + 1 = z^3$ ，则 $x = (z^{3} - 1)^{-\frac{1}{3}}$ ， $\mathrm{dx} = -z^2 (z^3 -1)^{-\frac{4}{3}}\mathrm{dz}$ 代入得

$$
\begin{array}{l}
\int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt [ 3 ]{1 + x ^ {3}}} = - \int \frac {z}{z ^ {3} - 1} \mathrm {d} z = - \frac {1}{3} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} z}{z - 1} + \frac {1}{3} \int \frac {z - 1}{z ^ {2} + z + 1} \mathrm {d} z \\
= - \frac {1}{3} \ln | z - 1 | + \frac {1}{6} \ln (z ^ {2} + z + 1) - \frac {1}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \left(\frac {2 z + 1}{\sqrt {3}}\right) + C \\
= \frac {1}{6} \ln \frac {z ^ {2} + z + 1}{(z - 1) ^ {2}} - \frac {1}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \left(\frac {2 z + 1}{\sqrt {3}}\right) + C, \\
\end{array}
$

其中 $z = \frac{\sqrt[3]{1 + x^3}}{x}$

question: 【1990】在什么情形下，积分 $\int \sqrt{1 + x^m}\mathrm{d}x$ （ $m$ 为有理数)为初等函数？
solution:
解 $\sqrt{1 + x^m} = x^0 (1 + x^m)^{\frac{1}{2}}$ 由于 $p = \frac{1}{2}$ 故由切比雪夫定理知，仅在下述两种情形，此函数的积分可化为有理函数的积分.

第一种情形， $\frac{1}{m}$ 为整数，即 $m = \frac{1}{k_1} = \frac{2}{2k_1}$ 其中 $k_{1} = \pm 1,\pm 2,\dots$

第二种情形， $\frac{1}{m} +\frac{1}{2}$ 为整数，即 $m = \frac{2}{2k_2 - 1}$ ，其中 $k_{2} = 0,\pm 1,\pm 2,\dots$

综上所述，即得：当 $m = \frac{2}{k}$ （式中 $k = \pm 1, \pm 2, \dots$ ）时，积分 $\int \sqrt{1 + x^m} \mathrm{d}x$ 为初等函数。

question: 【1999】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^3 x}$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^3 x} = -\int \frac{1}{\sin x} \mathrm{d}(\cot x) = -\frac{\cot x}{\sin x} - \int \cot x \frac{\cos x}{\sin^2 x} \mathrm{d}x = -\frac{\cos x}{\sin^2 x} - \int \frac{1 - \sin^2 x}{\sin^3 x} \mathrm{d}x$

$$
= - \frac {\cos x}{\sin^ {2} x} - \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sin^ {3} x} + \ln \left| \tan \frac {x}{2} \right|,
$$

于是， $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^3 x} = -\frac{\cos x}{2 \sin^2 x} + \frac{1}{2} \ln \left| \tan \frac{x}{2} \right| + C.$

question: 【1987】+ $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x\sqrt[6]{1 + x^6}}.$
solution:
解 $\frac{1}{x\sqrt[6]{1 + x^6}} = x^{-1}(1 + x^6)^{-\frac{1}{6}}$， $m = -1, n = 6, p = -\frac{1}{6}$；$\frac{m + 1}{n} = 0$，这是二项微分式的第二种情形.

设 $1 + x^{6} = z^{6}$，则 $z = \sqrt[6]{1 + x^6}$（$z > 0, x > 0$）， $x = \sqrt[6]{z^6 - 1}$， $\mathrm{d}x = z^5 (z^6 - 1)^{-\frac{5}{6}} \mathrm{d}z.$ 代入得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{x \sqrt [ 6 ]{1 + x ^ {6}}} = \int \frac {z ^ {4} \mathrm {d} z}{z ^ {6} - 1} = \int \left[ - \frac {1}{6 (z + 1)} + \frac {z + 1}{6 (z ^ {2} - z + 1)} + \frac {1}{6 (z - 1)} + \frac {- z + 1}{6 (z ^ {2} + z + 1)} \right] \mathrm {d} z \\ = \frac {1}{6} \ln \frac {z - 1}{z + 1} + \frac {1}{1 2} \ln \frac {z ^ {2} - z + 1}{z ^ {2} + z + 1} + \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {3}} \left[ \arctan \left(\frac {2 z - 1}{\sqrt {3}}\right) + \arctan \left(\frac {2 z + 1}{\sqrt {3}}\right) \right] + C _ {1} \\ = \frac {1}{6} \ln \frac {z - 1}{z + 1} + \frac {1}{1 2} \ln \frac {z ^ {2} - z + 1}{z ^ {2} + z + 1} + \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {3}} \arctan \left(\frac {z ^ {2} - 1}{z \sqrt {3}}\right) + C,
\end{array}
$$

其中 $z = \sqrt[6]{1 + x^6}$

question: 【1997】 $\int \frac{\sin^3x}{\cos^4x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: \int \frac{\sin^3 x}{\cos^4 x} \mathrm{d}x = -\int \frac{1 - \cos^2 x}{\cos^4 x} \mathrm{d}(\cos x) = \frac{1}{3 \cos^3 x} - \frac{1}{\cos x} + C.

question: 【2001】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^4 x \cos^4 x}$ .
solution:
$\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^4 x \cos^4 x} = 16 \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^4 2x} = -8 \int \csc^2 2x \, \mathrm{d}(\cot 2x)$
$$
= - 8 \int (1 + \cot^ {2} 2 x) d (\cot 2 d) = - 8 \cot 2 x - \frac {8}{3} \cot^ {3} 2 x + C.
$$

question: 【1992】 $\int \sin^6 x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \sin^6 x\mathrm{d}x = \int \left(\frac{1 - \cos 2x}{2}\right)^3\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{8}\int (1 - 3\cos 2x + 3\cos^2 2x - \cos^3 2x)\mathrm{d}x$
$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \frac {x}{8} - \frac {3}{1 6} \sin 2 x + \frac {3}{8} \int \frac {1 + \cos 4 x}{2} d x - \frac {1}{8} \int (1 - \sin^ {2} 2 x) \cos 2 x d x \\
= \frac {x}{8} - \frac {3}{1 6} \sin 2 x + \frac {3 x}{1 6} + \frac {3}{6 4} \sin 4 x - \frac {1}{1 6} \int (1 - \sin^ {2} 2 x) d (\sin 2 x) \\
= \frac {5 x}{1 6} - \frac {3}{1 6} \sin 2 x + \frac {3}{6 4} \sin 4 x - \frac {1}{1 6} \sin 2 x + \frac {1}{4 8} \sin^ {3} 2 x + C \\
= \frac {5 x}{1 6} - \frac {1}{4} \sin 2 x + \frac {3}{6 4} \sin 4 x + \frac {1}{4 8} \sin^ {3} 2 x + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2004】 $\int \tan^5 x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \tan^5 x\mathrm{d}x = \int \tan x(\sec^2 x - 1)^2\mathrm{d}x = \int \sec^4 x\tan x\mathrm{d}x - 2\int \sec^2 x\tan x\mathrm{d}x + \int \tan x\mathrm{d}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \int \sec^ {3} x d (\sec x) - 2 \int \sec x d (\sec x) - \int \frac {d (\cos x)}{\cos x} = \frac {1}{4} \sec^ {4} x - \sec^ {2} x - \ln | \cos x | + C _ {1} \\
= \frac {1}{4} \tan^ {4} x - \frac {1}{2} \tan^ {2} x - \ln | \cos x | + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【1971】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{x^2 + 1} - \sqrt{x^2 - 1}}.$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{x^2 + 1} - \sqrt{x^2 - 1}} = \int \frac{\sqrt{x^2 + 1} + \sqrt{x^2 - 1}}{(x^2 + 1) - (x^2 - 1)}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \sqrt{x^2 + 1}\mathrm{d}x + \frac{1}{2}\int \sqrt{x^2 - 1}\mathrm{d}x$\n\n$$ = \frac {x}{4} (\sqrt {x ^ {2} + 1} + \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1}) + \frac {1}{4} \ln \left| \frac {x + \sqrt {x ^ {2} + 1}}{x + \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1}} \right| + C.$$

question: 【2002】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^3 x \cos^5 x}$ .
solution:
提示：多次利用等式 $1 = \sin^2 x + \cos^2 x$

解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^3 x \cos^5 x} = \int \frac{\sin^2 x + \cos^2 x}{\sin^3 x \cos^5 x} \mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin x \cos^5 x} + \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^3 x \cos^3 x}$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \int \frac {\sin^ {2} x + \cos^ {2} x}{\sin x \cos^ {5} x} d x + \int \frac {\sin^ {2} x + \cos^ {2} x}{\sin^ {3} x \cos^ {3} x} d x = \int \frac {\sin x}{\cos^ {5} x} d x + 2 \int \frac {d x}{\sin x \cos^ {3} x} + \int \frac {d x}{\sin^ {3} x \cos x} \\
= - \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\cos x)}{\cos^ {5} x} + 2 \int \frac {\sin x}{\cos^ {3} x} \mathrm {d} x + 3 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sin x \cos x} + \int \frac {\cos x}{\sin^ {3} x} \mathrm {d} x \\
= \frac {1}{4 \cos^ {4} x} - 2 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\cos x)}{\cos^ {3} x} + 3 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\tan x)}{\tan x} + \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\sin x)}{\sin^ {3} x} = \frac {1}{4 \cos^ {4} x} + \frac {1}{\cos^ {2} x} + 3 \ln | \tan x | - \frac {1}{2 \sin^ {2} x} + C _ {1} \\
= \frac {1}{4} \tan^ {4} x + \frac {3}{2} \tan^ {2} x - \frac {1}{2} \cot^ {2} x + 3 \ln | \tan x | + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: [1996] $\int \sin^5 x\cos^5 x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \sin^5 x\cos^5 x\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{1}{32}\sin^5 2x\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{64}\int (1 - \cos^2 2x)^2\mathrm{d}(\cos 2x)$

$$
= - \frac {1}{6 4} \cos 2 x + \frac {1}{9 6} \cos^ {3} 2 x - \frac {1}{3 2 0} \cos^ {5} 2 x + C.
$$

question: 【2006】 $\int \frac{\sin^4 x}{\cos^6 x} \mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int \frac{\sin^4 x}{\cos^6 x} \mathrm{d}x = \int \tan^4 x \mathrm{d}(\tan x) = \frac{1}{5} \tan^5 x + C.$

question: 【2022】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin x - \sin a}$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin x - \sin a} = \frac{1}{\cos a}\int \frac{\cos\left(\frac{x + a}{2} - \frac{x - a}{2}\right)}{\sin x - \sin a}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{\cos a}\int \frac{\cos\frac{x + a}{2}\cos\frac{x - a}{2} + \sin\frac{x + a}{2}\sin\frac{x - a}{2}}{2\cos\frac{x + a}{2}\sin\frac{x - a}{2}}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= \frac {1}{2 \cos a} \int \left(\frac {\cos \frac {x - a}{2}}{\sin \frac {x - a}{2}} + \frac {\sin \frac {x + a}{2}}{\cos \frac {x + a}{2}}\right) d x = \frac {1}{\cos a} \ln \left| \frac {\sin \frac {x - a}{2}}{\cos \frac {x + a}{2}} \right| + C,
$$

其中 $\cos a\neq 0$

question: 【2014】 $\int \cos x\cos 2x\cos 3x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \cos x\cos 2x\cos 3x\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \cos 2x(\cos 4x + \cos 2x)\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{4}\int (\cos 6x + \cos 2x)\mathrm{d}x + \frac{1}{4}\int (1 + \cos 4x)\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= \frac {1}{2 4} \sin 6 x + \frac {1}{8} \sin 2 x + \frac {1}{1 6} \sin 4 x + \frac {x}{4} + C.
$$

question: 【2025】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{2\sin x - \cos x + 5}$
solution:
解设 $t = \tan \frac{x}{2}$ 则 $\sin x = \frac{2t}{1 + t^2},\cos x = \frac{1 - t^2}{1 + t^2},\mathrm{d}x = \frac{2\mathrm{d}t}{1 + t^2}.~$代人得

$$ \\int \frac {d x}{2 \sin x - \cos x + 5} = \\int \frac {d t}{3 t ^ {2} + 2 t + 2} = \frac {1}{\sqrt {5}} \arctan \left(\frac {3 t + 1}{\sqrt {5}}\right) + C = \frac {1}{\sqrt {5}} \arctan \left(\frac {3 \tan \frac {x}{2} + 1}{\sqrt {5}}\right) + C.$$

question: 【2007】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{\sin^3 x \cos^5 x}}.$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{\sin^3 x \cos^5 x}} = \int \frac{\sin^2 x \mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{\sin^3 x \cos^5 x}} + \int \frac{\cos^2 x \mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{\sin^3 x \cos^5 x}} = \int \sqrt{\tan x} \mathrm{d}(\tan x) - \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\cot x)}{\sqrt{\cot x}}$

question:
【2012】推出下列积分的递推公式：

(1) $I_{n} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^{n}x}; \quad (2) K_{n} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\cos^{n}x} \quad (n > 2).$

利用这些公式计算 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^5 x}$ 和 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\cos^7 x}$ .

提示 利用分部积分法及 $1 = \sin^2 x + \cos^2 x$ ，易得

(1) $I_{n} = -\frac{\cos x}{(n - 1)\sin^{n - 1}x} + \frac{n - 2}{n - 1} I_{n - 2}$ ; (2) $K_{n} = \frac{\sin x}{(n - 1)\cos^{n - 1}x} + \frac{n - 2}{n - 1} K_{n - 2}$ .
solution:
解 (1) $I_{n} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^{n}x} = \int \frac{\sin^{2}x + \cos^{2}x}{\sin^{n}x}\mathrm{d}x = I_{n - 2} - \frac{1}{n - 1}\int \cos x\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{\sin^{n - 1}x}\right)$

$$
= I _ {n - 2} - \frac {\cos x}{(n - 1) \sin^ {n - 1} x} - \frac {1}{n - 1} I _ {n - 2} = - \frac {\cos x}{(n - 1) \sin^ {n - 1} x} + \frac {n - 2}{n - 1} I _ {n - 2};
$$

利用此公式及 $I_{1} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin x} = \ln \left|\tan \frac{x}{2}\right| + C$ ，即得

$$
I _ {5} = \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sin^ {5} x} = - \frac {\cos x}{4 \sin^ {4} x} + \frac {3}{4} I _ {3} = \dots = - \frac {\cos x}{4 \sin^ {4} x} - \frac {3 \cos x}{8 \sin^ {2} x} + \frac {3}{8} \ln | \tan \frac {x}{2} | + C.
$$

question: 【2020】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin(x + a)\cos(x + b)}.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin(x + a)\cos(x + b)} = \frac{1}{\cos(a - b)}\int \frac{\cos[(x + a) - (x + b)]}{\sin(x + a)\cos(x + b)}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= \frac {1}{\cos (a - b)} \int \left[ \frac {\cos (x + a)}{\sin (x + a)} + \frac {\sin (x + b)}{\cos (x + b)} \right] d x = \frac {1}{\cos (a - b)} \ln \left| \frac {\sin (x + a)}{\cos (x + b)} \right| + C.
$$

其中 $\cos (a - b)\neq 0.$

question: 【2032】 $\int \frac{\sin x\cos x}{\sin x + \cos x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{\sin x\cos x}{\sin x + \cos x}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\sin^2\left(x + \frac{\pi}{4}\right) - \frac{1}{2}}{\sqrt{2}\sin\left(x + \frac{\pi}{4}\right)}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\int \sin \left(x + \frac{\pi}{4}\right)\mathrm{d}x - \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin\left(x + \frac{\pi}{4}\right)}$ $$ \begin{array}{l} = - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \cos \left(x + \frac {\pi}{4}\right) - \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \tan \left(\frac {x}{2} + \frac {\pi}{8}\right) \right| + C \\ = \frac {1}{2} (\sin x - \cos x) - \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \tan \left(\frac {x}{2} + \frac {\pi}{8}\right) \right| + C. \end{array} $$

question: 【2005】 $\int \cot^6 x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \cot^6 x\mathrm{d}x = \int \cot^2 x(\csc^2 x - 1)^2\mathrm{d}x = \int \cot^2 x\csc^4 x\mathrm{d}x - 2\int \cot^2 x\csc^2 x\mathrm{d}x + \int \cot^2 x\mathrm{d}x$
$$\begin{array}{l} = - \int \cot^ {2} x (1 + \cot^ {2} x) d (\cot x) + 2 \int \cot^ {2} x d (\cot x) + \int (\csc^ {2} x - 1) d x \\ = - \frac {1}{3} \cot^ {3} x - \frac {1}{5} \cot^ {5} x + \frac {2}{3} \cot^ {3} x - \cot x - x + C = - \frac {1}{5} \cot^ {5} x + \frac {1}{3} \cot^ {3} x - \cot x - x + C. \\ \end{array}$$

question: 【2033】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(a\sin x + b\cos x)^2}$
solution: $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(a\sin x + b\cos x)^2} = \frac{1}{a}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(a\tan x + b)}{(a\tan x + b)^2} = -\frac{1}{a\tan x + b} + C$

question:
[2012】(2) 推出下列积分的递推公式：

(1) $I_{n} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^{n}x}; \quad (2) K_{n} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\cos^{n}x} \quad (n > 2).$

利用这些公式计算 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^5 x}$ 和 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\cos^7 x}$ .

提示 利用分部积分法及 $1 = \sin^2 x + \cos^2 x$，易得

(1) $I_{n} = -\frac{\cos x}{(n - 1)\sin^{n - 1}x} + \frac{n - 2}{n - 1} I_{n - 2}$ ; (2) $K_{n} = \frac{\sin x}{(n - 1)\cos^{n - 1}x} + \frac{n - 2}{n - 1} K_{n - 2}$ .
answer: $\frac{\sin x}{6 \cos^6 x} + \frac{5 \sin x}{2 4 \cos^4 x} + \frac{5 \sin x}{1 6 \cos^2 x} + \frac{5}{1 6} \ln \left| \tan \left(\frac{x}{2} + \frac{\pi}{4}\right) \right| + C$
solution:
解 (2) $K_{n} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\cos^{n}x} = \int \frac{\sin^{2}x + \cos^{2}x}{\cos^{n}x}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{n - 1}\int \sin x\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{\cos^{n - 1}x}\right) + K_{n - 2}$

$$= \frac {\sin x}{(n - 1) \cos^ {n - 1} x} - \frac {1}{n - 1} K _ {n - 2} + K _ {n - 2} = \frac {\sin x}{(n - 1) \cos^ {n - 1} x} + \frac {n - 2}{n - 1} K _ {n - 2};$$

利用此公式及 $K_{1} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\cos x} = \ln \left|\tan \left(\frac{x}{2} + \frac{\pi}{4}\right)\right| + C$，即得

$$K _ {7} = \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\cos^ {7} x} = \frac {\sin x}{6 \cos^ {6} x} + \frac {5}{6} K _ {5} = \dots = \frac {\sin x}{6 \cos^ {6} x} + \frac {5 \sin x}{2 4 \cos^ {4} x} + \frac {5 \sin x}{1 6 \cos^ {2} x} + \frac {5}{1 6} \ln \left| \tan \left(\frac {x}{2} + \frac {\pi}{4}\right) \right| + C.$$

question: 【1978】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x\sqrt{x^4 + 2x^2 - 1}}.$
solution:
提示 令 $\frac{1}{x} = \sqrt{t}$ （这里设 $x > 0$ 若 $x < 0$ ，则令 $\frac{1}{x} = -\sqrt{t}$ ，最后结果相同）.

解 作代换 $\frac{1}{x} = \sqrt{t}$ （这里设 $x > 0$ 。若 $x < 0$ ，则作变换 $\frac{1}{x} = -\sqrt{t}$ ，最后结果相同），则

$$
\mathrm {d} x = - \frac {1}{2 t \sqrt {t}} \mathrm {d} t, \quad \sqrt {x ^ {4} + 2 x ^ {2} - 1} = \frac {\sqrt {1 + 2 t - t ^ {2}}}{t}
$$

代入得 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x\sqrt{x^4 + 2x^2 - 1}} = -\frac{1}{2}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{\sqrt{1 + 2t - t^2}} = \frac{1}{2}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(1 - t)}{\sqrt{2 - (1 - t)^2}} = \frac{1}{2}\arcsin \left(\frac{1 - t}{\sqrt{2}}\right) + C$

$$
= \frac {1}{2} \arcsin \left(\frac {x ^ {2} - 1}{x ^ {2} \sqrt {2}}\right) + C \quad (| x | > \sqrt {\sqrt {2} - 1}).
$$

question: 【2018】 $\int \sin^3 2x\cos^2 3x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
先利用三角公式化简 $\sin^3 2x\cos^2 3x\mathrm{d}x$ ，得

$$
\sin^ {3} 2 x \cos^ {2} 3 x = - \frac {1}{1 6} \sin 1 2 x + \frac {3}{1 6} \sin 8 x - \frac {1}{8} \sin 6 x - \frac {3}{1 6} \sin 4 x + \frac {3}{8} \sin 2 x.
$$

question: 【2037】 $\int \frac{\sin^2x - \cos^2x}{\sin^4x + \cos^4x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\sin^2 x - \cos^2 x}{\sin^4 x + \cos^4 x} \mathrm{d}x = -\int \frac{\cos 2x}{1 - \frac{1}{2}\sin^2 2x} \mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} \int \left( \frac{2\cos 2x}{\sqrt{2} - \sin 2x} + \frac{2\cos 2x}{\sqrt{2} + \sin 2x} \right) \mathrm{d}x$
$$
= \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \frac {\sqrt {2} - \sin 2 x}{\sqrt {2} + \sin 2 x} + C.
$$

question: 【2017】 $\int \cos^2 ax\cos^2 bx\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: \frac {x}{4} + \frac {\sin 2 (a + b) x}{16 (a + b)} + \frac {\sin 2 (a - b) x}{16 (a - b)} + \frac {1}{8 a} \sin 2 a x + \frac {1}{8 b} \sin 2 b x + C.
solution:
解 $\int \cos^2 ax\cos^2 bx\mathrm{d}x = \int (\cos ax\cos bx)^2\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{4}\int [\cos (a - b)x + \cos (a + b)x]^2\mathrm{d}x
$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \frac {1}{4} \int [ \cos^ {2} (a - b) x + \cos^ {2} (a + b) x + 2 \cos (a - b) x \cos (a + b) x ] d x \\
= \frac {1}{8} \int [ 2 + \cos 2 (a + b) x + \cos 2 (a - b) x ] d x + \frac {1}{4} \int (\cos 2 a x + \cos 2 b x) d x \\
= \frac {x}{4} + \frac {\sin 2 (a + b) x}{16 (a + b)} + \frac {\sin 2 (a - b) x}{16 (a - b)} + \frac {1}{8 a} \sin 2 a x + \frac {1}{8 b} \sin 2 b x + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2015】 $\int \sin x\sin \frac{x}{2}\sin \frac{x}{3}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
\int \sin x\sin \frac{x}{2}\sin \frac{x}{3}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \left(\cos \frac{2}{3} x - \cos \frac{4}{3} x\right)\sin \frac{x}{2}\mathrm{d}x

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \frac {1}{2} \int \cos \frac {2}{3} x \sin \frac {x}{2} d x - \frac {1}{2} \int \cos \frac {4}{3} x \sin \frac {x}{2} d x \\
= \frac {1}{4} \int \left(\sin \frac {7}{6} x - \sin \frac {1}{6} x\right) d x - \frac {1}{4} \int \left(\sin \frac {11}{6} x - \sin \frac {5}{6} x\right) d x \\
= - \frac {3}{14} \cos \frac {7}{6} x + \frac {3}{2} \cos \frac {x}{6} + \frac {3}{22} \cos \frac {11}{6} x - \frac {3}{10} \cos \frac {5}{6} x + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2013】 $\int \sin 5x\cos x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int \sin 5x\cos x\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int [\sin 4x + \sin 6x]\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{8}\cos 4x - \frac{1}{12}\cos 6x + C.$

question: 【2029】 $\int \frac{\sin^2x}{1 + \sin^2x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\sin^2 x}{1 + \sin^2 x} \mathrm{d}x = \int \left(1 - \frac{1}{1 + \sin^2 x}\right) \mathrm{d}x = x - \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\tan x)}{\sec^2 x + \tan^2 x} = x - \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\tan x)}{1 + 2\tan^2 x}$

$$
= x - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \arctan (\sqrt {2} \tan x) + C.
$$

question: 【2038】 $\int \frac{\sin x\cos x}{1 + \sin^4x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int \frac{\sin x\cos x}{1 + \sin^4x}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\tan x\sec^2x}{\sec^4x + \tan^4x}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\tan^2x)}{2\tan^4x + 2\tan^2x + 1} = \frac{1}{2}\arctan (1 + 2\tan^2 x) + C.$

question: 【2042】证明： $\int \frac{a_1\sin x + b_1\cos x}{a\sin x + b\cos x}\mathrm{d}x = Ax + B\ln |a\sin x + b\cos x| + C$ ，式中 $A,B,C$ 为常数.
answer: Ax + B\ln |a\sin x + b\cos x| + C
solution:
提示 首先， $a$ 及 $b$ 不可能同时为零。其次，令
$$
a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x \equiv A (a \sin x + b \cos x) + B (a \cos x - b \sin x),
$$
比较等式两端同类项的系数，可得 $A, B$
$$
A = \frac {a a _ {1} + b b _ {1}}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}},B = \frac {a b _ {1} - a _ {1} b}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}} \quad (a ^ {2} + b ^ {2} \neq 0),
$$
并注意 $(a\cos x - b\sin x)\mathrm{d}x = \mathrm{d}(a\sin x + b\cos x)$ ，命题即易获证.

证设 $a_1\sin x + b_1\cos x \equiv A(a\sin x + b\cos x) + B(a\cos x - b\sin x),$

比较等式两端同类项的系数，可得 $A = \frac{aa_1 + bb_1}{a^2 + b^2}$ ， $B = \frac{ab_1 - a_1b}{a^2 + b^2}$ ， $a^2 + b^2 \neq 0$ 。于是，
$$
\int \frac {a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x}{a \sin x + b \cos x} d x = A \int d x + B \int \frac {d (a \sin x + b \cos x)}{a \sin x + b \cos x} = A x + B \ln | a \sin x + b \cos x | + C.
$$

question:
【1980】 证明：积分

$$
\int R (x, \sqrt {a x + b}, \sqrt {c x + d}) \mathrm {d} x (R \text {为 有 理 函 数})
$$
的求法，归结为有理函数的积分法
solution:
证明思路 当 $a, c$ 中至少有一个为零时，则积分的求法显然可归结为有理函数的积分法。
当 $a \neq 0$ 及 $c \neq 0$ 时，设 $\sqrt{ax + b} = z$ ，则 $\sqrt{cx + d} = \sqrt{c_1z^2 + d_1}$ ，其中 $c_{1} = \frac{c}{a}$ ， $d_{1} = d - \frac{bc}{a}$ 。从而，原积分变形为
$$
\int R \left(\frac {z ^ {2} - b}{a}, z, \sqrt {c _ {1} z ^ {2} + d _ {1}}\right) \frac {2}{a} z \mathrm {d} z = \int R _ {1} (z, \sqrt {c _ {1} z ^ {2} + d _ {1}}) \mathrm {d} z,
$$
其中 $R_{1}$ 为有理函数.
若 $c_{1} > 0$ ，设 $\sqrt{c_{1}z^{2} + d_{1}} = \pm \sqrt{c_{1}} z + u$ ；若 $d_{1} > 0$ ，设 $\sqrt{c_{1}z^{2} + d_{1}} = zu\pm \sqrt{d_{1}}$ ，即可将被积函数有理化从而命题获证.

证 当 $a, c$ 中至少有一个为零时，则积分
$$
\int R (x, \sqrt {a x + b}, \sqrt {c x + d}) \mathrm {d} x
$$
的求法显然可归结为有理函数的积分法
当 $a \neq 0, c \neq 0$ 时，设 $\sqrt{ax + b} = z$ ，则
$$
x = \frac {z ^ {2} - b}{a}, \quad \mathrm {d} x = \frac {2}{a} z \mathrm {d} z, \sqrt {c x + d} = \sqrt {\frac {c}{a} z ^ {2} + d - \frac {b c}{a}} = \sqrt {c _ {1} z ^ {2} + d _ {1}},
$$
式中 $c_{1} = \frac{c}{a}$ ， $d_{1} = d - \frac{bc}{a}$ 代人得
$$
\int R (x, \sqrt {a x + b}, \sqrt {c x + d}) \mathrm {d} x = \int R \left(\frac {z ^ {2} - b}{a}, z, \sqrt {c _ {1} z ^ {2} + d _ {1}}\right) \frac {2}{a} z \mathrm {d} z = \int R _ {1} \left(z, \sqrt {c _ {1} z ^ {2} + d _ {1}}\right) \mathrm {d} z,
$$
其中 $R_{1}$ 为有理函数.
再设 $\sqrt{c_1z^2 + d_1} = \pm \sqrt{c_1} z + u (c_1 > 0)$ 或 $\sqrt{c_1z^2 + d_1} = zu \pm \sqrt{d_1} (d_1 > 0)$ ——欧拉代换，就可将被积函数有理化.于是，积分
$$
\int R (x, \sqrt {a x + b}, \sqrt {c x + b}) d x
$$
的求法可归结为有理函数的积分法.

question: 【2041】把分母化为对数的形式，求积分 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{a\sin x + b\cos x}$
solution: $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{a\sin x + b\cos x} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin(x + \varphi)} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}}\ln \left|\tan \left(\frac{x + \varphi}{2}\right)\right| + C,$ 式中 $\cos \varphi = \frac{a}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}}, \sin \varphi = \frac{b}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}}, a^2 + b^2 \neq 0.$

question: 【2019】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin(x + a)\sin(x + b)}.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin(x + a)\sin(x + b)} = \frac{1}{\sin(a - b)}\int \frac{\sin[(x + a) - (x + b)]}{\sin(x + a)\sin(x + b)}\mathrm{d}x$

$$ = \frac {1}{\sin (a - b)} \int \left[ \frac {\cos (x + b)}{\sin (x + b)} - \frac {\cos (x + a)}{\sin (x + a)} \right] d x = \frac {1}{\sin (a - b)} \ln \left| \frac {\sin (x + b)}{\cos (x + a)} \right| + C,$$

其中 $\sin (a - b)\neq 0.$

question: 【2034】 $\int \frac{\sin x\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^3x + \cos^3x}$
answer: - \frac {1}{6} \ln \frac {(\sin x + \cos x) ^ {2}}{1 - \sin x \cos x} - \frac {1}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \left(\frac {2 \cos x - \sin x}{\sqrt {3} \sin x}\right) + C.
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\sin x\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^3x + \cos^3x} = \int \frac{\sin x\mathrm{d}x}{(\sin x + \cos x)(1 - \sin x\cos x)}$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {(\sin x - \cos x) d x}{(\sin x + \cos x) (1 - \sin x \cos x)} + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {d x}{1 - \sin x \cos x} \\
= \frac {1}{3} \int \frac {- (\cos x - \sin x) d x}{\sin x + \cos x} + \frac {1}{6} \int \frac {\sin^ {2} x - \cos^ {2} x}{1 - \sin x \cos x} d x + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {d x}{1 - \sin x \cos x} \\
= - \frac {1}{3} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\sin x + \cos x)}{\sin x + \cos x} + \frac {1}{6} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (1 - \sin x \cos x)}{1 - \sin x \cos x} - \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\cot x)}{\left(\cot x - \frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} + \frac {3}{4}} \\
= - \frac {1}{6} \ln \frac {(\sin x + \cos x) ^ {2}}{1 - \sin x \cos x} - \frac {1}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \left(\frac {2 \cos x - \sin x}{\sqrt {3} \sin x}\right) + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2035】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^4 x + \cos^4 x}$
solution: \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^4 x + \cos^4 x} = \int \frac{2\mathrm{d}x}{2 - \sin^2 2x} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\tan 2x)}{2\sec^2 2x - \tan^2 2x} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\tan 2x)}{2 + \tan^2 2x} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \arctan \left( \frac{\tan 2x}{\sqrt{2}} \right) + C.

question: 【2039】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^6 x + \cos^6 x}$
solution: $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^6 x + \cos^6 x} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 - 3\sin^2 x\cos^2 x} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 - \frac{3}{4}\sin^2 2x} = \int \frac{2\mathrm{d}(\tan 2x)}{4\sec^2 2x - 3\tan^2 2x} = \arctan \left(\frac{\tan 2x}{2}\right) + C.$

question:
【2064】 $\int \frac{\cos^{n - 1}\frac{x + a}{2}}{\sin^{n + 1}\frac{x - a}{2}}\mathrm{d}x.$

提示 令 $\frac{\cos\frac{x + a}{2}}{\sin\frac{x - a}{2}} = t$ ，则有 $\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^2\frac{x - a}{2}} = -\frac{2}{\cos a}\mathrm{d}t$ ( $\cos a \neq 0$ )
solution:
解设 $t = \frac{\cos\frac{x + a}{2}}{\sin\frac{x - a}{2}}$ 则 $\mathrm{dt} = \frac{-\frac{1}{2}\cos a}{\sin^2\frac{x - a}{2}}\mathrm{dx},\quad \frac{\mathrm{dx}}{\sin^2\frac{x - a}{2}} = -\frac{2}{\cos a}\mathrm{dt}$.

于是，$\int \frac{\cos^{n - 1}\frac{x + a}{2}}{\sin^{n + 1}\frac{x - a}{2}}\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{2}{\cos a}\int t^{n - 1}\mathrm{d}t = -\frac{2}{n\cos a} t^n +C = -\frac{2}{n\cos a}\left(\frac{\cos\frac{x + a}{2}}{\sin\frac{x - a}{2}}\right)^n +C\quad (\cos a\neq 0).

question: 【2030】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{a^2\sin^2x + b^2\cos^2x}$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{a^2\sin^2x + b^2\cos^2x} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\tan x)}{a^2\tan^2x + b^2} = \frac{1}{ab}\arctan \left(\frac{a\tan x}{b}\right) + C,$ 其中 $ab\neq 0$

question:
【2050】 证明：

$$
\int \frac {a _ {1} \sin^ {2} x + 2 b _ {1} \sin x \cos x + c _ {1} \cos^ {2} x}{a \sin x + b \cos x} d x = A \sin x + B \cos x + C \int \frac {d x}{a \sin x + b \cos x},
$$

式中 $A, B, C$ 为常数.
solution:
提示 首先， $a$ 及 $b$ 不可能同时为零。其次，令

$$
a _ {1} \sin^ {2} x + 2 b _ {1} \sin x \cos x + c _ {1} \cos^ {2} x \equiv A \cos x (a \sin x + b \cos x) - B \sin x (a \sin x + b \cos x) + C,
$$

比较等式两端同类项的系数，可得 $A, B, C$

$$
A = \frac {b c _ {1} - a _ {1} b + 2 a b _ {1}}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}, B = \frac {a c _ {1} - a a _ {1} - 2 b b _ {1}}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}, C = \frac {a _ {1} b ^ {2} + a ^ {2} c _ {1} - 2 a b b _ {1}}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}} (a ^ {2} + b ^ {2} \neq 0),
$$

命题即易获证。

证 按题意 $a, b$ 不同时为零。设

$$
a _ {1} \sin^ {2} x + 2 b _ {1} \sin x \cos x + c _ {1} \cos^ {2} x \equiv A \cos x (a \sin x + b \cos x) - B \sin x (a \sin x + b \cos x) + C,
$$

比较等式两端同类项的系数，则有

$$
a A - b B = 2 b _ {1}, \quad C - a B = a _ {1}, \quad C + b A = c _ {1},
$$

从而， $A = \frac{bc_1 - a_1b + 2ab_1}{a^2 + b^2},\quad B = \frac{ac_1 - aa_1 - 2bb_1}{a^2 + b^2},C = \frac{a_1b^2 + a^2c_1 - 2abb_1}{a^2 + b^2}$。

代入得

$$
\begin{array}{l}
\int \frac {a _ {1} \sin^ {2} x + 2 b _ {1} \sin x \cos x + c _ {1} \cos^ {2} x}{a \sin x + b \cos x} d x = A \int \cos x d x - B \int \sin x d x + C \int \frac {d x}{a \sin x + b \cos x} \\
= A \sin x + B \cos x + C \int \frac {d x}{a \sin x + b \cos x}。
\end{array}
$$

question:
【2046】证明：

$$
\int \frac {a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x + c _ {1}}{a \sin x + b \cos x + c} d x = A x + B \ln | a \sin x + b \cos x + c | + C \int \frac {d x}{a \sin x + b \cos x + c},
$$

式中 $A, B, C$ 为常数.
solution:
提示 首先， $a$ 及 $b$ 不可能同时为零。其次，令

$$
a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x + c _ {1} = A (a \sin x + b \cos x + c) + B (a \cos x - b \sin x) + C,
$$

比较等式两端同类项的系数，可得 $A, B, C$

$$
A = \frac {a a _ {1} + b b _ {1}}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}, B = \frac {a b _ {1} - a _ {1} b}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}, C = \frac {a (a c _ {1} - a _ {1} c) + b (b c _ {1} - b _ {1} c)}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}} \quad (a ^ {2} + b ^ {2} \neq 0),
$$

并注意 $(a\cos x - b\sin x)\mathrm{d}x = d(a\sin x + b\cos x + c)$ ，命题即易获证.

证 按题意 $a, b$ 不同时为零。设

$$
a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x + c _ {1} \equiv A (a \sin x + b \cos x + c) + B (a \cos x - b \sin x) + C,
$$

比较等式两端同类项的系数，则有

$$
A = \frac {a a _ {1} + b b _ {1}}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}, \quad B = \frac {a b _ {1} - a _ {1} b}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}, C = \frac {a (a c _ {1} - a _ {1} c) + b (b c _ {1} - b _ {1} c)}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}.
$$

代入得 $\int \frac{a_1\sin x + b_1\cos x + c_1}{a\sin x + b\cos x + c}\mathrm{d}x = A\int \mathrm{d}x + B\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(a\sin x + b\cos x + c)}{a\sin x + b\cos x + c} +C\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{a\sin x + b\cos x + c}$

$$
= A x + B \ln | a \sin x + b \cos x + c | + C \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{a \sin x + b \cos x + c}.
$$

question: 【2016】 $\int \sin x\sin (x + a)\sin (x + b)\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: - \frac {1}{2} \cos x \cos (a - b) + \frac {1}{1 2} \cos (3 x + a + b) - \frac {1}{4} \cos (x + a + b) + C.
solution:
解 $\int \sin x\sin (x + a)\sin (x + b)\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \sin x[\cos (a - b) - \cos (2x + a + b)]\mathrm{d}x$
$$\begin{array}{l} = - \frac {1}{2} \cos x \cos (a - b) - \frac {1}{4} \int [ \sin (3 x + a + b) - \sin (x + a + b) ] d x \\ = - \frac {1}{2} \cos x \cos (a - b) + \frac {1}{1 2} \cos (3 x + a + b) - \frac {1}{4} \cos (x + a + b) + C. \\ \end{array}$$

$$= - 2 \int \frac {d (\cos x)}{3 + \cos^ {2} x} - \int \frac {d (\sin x)}{1 - \sin^ {2} x} =

question:
为了计算下面的积分，可以运用公式

I. $\sin \alpha \sin \beta = \frac{1}{2} [\cos (\alpha -\beta) - \cos (\alpha +\beta)]$   
I $\cos \alpha \cos \beta = \frac{1}{2} [\cos (\alpha +\beta) + \cos (\alpha -\beta)]$   
Ⅲ. $\sin \alpha \cos \beta = \frac{1}{2} [\sin (\alpha -\beta) + \sin (\alpha +\beta)]$

求积分：
[文件内容缺失] 示例题目：计算积分 $\int_{0}^{1} x \, dx$
【2062】 $\int \frac{\sin x\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{2 + \sin 2x}}.$
answer: \frac {1}{2} \arcsin \left(\frac {\sin x - \cos x}{\sqrt {3}}\right) - \frac {1}{2} \ln (\sin x + \cos x + \sqrt {2 + \sin 2 x}) + C.
solution:
解 由于 $2 + \sin 2x = 1 + (\sin x + \cos x)^{2} = 3 - (\sin x - \cos x)^{2}$

于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {\sin x d x}{\sqrt {2 + \sin 2 x}} = \int \frac {\cos x - (\cos x - \sin x)}{\sqrt {1 + (\sin x + \cos x) ^ {2}}} d x = \int \frac {\cos x}{\sqrt {3 - (\sin x - \cos x) ^ {2}}} d x - \ln (\sin x + \cos x + \sqrt {2 + \sin 2 x}) \\ = - \int \frac {\sin x \mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt {2 + \sin 2 x}} + \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\sin x - \cos x)}{\sqrt {3 - (\sin x - \cos x) ^ {2}}} - \ln (\sin x + \cos x + \sqrt {2 + \sin 2 x}). \\ \end{array}
$$

因而，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {\sin x \mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt {2 + \sin 2 x}} = \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\sin x - \cos x)}{\sqrt {3 - (\sin x - \cos x) ^ {2}}} - \frac {1}{2} \ln (\sin x + \cos x + \sqrt {2 + \sin 2 x}) \\ = \frac {1}{2} \arcsin \left(\frac {\sin x - \cos x}{\sqrt {3}}\right) - \frac {1}{2} \ln (\sin x + \cos x + \sqrt {2 + \sin 2 x}) + C. \\ \end{array}
$$

question:
为了计算下面的积分，可以运用恒等式：

$$
\sin (\alpha - \beta) \equiv \sin [ (x + \alpha) - (x + \beta) ], \quad \cos (\alpha - \beta) \equiv \cos [ (x + \alpha) - (x + \beta) ].
$$

求积分：
【2060】 $\int \frac{\sin x\mathrm{d}x}{\cos x\sqrt{1 + \sin^2x}}.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\sin x \mathrm{d}x}{\cos x \sqrt{1 + \sin^2 x}} = \int \frac{-\mathrm{d}(\cos x)}{\cos x \sqrt{2 - \cos^2 x}} = -\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\cos x)}{\cos^2 x \sqrt{2 \sec^2 x - 1}} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\sec x)}{\sqrt{2 \sec^2 x - 1}}$

$$ = \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \sqrt {2} \sec x + \sqrt {2 \sec^ {2} x - 1} \right| + C = \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \ln \frac {\sqrt {2} + \sqrt {1 + \sin^ {2} x}}{| \cos x |} + C.$$

question: 【2036】 $\int \frac{\sin^2x\cos^2x}{\sin^8x + \cos^8x}\mathrm{d}x.$
【2084】 $\int \frac{{\mathrm{d}}x}{{\mathrm{e}}^{2x} + {\mathrm{e}}^x - 2}$
solution:
$\int \frac{{\mathrm{d}}x}{{\mathrm{e}}^{2x} + {\mathrm{e}}^x - 2} = \int \frac{{\mathrm{d}}x}{(e^x + 2)(e^x - 1)} = \frac{1}{3}\int \frac{1}{e^x - 1}{\mathrm{d}}x - \frac{1}{3}\int \frac{1}{e^x + 2}{\mathrm{d}}x$

$$\begin{array}{l} = - \frac {1}{3} \int \left(1 - \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{\mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1}\right) \mathrm {d} x - \frac {1}{6} \int \left(1 - \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{\mathrm {e} ^ {x} + 2}\right) \mathrm {d} x = - \frac {x}{3} + \frac {1}{3} \ln | \mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1 | - \frac {x}{6} + \frac {1}{6} \ln (\mathrm {e} ^ {x} + 2) + C \\ = - \frac {x}{2} + \frac {1}{3} \ln | e ^ {x} - 1 | + \frac {1}{6} \ln (e ^ {x} + 2) + C. \\ \end{array}$$

question: 【2083】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{e}^{2x}\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \mathrm{e}^x}.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{e}^{2x}\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} = \int \frac{(\mathrm{e}^{2x} - 1) + 1}{1 + \mathrm{e}^x}\mathrm{d}x = \int (\mathrm{e}^x -1)\mathrm{d}x + \int \frac{1}{1 + \mathrm{e}^x}\mathrm{d}x = \mathrm{e}^x -x + \int \left(1 - \frac{\mathrm{e}^x}{1 + \mathrm{e}^x}\right)\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= e ^ {x} - \ln (1 + e ^ {x}) + C.
$$

question:
形如

的积分在一般情形下可利用代换 $\tan \frac{x}{2} = t$ 化为有理函数的积分.

（1）若等式

$R(-\sin x, \cos x) \equiv -R(\sin x, \cos x)$ 或 $R(\sin x, -\cos x) \equiv -R(\sin x, \cos x)$

成立，则最好利用相应的代换 $\cos x = t$ 或 $\sin x = t$ .
answer: \tan \frac{x}{2} = t, \quad \cos x = t, \quad \sin x = t, \quad \tan x = t
solution: (2) 若等式 $R(-\sin x, -\cos x) \equiv R(\sin x, \cos x)$ 成立，则最好利用代换 $\tan x = t$

question: 【2079】 $\int (x - \sin x)^3\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: \frac {x ^ {4}}{4} + \frac {3 x ^ {2}}{4} + 3 x ^ {2} \cos x - x \left(6 \sin x + \frac {3}{4} \sin 2 x\right) - \left(5 \cos x + \frac {3}{8} \cos 2 x\right) - \frac {1}{3} \cos^ {3} x + C
solution:
解 $\int (x - \sin x)^3\mathrm{d}x = \int (x^3 -3x^2\sin x + 3x\sin^2 x - \sin^3 x)\mathrm{d}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
 = \frac {x ^ {4}}{4} + 3 \int x ^ {2} \mathrm {d} (\cos x) + \frac {3}{2} \int x (1 - \cos 2 x) \mathrm {d} x + \int (1 - \cos^ {2} x) \mathrm {d} (\cos x) \\
 = \frac {x ^ {4}}{4} + 3 x ^ {2} \cos x - 6 \int x \cos x d x + \frac {3}{4} x ^ {2} - \frac {3}{4} \int x d (\sin 2 x) + \cos x - \frac {1}{3} \cos^ {3} x \\
 = \frac {x ^ {4}}{4} + \frac {3 x ^ {2}}{4} + 3 x ^ {2} \cos x - 6 \int x d (\sin x) - \frac {3}{4} x \sin 2 x + \frac {3}{4} \int \sin 2 x d x + \cos x - \frac {1}{3} \cos^ {3} x \\
 = \frac {x ^ {4}}{4} + \frac {3 x ^ {2}}{4} + 3 x ^ {2} \cos x - 6 x \sin x - 6 \cos x - \frac {3}{4} x \sin 2 x + \cos x - \frac {3}{8} \cos 2 x - \frac {1}{3} \cos^ {3} x + C \\
 = \frac {x ^ {4}}{4} + \frac {3 x ^ {2}}{4} + 3 x ^ {2} \cos x - x \left(6 \sin x + \frac {3}{4} \sin 2 x\right) - \left(5 \cos x + \frac {3}{8} \cos 2 x\right) - \frac {1}{3} \cos^ {3} x + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 求定积分：$\int_{0}^{1} \frac{x}{1+x^2} \mathrm{d}x$
solution:
令 u = 1+x^2，则 du = 2xdx。当 x=0 时 u=1，当 x=1 时 u=2。
原式 = \int_{1}^{2} \frac{1}{u} \cdot \frac{1}{2} \mathrm{d}u = \frac{1}{2} [\ln u]_{1}^{2} = \frac{1}{2}(\ln 2 - \ln 1) = \frac{1}{2}\ln 2。

question: 【2087】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{\mathrm{e}^x - 1}}.$
solution: $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{\mathrm{e}^x - 1}} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\mathrm{e}^{\frac{x}{2}}\sqrt{1 - (\mathrm{e}^{-\frac{x}{2}})^2}} = -2\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(\mathrm{e}^{-\frac{x}{2}})}{\sqrt{1 - (\mathrm{e}^{-\frac{x}{2}})^2}}$

question: 【2085】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \mathrm{e}^{\frac{x}{2}} + \mathrm{e}^{\frac{x}{3}} + \mathrm{e}^{\frac{x}{6}}}$
solution:
解设 $\mathrm{e}^{\frac{x}{6}} = t$ ，则 $x = 6\ln t$ ， $\mathrm{dx} = \frac{6}{t}\mathrm{dt}$ .代入得

$$
\begin{array}{l}
\int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{1 + \mathrm {e} ^ {\frac {x}{2}} + \mathrm {e} ^ {\frac {x}{3}} + \mathrm {e} ^ {\frac {x}{6}}} = 6 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} t}{t (1 + t ^ {3} + t ^ {2} + t)} \\
= 6 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} t}{t (t + 1) \left(t ^ {2} + 1\right)} = 6 \int \left[ \frac {1}{t} - \frac {1}{2 (t + 1)} - \frac {t + 1}{2 \left(t ^ {2} + 1\right)} \right] \mathrm {d} t \\
= 6 \ln t - 3 \ln (t + 1) - \frac {3}{2} \ln (1 + t ^ {2}) - 3 \arctan t + C \\
= x - 3 \ln \left[ \left(1 + e ^ {\frac {x}{6}}\right) \sqrt {1 + e ^ {\frac {x}{3}}} \right] - 3 \arctan \left(e ^ {\frac {x}{6}}\right) + C.
\end{array}
$$

question:
【2053】证明：若 $(a - c)^2 + b^2 
eq 0$ ，则

$$
\int \frac {a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x}{a \sin^ {2} x + 2 b \sin x \cos x + c \cos^ {2} x} d x = A \int \frac {d u _ {1}}{k _ {1} u _ {1} ^ {2} + \lambda_ {1}} + B \int \frac {d u _ {2}}{k _ {2} u _ {2} ^ {2} + \lambda_ {2}},
$$

式中 $A, B$ 为待定系数， $\lambda_1, \lambda_2$ 为方程 $\left| \begin{array}{cc} a - \lambda & b \\ b & c - \lambda \end{array} \right| = 0 \quad (\lambda_1 \neq \lambda_2)$

的根，而 $u_{i} = (a - \lambda_{i})\sin x + b\cos x, k_{i} = \frac{1}{a - \lambda_{i}} (i = 1,2).$
solution:
证记

$$
\begin{array}{l}
a ^ {2} \sin^ {2} x + 2 b \sin x \cos x + c \cos^ {2} x = (a - \lambda_ {i}) \sin^ {2} x + 2 b \sin x \cos x + (c - \lambda_ {i}) \cos^ {2} x + \lambda_ {i} \\
