= \frac {1}{a - \lambda_ {i}} \left[ (a - \lambda_ {i}) ^ {2} \sin^ {2} x + 2 b (a - \lambda_ {i}) \sin x \cos x + (c - \lambda_ {i}) (a - \lambda_ {i}) \cos^ {2} x \right] + \lambda_ {i}, \\
\end{array}
$$

其中 $\lambda_{i}(i = 1,2)$ 为方程 $\left| \begin{array}{cc}a - \lambda & b\\ b & c - \lambda \end{array} \right| = 0$ 的根.

由假定 $(a - c)^2 + b^2 \neq 0$，从而，$(a - c)^2 + 4b^2 \neq 0$，因此 $\lambda_1 \neq \lambda_2$。再设 $k_i = \frac{1}{a - \lambda_i} (i = 1, 2)$ 及 $u_i = (a - \lambda_i)$ 。 $\cdot \sin x + b\cos x$。由于 $(a - \lambda_i)(c - \lambda_i) - b^2 = 0$，即 $b^2 = (a - \lambda_i)(c - \lambda_i)$。于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l}
a ^ {2} \sin^ {2} x + 2 b \sin x \cos x + c \cos^ {2} x = k _ {i} \left[ (a - \lambda_ {i}) ^ {2} \sin^ {2} x + 2 b (a - \lambda_ {i}) \sin x \cos x + b ^ {2} \cos^ {2} x \right] + \lambda_ {i} \\
= k _ {i} \left[ (a - \lambda_ {i}) \sin x + b \cos x \right] ^ {2} + \lambda_ {i} = k _ {i} u _ {i} ^ {2} + \lambda_ {i}. \tag {1} \\
\end{array}
$$

其次，设

$$
a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x = A \left[ (a - \lambda_ {1}) \cos x - b \sin x \right] + B \left[ (a - \lambda_ {2}) \cos x - b \sin x \right], \tag {2}
$$

比较等式两端同类项的系数，则有

$$
- b (A + B) = a _ {1}, \quad A (a - \lambda_ {1}) + B (a - \lambda_ {2}) = b _ {1},
$$

$$
A = - \frac {a _ {1} (\lambda_ {1} - \lambda_ {2}) + b b _ {1} + a _ {1} (a - \lambda_ {1})}{b (\lambda_ {1} - \lambda_ {2})}, \quad B = \frac {b b _ {1} + a _ {1} (a - \lambda_ {1}) ^ {*}}{b (\lambda_ {1} - \lambda_ {2})}.
$$

由（1）式及（2）式即得

$$
\begin{array}{l}
\int \frac {a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x}{a ^ {2} \sin^ {2} x + 2 b \sin x \cos x + c \cos^ {2} x} d x \\
= A \int \frac {(a - \lambda_ {1}) \cos x - b \sin x}{k _ {1} [ (a - \lambda_ {1}) \sin x + b \cos x ] ^ {2} + \lambda_ {1}} d x + B \int \frac {(a - \lambda_ {2}) \cos x - b \sin x}{k _ {2} [ (a - \lambda_ {2}) \sin x + b \cos x ] ^ {2} + \lambda_ {2}} d x \\
= A \int \frac {\mathrm {d} u _ {1}}{k _ {1} u _ {1} ^ {2} + \lambda_ {1}} + B \int \frac {\mathrm {d} u _ {2}}{k _ {2} u _ {2} ^ {2} + \lambda_ {2}}. \\
\end{array}
$$

*）按题意， $b \neq 0$。因若 $b = 0$，则 $\lambda_1 = a, \lambda_2 = c$，从而，$k_1$ 无意义。不过，当 $b = 0$ 时，仍能化为所要求的类似形式。事实上，当 $b = 0$ 时，$a \neq c$，我们有

$$
\begin{array}{l}
\int \frac {a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x}{a \sin^ {2} x + 2 b \sin x \cos x + c \cos^ {2} x} d x = \int \frac {a _ {1} \sin x + b _ {1} \cos x}{a \sin^ {2} x + c \cos^ {2} x} d x \\
= a _ {1} \int \frac {\sin x}{a \sin^ {2} x + c \cos^ {2} x} d x + b _ {1} \int \frac {\cos x}{a \sin^ {2} x + c \cos^ {2} x} d x = - a _ {1} \int \frac {d (\cos x)}{(c - a) \cos^ {2} x + a} + b _ {1} \int \frac {d (\sin x)}{(a - c) \sin^ {2} x + c} \\
= A \int \frac {\mathrm {d} u _ {1}}{k _ {1} u _ {1} ^ {2} + \lambda_ {1}} + B \int \frac {\mathrm {d} u _ {2}}{k _ {2} u _ {2} ^ {2} + \lambda_ {2}}, \\
\end{array}
$$

式中 $A = -a_{1}, B = b_{1}, k_{1} = c - a, k_{2} = a - c, u_{1} = \cos x, u_{2} = \sin x, \lambda_{1} = a, \lambda_{2} = c.$

本题也可用下法另证：命 $u_{i} = (a - \lambda_{i})\sin x + b\cos x$，$k_{i} = \frac{1}{a - \lambda_{i}} (i = 1,2)$，代入积分等式.然后两边求导，整理并比较系数，便可知 $\lambda_{i}$ 必为方程 $\left| \begin{array}{cc}a - \lambda & b\\ b & c - \lambda \end{array} \right| = 0$ 的根，相应可求出系数 $A,B$

question: 【2082】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + \mathrm{e}^x)^2}$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + \mathrm{e}^x)^2} = \int \frac{(1 + \mathrm{e}^x) - \mathrm{e}^x}{(1 + \mathrm{e}^x)^2}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} -\int \frac{\mathrm{e}^x\mathrm{d}x}{(1 + \mathrm{e}^x)^2} = \int \left(1 - \frac{\mathrm{e}^x}{1 + \mathrm{e}^x}\right)\mathrm{d}x - \int \frac{\mathrm{d}(1 + \mathrm{e}^x)}{(1 + \mathrm{e}^x)^2}$

$$ = x - \ln (1 + e ^ {x}) + \frac {1}{1 + e ^ {x}} + C.$$

question: 【2090】 $$\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} + \sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^x}}.$$
solution:
解 $$\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} + \sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^x}} = \frac{1}{2}\int \mathrm{e}^{-x}(\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} -\sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^x})\mathrm{d}x$$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= - \frac {1}{2} \int \left(\sqrt {1 + e ^ {x}} - \sqrt {1 - e ^ {x}}\right) d \left(e ^ {- x}\right) \\
= - \frac {e ^ {- x}}{2} \left(\sqrt {1 + e ^ {x}} - \sqrt {1 - e ^ {x}}\right) + \frac {1}{4} \int \left(\frac {1}{\sqrt {1 + e ^ {x}}} + \frac {1}{\sqrt {1 - e ^ {x}}}\right) d x \\
= - \frac {1}{2} e ^ {- x} \left(\sqrt {1 + e ^ {x}} - \sqrt {1 - e ^ {x}}\right) + \frac {1}{4} I _ {1} + \frac {1}{4} I _ {2}. \\
\end{array}
$$

对于 $$I_{1} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^{x}}}$$ 设 $$\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} = t$$ ，则 $$x = \ln (t^2 - 1)$$ ， $$\mathrm{d}x = \frac{2t\mathrm{d}t}{t^2 - 1}$$

于是， $$I_{1} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^{x}}} = 2\int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{t^{2} - 1} = \ln \frac{t - 1}{t + 1} + C = \ln \frac{\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^{x}} - 1}{\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^{x}} + 1} + C_{1}.$$

对于 $$I_{2} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^{x}}}$$ 设 $$\sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^x} = t$$ ，则 $$x = \ln (1 - t^2)$$ ， $$\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{2t\mathrm{d}t}{1 - t^2}$$

于是， $$I_{2} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^{x}}} = -2\int \frac{\mathrm{d}t}{1 - t^{2}} = -\ln \frac{1 + t}{1 - t} +C_{2} = -\ln \frac{1 + \sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^{x}}}{1 - \sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^{x}}} +C_{2}.$$

代入得 $$\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} + \sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^x}} = -\frac{\mathrm{e}^{-x}}{2} (\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} - \sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^x}) + \frac{1}{4}\ln \frac{(\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} - 1)(1 - \sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^x})}{(\sqrt{1 + \mathrm{e}^x} + 1)(1 + \sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^x})} + C.$$

question: [2094] $\int \left(1 - \frac{1}{x}\right)\mathrm{e}^{-x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int \left(1 - \frac{1}{x}\right)\mathrm{e}^{-x}\mathrm{d}x = -\mathrm{e}^{-x} - \mathrm{li}(\mathrm{e}^{-x}) + C.$

question: 【2105】 $\int x\arctan (x + 1)\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
$\int x\arctan (x + 1)\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \arctan (x + 1)\mathrm{d}(x^2) = \frac{1}{2} x^2\arctan (x + 1) - \frac{1}{2}\int \frac{x^2}{x^2 + 2x + 2}\mathrm{d}x$

= \frac{1}{2} x^2\arctan (x + 1) - \frac{1}{2} \int \left(1 - \frac{2x + 2}{x^2 + 2x + 2}\right) dx = \frac{1}{2} x^2\arctan (x + 1) - \frac{x}{2} + \frac{1}{2} \ln (x^2 + 2x + 2) + C

question: 【2102】 $\int \ln^2 (x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int \ln^2 (x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})\mathrm{d}x = x\ln^2 (x + \sqrt{1 + x^2}) - 2\int \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}}\ln (x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})\mathrm{d}x$ $$\begin{array}{l} = x \ln^{2} (x + \sqrt{1 + x^{2}}) - 2 \int \ln (x + \sqrt{1 + x^{2}}) d (\sqrt{1 + x^{2}}) \\ = x \ln^{2} (x + \sqrt{1 + x^{2}}) - 2 \sqrt{1 + x^{2}} \ln (x + \sqrt{1 + x^{2}}) + 2 \int dx \\ = x \ln^{2} (x + \sqrt{1 + x^{2}}) - 2 \sqrt{1 + x^{2}} \ln (x + \sqrt{1 + x^{2}}) + 2x + C. \end{array}$

question: 【2093】 $\int \left(1 - \frac{2}{x}\right)^{2} \mathrm{e}^{x} \mathrm{~d} x.$
solution:
解 $\int \left(1 - \frac{2}{x}\right)^{2} \mathrm{e}^{x} \mathrm{~d} x = \int \left(1 - \frac{4}{x} + \frac{4}{x^{2}}\right) \mathrm{e}^{x} \mathrm{~d} x = \mathrm{e}^{x} - 4 \operatorname{li}(\mathrm{e}^{x}) - 4 \int \mathrm{e}^{x} \mathrm{~d} \left(\frac{1}{x}\right)$

$$
= \mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 4 \operatorname {l i} \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {x}\right) - \frac {4}{x} \mathrm {e} ^ {x} + 4 \int \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{x} \mathrm {d} x = \mathrm {e} ^ {x} \left(1 - \frac {4}{x}\right) + C.
$$

question: 【2096】 $\int \frac{x\mathrm{e}^x}{(x + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{x\mathrm{e}^x}{(x + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}x = -\int x\mathrm{e}^x\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{x + 1}\right) = -x\mathrm{e}^x\frac{1}{x + 1} +\int \mathrm{e}^x\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{x\mathrm{e}^x}{x + 1} +\mathrm{e}^x +C = \frac{\mathrm{e}^x}{x + 1} +C.$

question: 【2080】 $\int \cos^2\sqrt{x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解设 $\sqrt{x} = t$ ，则 $x = t^2, \mathrm{d}x = 2t\mathrm{d}t.$ 于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l}
\int \cos^ {2} \sqrt {x} d x = 2 \int t \cos^ {2} t d t = \int t (1 + \cos 2 t) d t \\
= \frac {t ^ {2}}{2} + \frac {1}{2} \int t d (\sin 2 t) = \frac {t ^ {2}}{2} + \frac {1}{2} t \sin 2 t - \frac {1}{2} \int \sin 2 t d t \\
= \frac {t ^ {2}}{2} + \frac {1}{2} t \sin 2 t + \frac {1}{4} \cos 2 t + C = \frac {x}{2} + \frac {1}{2} \sqrt {x} \sin (2 \sqrt {x}) + \frac {1}{4} \cos (2 \sqrt {x}) + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: [2108] ∫ arcsin(√x) dx.
solution:
∫ arcsin(√x) dx = x arcsin(√x) - 1/2 ∫ (√x / √(1 - x)) dx.
对于积分 ∫ (√x / √(1 - x)) dx，设 √x = t，则 dx = 2t dt，于是：
∫ (√x / √(1 - x)) dx = 2 ∫ (t² / √(1 - t²)) dt
= -2 ∫ √(1 - t²) dt + 2 ∫ (dt / √(1 - t²))
= -t√(1 - t²) - arcsin(t) + 2 arcsin(t) + C₁
= arcsin(√x) - √(x - x²) + C₁.
因此，∫ arcsin(√x) dx = (x - 1/2)arcsin(√x) + 1/2√(x - x²) + C.

question: 【2095】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{e}^{2x}}{x^2 - 3x + 2}\mathrm{d}x.$
【2092】若 $P\left(\frac{1}{x}\right) = a_0 + \frac{a_1}{x} + \dots + \frac{a_n}{x^n}, a_0, a_1, \dots, a_n$ 为常数，则在什么情形下，积分 $\int P\left(\frac{1}{x}\right) \mathrm{e}^x \mathrm{d}x$ 为初等函数？
solution:
解 $\int \frac{a_k}{x^k}\mathrm{e}^x\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{a_k}{k - 1}\cdot \frac{\mathrm{e}^x}{x^{k - 1}} +\frac{a_k}{k - 1}\int \frac{\mathrm{e}^x}{x^{k - 1}}\mathrm{d}x = \dots$

$$
= - \frac {a _ {k}}{k - 1} \cdot \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{x ^ {k - 1}} - \frac {a _ {k}}{(k - 1) (k - 2)} \cdot \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{x ^ {k - 2}} - \dots - \frac {a _ {k}}{(k - 1) !} \cdot \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{x} + \frac {a _ {k}}{(k - 1) !} \int \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{x} d x.
$$

于是， $\int P\left(\frac{1}{x}\right)\mathrm{e}^{x}\mathrm{d}x = \int \left(\sum_{k = 0}^{n}\frac{a_k}{x^k}\right)\mathrm{e}^{x}\mathrm{d}x = \sum_{k = 0}^{n}\int \frac{a_k}{x^k}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= - \sum_ {k = 2} ^ {n} \sum_ {j = 1} ^ {k - 1} \frac {a _ {k}}{(k - 1) (k - 2) \cdots (k - j)} \cdot \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{x ^ {k - j}} + \sum_ {k = 1} ^ {n} \frac {a _ {k}}{(k - 1) !} \int \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{x} \mathrm {d} x + a _ {0} \mathrm {e} ^ {x}.
$$

因而

question: 【2098】 $\int \ln^n x\mathrm{d}x$ （ $n$ 为正整数）。
answer: x \left[ \ln^ {n} x - n \ln^ {n - 1} x + n (n - 1) \ln^ {n - 2} x - \dots + (- 1) ^ {n - 1} n! \ln x + (- 1) ^ {n} n! \right] + C.
solution: 解 $\int \ln^n x\mathrm{d}x = x\ln^n x - n\int \ln^{n - 1}x\mathrm{d}x = x\ln^n x - nx\ln^{n - 1}x + n(n - 1)\int \ln^{n - 2}x\mathrm{d}x = \dots$

question:
【2057】证明： $$\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(a\sin x + b\cos x)^n} = \frac{A\sin x + B\cos x}{(a\sin x + b\cos x)^{n - 1}} +C\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(a\sin x + b\cos x)^{n - 2}},$$  
式中 $A, B, C$ 为待定系数.
solution:
证 $a\sin x + b\cos x = \sqrt{a^2 + b^2}\sin (x + \alpha)$ ，式中 $\sin \alpha = \frac{b}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}}$, $\cos \alpha = \frac{a}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}}.$

于是， $$\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(a\sin x + b\cos x)^n} = (a^2 +b^2)^{-\frac{n}{2}}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin^n(x + \alpha)} = -(a^2 +b^2)^{-\frac{n}{2}}\int \frac{1}{\sin^{n - 2}(x + \alpha)}\mathrm{d}\left[\cot (x + \alpha)\right]$$ $$ = - \left(a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}\right) ^ {- \frac {n}{2}} \frac {\cot (x + \alpha)}{\sin^ {n - 2} (x + \alpha)} - \frac {n - 2}{\left(a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}\right) ^ {\frac {n}{2}}} \int \frac {\cot (x + \alpha) \cos (x + \alpha)}{\sin ^ {n - 1} (x + \alpha)} d x $$ $$ = \frac {\frac {b}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}} \sin x - \frac {a}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}} \cos x}{(a \sin x + b \cos x) ^ {n - 1}} - \frac {n - 2}{(a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {n}{2}}} \int \frac {1 - \sin^ {2} (x + \alpha)}{\sin^ {n} (x + \alpha)} d x.$$ 

设 $I_{n} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(a\sin x + b\cos x)^{n}}$ ，则由上式可得

$$I _ {n} = \frac {\frac {b}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}} \sin x - \frac {a}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}} \cos x}{(a \sin x + b \cos x) ^ {n - 1}} + (2 - n) I _ {n} + \frac {n - 2}{a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}} I _ {n - 2}.$$

整理得 $I_{n} = \frac{\frac{b}{(n - 1)(a^{2} + b^{2})}\sin x - \frac{a}{(n - 1)(a^{2} + b^{2})}\cos x}{(a\sin x + b\cos x)^{n - 1}} +\frac{n - 2}{(n - 1)(a^{2} + b^{2})} I_{n - 2}$.

question: 【2088】 $\int \sqrt{\frac{{e^x - 1}}{{e^x + 1}}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \sqrt{\frac{{e^x - 1}}{{e^x + 1}}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{{e^x - 1}}{{\sqrt {{e^{2x} - 1}}} }\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{{{e^x}\mathrm{d}x}}{{\sqrt {{e^{2x} - 1}}} } - \int \frac{{\mathrm{d}x}}{{\sqrt {{e^{2x} - 1}}} }$

$$
= \int \frac {d \left({e^x} \right)}{\sqrt {{{\left({e^x} \right)}^2} - 1}} + \int \frac {d \left({{e^{-x}}} \right)}{\sqrt {1 - {{{\left({{e^{-x}}} \right)}^2}}} } = \ln \left({e^x + \sqrt {{e^{2x} - 1}}} \right) + \arcsin \left({{e^{-x}}} \right) + C.
$$

question: 【2106】 $\int \sqrt{x}\arctan \sqrt{x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \sqrt{x} \arctan \sqrt{x} \, \mathrm{d}x = \frac{2}{3} \int \arctan \sqrt{x} \, \mathrm{d}\left(x^{\frac{3}{2}}\right) = \frac{2}{3} x^{\frac{3}{2}} \arctan \sqrt{x} - \frac{1}{3} \int \frac{x}{1 + x} \, \mathrm{d}x$

$$
= \frac {2}{3} x ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \arctan \sqrt {x} - \frac {1}{3} \int \left(1 - \frac {1}{1 + x}\right) d x = \frac {2}{3} x \sqrt {x} \arctan \sqrt {x} - \frac {x}{3} + \frac {1}{3} \ln (1 + x) + C.
$$

question: 【2100】 $\int \left(\frac{\ln x}{x}\right)^3\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int \left(\frac{\ln x}{x}\right)^3\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{2}\int \ln^3 x\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{x^2}\right) = -\frac{1}{2x^2}\ln^3 x + \frac{3}{2}\int \frac{\ln^2x}{x^3}\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{2x^2}\ln^3 x - \frac{3}{4}\int \ln^2 x\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{x^2}\right)$\n$$\begin{array}{l} = - \frac {1}{2 x ^ {2}} \ln^ {3} x - \frac {3}{4 x ^ {2}} \ln^ {2} x + \frac {3}{2} \int \frac {\ln x}{x ^ {3}} d x = - \frac {1}{2 x ^ {2}} \ln^ {3} x - \frac {3}{4 x ^ {2}} \ln^ {2} x - \frac {3}{4} \int \ln x d \left(\frac {1}{x ^ {2}}\right) \\ = - \frac {1}{2 x ^ {2}} \ln^ {3} x - \frac {3}{4 x ^ {2}} \ln^ {2} x - \frac {3}{4 x ^ {2}} \ln x + \frac {3}{4} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{x ^ {3}} = - \frac {1}{2 x ^ {2}} \left(\ln^ {3} x + \frac {3}{2} \ln^ {2} x + \frac {3}{2} \ln x + \frac {3}{4}\right) + C. \end{array}$$

question: 【2101】 $\int \ln [(x + a)^{x - a}(x + b)^{x + b}]\frac{{\mathrm{d}}x}{(x + a)(x + b)}.$
solution:
解 $\int \ln [(x + a)^{x + a}(x + b)^{x + b}]\frac{{\mathrm{d}}x}{(x + a)(x + b)} = \int \frac{\ln(x + a)}{x + b}{\mathrm{d}}x + \int \frac{\ln(x + b)}{x + a}{\mathrm{d}}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
 = \int \ln (x + a) d [ \ln (x + b) ] + \int \ln (x + b) d [ \ln (x + a) ] \\
 = \ln (x + a) \ln (x + b) - \int \ln (x + b) d [ \ln (x + a) ] + \int \ln (x + b) d [ \ln (x + a) ] \\
 = \ln (x + a) \ln (x + b) + C. \\
\end{array}
$

question: 【2109】 $\int x\arccos \frac{1}{x}\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: $\frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \operatorname {a r c c o s} \frac {1}{x} - \frac {1}{2} (\operatorname {s g n} x) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1} + C$
solution:
解 $\int x\arccos \frac{1}{x}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \arccos \frac{1}{x}\mathrm{d}(x^2) = \frac{1}{2} x^2\arccos \frac{1}{x} -\frac{1}{2}\int \frac{|x|}{\sqrt{x^2 - 1}}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \operatorname {a r c c o s} \frac {1}{x} - \frac {1}{2} (\operatorname {s g n} x) \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1} + C.
$$

question: 【2104】 $\int \frac{\ln x}{(1 + x^2)^{\frac{3}{2}}} \, \mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int \frac{\ln x}{(1 + x^2)^{\frac{3}{2}}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \ln x\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}}\right) = \frac{x\ln x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}} -\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}} = \frac{x\ln x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}} -\ln (x + \sqrt{1 + x^2}) + C.$

question: 【2114】 $\int x\ln \frac{1 + x}{1 - x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int x\ln \frac{1 + x}{1 - x}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \ln \frac{1 + x}{1 - x}\mathrm{d}(x^2) = \frac{1}{2} x^2\ln \frac{1 + x}{1 - x} -\int \frac{x^2}{1 - x^2}\mathrm{d}x = \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \ln \frac {1 + x}{1 - x} + \int \left(1 - \frac {1}{1 - x ^ {2}}\right) d x = \frac {x ^ {2} - 1}{2} \ln \frac {1 + x}{1 - x} + x + C.$

question: 【2112】 $\int \frac{x\arccos x}{(1 - x^2)^{\frac{3}{2}}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{x\arccos x}{(1 - x^2)^{\frac{3}{2}}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \arccos x\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\right) = \frac{\arccos x}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}} +\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 - x^2} = \frac{\arccos x}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}} +\frac{1}{2}\ln \frac{1 + x}{1 - x} +C.$

question: 【2110】 $\int \arcsin \frac{2\sqrt{x}}{1 + x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \arcsin \frac{2\sqrt{x}}{1 + x}\mathrm{d}x = \int \arcsin \frac{2\sqrt{x}}{1 + x}\mathrm{d}(x + 1) = (x + 1)\arcsin \frac{2\sqrt{x}}{1 + x} -\operatorname {sgn}(1 - x)\int \frac{1}{\sqrt{x}}\mathrm{d}x

$$
= (x + 1) \arcsin \frac {2 \sqrt {x}}{1 + x} - 2 \sqrt {x} \operatorname {s g n} (1 - x) + C,
$$

其中用到了

$$
\left(\arcsin \frac {2 \sqrt {x}}{1 + x}\right) ^ {\prime} = \frac {\frac {1}{(1 + x) ^ {2}} \left[ (1 + x) \frac {1}{\sqrt {x}} - 2 \sqrt {x} \right]}{\sqrt {1 - \frac {4 x}{(1 + x) ^ {2}}}} = \frac {1}{1 + x} \cdot \frac {1 - x}{\sqrt {(1 - x) ^ {2}} \sqrt {x}} = \frac {1}{1 + x} \operatorname {s g n} (1 - x) \frac {1}{\sqrt {x}}.

question: 【2086】 $\int \frac {1 + \mathrm {e} ^ {\frac {x}{2}}}{(1 + \mathrm {e} ^ {\frac {x}{4}}) ^ {2}}\mathrm {d}x.$
solution:
设 $\mathrm {e} ^ {\frac {x}{4}} = t$ ，则 $x = 4\ln t$ ， $\mathrm {d}x = \frac {4}{t}\mathrm {d}t$ ，代入得
$$
\int \frac {1 + e ^ {\frac {x}{2}}}{(1 + e ^ {\frac {x}{4}}) ^ {2}} d x = 4 \int \frac {1 + t ^ {2}}{t (1 + t) ^ {2}} d t = 4 \int \left[ \frac {1}{t} - \frac {2}{(1 + t) ^ {2}} \right] d t = 4 \ln t + \frac {8}{1 + t} + C = x + \frac {8}{1 + e ^ {\frac {x}{4}}} + C.
$$

question: 【2065】推出积分 $I_{n} = \int \left(\frac{\sin\frac{x - a}{2}}{\sin\frac{x + a}{2}}\right)^{n}\mathrm{d}x$ （ $n$ 为正整数）的递推公式.
solution:
解 解法 1：

设 $t = \frac{\sin\frac{x - a}{2}}{\sin\frac{x + a}{2}}$ 则 $x = 2\arctan \left(\frac{1 + t}{1 - t}\tan \frac{a}{2}\right)$ $\mathrm{dx} = \frac{4\tan\frac{a}{2}}{t^2\sec^2\frac{a}{2} + 2t(\tan^2\frac{a}{2} - 1) + \sec^2\frac{a}{2}}\mathrm{dt}.$

由于 $\frac{4t^n\tan\frac{a}{2}}{t^2\sec^2\frac{a}{2} + 2t\left(\tan^2\frac{a}{2} - 1\right) + \sec^2\frac{a}{2}}$

$$
\begin{array}{l} = \frac {4 \tan \frac {a}{2}}{\sec^ {2} \frac {a}{2}} t ^ {n - 2} + \frac {- 4 \tan \frac {a}{2}}{t ^ {2} \sec^ {2} \frac {a}{2} + 2 t \left(\tan^ {2} \frac {a}{2} - 1\right) + \sec^ {2} \frac {a}{2}} \cdot \frac {2 \left(\tan^ {2} \frac {a}{2} - 1\right)}{\sec ^ {2} \frac {a}{2}} t ^ {n - 1} \\ + \frac {- 4 \tan \frac {a}{2}}{t ^ {2} \sec^ {2} \frac {a}{2} + 2 t \left(\tan^ {2} \frac {a}{2} - 1\right) + \sec^ {2} \frac {a}{2}} t ^ {n - 2} \quad (n > 2), \\ \end{array}
$$

两端对 $t$ 积分，即得递推公式 $I_{n} = \frac{2\sin a}{n - 1} t^{n - 1} + 2\cos a I_{n - 1} - I_{n - 2}.$

解法 2：

设 $y = \frac{x + a}{2}$ 则 $\frac{x - a}{2} = y - a$ ，从而，

$$
\begin{array}{l} I _ {n} = 2 \int \left[ \frac {\sin (y - a)}{\sin y} \right] ^ {n} d y = 2 \int \frac {\sin (y - a)}{\sin y} \left[ \frac {\sin (y - a)}{\sin y} \right] ^ {n - 1} d y = 2 \int \frac {\sin y \cos a - \cos y \sin a}{\sin y} \left[ \frac {\sin (y - a)}{\sin y} \right] ^ {n - 1} d y \\ = \cos a I _ {n - 1} - 2 \sin a \int \frac {\cos y}{\sin y} \left[ \frac {\sin (y - a)}{\sin y} \right] ^ {n - 1} d y. \\ \end{array}
$$

再设 $\frac{\sin(y - a)}{\sin y} = t = \frac{\sin\frac{x - a}{2}}{\sin\frac{x + a}{2}}, J_n = 2\int \frac{\cos y}{\sin y} t^n\mathrm{d}y,$

则 $I_{n} = \cos a I_{n - 1} - \sin a J_{n - 1},\quad J_{n - 1} = \frac{\cos a I_{n - 1} - I_{n}}{\sin a}.$ (1)

又 $J_{n} = 2\int \frac{\cos y}{\sin y}\left[\frac{\sin(y - a)}{\sin y}\right]^{n}\mathrm{d}y = -\frac{2}{n}\int \sin^{n}(y - a)\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{\sin^{n}y}\right)$

$$
\begin{array}{l} = - \frac {2}{n} \left[ \frac {\sin (y - a)}{\sin y} \right] ^ {n} + 2 \int \frac {\sin^ {n - 1} (y - a)}{\sin^ {n} y} \cos (y - a) d y = - \frac {2}{n} t ^ {n} + 2 \int t ^ {n - 1} \frac {\cos y \cos a + \sin y \sin a}{\sin y} d y \\ = - \frac {2}{n} t ^ {n} + \cos a J _ {n - 1} + \sin a I _ {n - 1}. \tag {2} \\ \end{array}
$$

由（1）式和（2）式解得

$$
\begin{array}{l} I _ {n} = \cos a I _ {n - 1} - \sin a J _ {n - 1} = \cos a I _ {n - 1} - \sin a \left(- \frac {2}{n - 1} t ^ {n - 1} + \cos a J _ {n - 2} + \sin a I _ {n - 2}\right) \\ = \cos a I _ {n - 1} + \frac {2 \sin a}{n - 1} t ^ {n - 1} - \sin a \cos a \left(\frac {\cos a I _ {n - 2} - I _ {n - 1}}{\sin a}\right) - \sin^ {2} a I _ {n - 2} = 2 \cos a I _ {n - 1} - I _ {n - 2} + \frac {2 \sin a}{n - 1} t ^ {n - 1}. \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【2120】 $\int \mathrm{th}x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int \mathrm{th}x\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{sh}x}{\mathrm{ch}x}\mathrm{d}x = \ln (\mathrm{ch}x) + C.$

question: 【2132】 $\int \sqrt{\frac{x}{1 - x\sqrt{x}}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解设 $\sqrt{1 - x\sqrt{x}} = t$ ，则 $x = (1 - t^2)^{\frac{2}{3}}$ $\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{4}{3} t(1 - t^2)^{-\frac{1}{3}}\mathrm{d}t.$ 代人得
$$
\int \sqrt {\frac {x}{1 - x \sqrt {x}}} d x = - \frac {4}{3} \int d t = - \frac {4}{3} t + C = - \frac {4}{3} \sqrt {1 - x \sqrt {x}} + C (0 <   x <   1).
$$

question: [2131] $\int \frac{x + 2}{x^2\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
设 $x = \sin t$ ，并限制 $-\frac{\pi}{2} < t < \frac{\pi}{2}$ ，则 $\mathrm{dx} = \cos t\mathrm{dt}$ 代入得
$$
\begin{array}{l}
\int \frac{x + 2}{x^2\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\sin t + 2}{\sin^2 t}\mathrm{dt} = \int \frac{\mathrm{dt}}{\sin t} + 2\int \frac{\mathrm{dt}}{\sin^2 t} \\
= \ln | \csc t - \cot t | - 2\cot t + C \\
= -\ln \frac{1 + \sqrt{1 - x^2}}{|x|} - \frac{2\sqrt{1 - x^2}}{x} + C (0 < |x| < 1)
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2136】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x\sqrt{x^4 - 2x^2 - 1}}.$
solution: \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x\sqrt{x^4 - 2x^2 - 1}} = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^3\sqrt{1 - 2x^{-2} - x^{-4}}} = -\frac{1}{2}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(x^{-2} + 1)}{\sqrt{2 - (x^{-2} + 1)^2}} = -\frac{1}{2}\arcsin \left(\frac{x^{-2} + 1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) + C. $$= - \frac {1}{2} \arcsin \left(\frac {x ^ {2} + 1}{x ^ {2} \sqrt {2}}\right) + C _ {1} = \frac {1}{2} \arccos  \left(\frac {x ^ {2} + 1}{x ^ {2} \sqrt {2}}\right) + C.

question: 【2115】 $\int \frac{\ln(x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})}{(1 + x^2)^{\frac{3}{2}}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\ln(x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})}{(1 + x^2)^{\frac{3}{2}}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \ln (x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}}\right) = \frac{x\ln(x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}} -\int \frac{x}{1 + x^2}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= \frac {x \ln (x + \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}})}{\sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}}} - \ln \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}} + C.
$$

question: 【2121】 $\int \coth^2 x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int \coth^2 x\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{ch}^2x}{\mathrm{sh}^2x}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{1 + \mathrm{sh}^2x}{\mathrm{sh}^2x}\mathrm{d}x = x - \coth x + C.$

question: 【2123】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\mathrm{sh}x + 2\mathrm{ch}x}$
solution:
解设 $\mathrm{th}\frac{x}{2} = t$ ，则 $\mathrm{sh}x = \frac{2t}{1 - t^2},\quad \mathrm{ch}x = \frac{1 + t^2}{1 - t^2},x = \ln \frac{1 + t}{1 - t},\quad \mathrm{d}x = \frac{2}{1 - t^2}\mathrm{d}t.$ 代人得

$$
\int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\operatorname {s h } x + 2 \operatorname {c h } x} = \int \frac {\mathrm {d} t}{t ^ {2} + t + 1} = \frac {2}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \frac {2 t + 1}{\sqrt {3}} + C = \frac {2}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \frac {1 + 2 \operatorname {t h } \frac {x}{2}}{\sqrt {3}} + C.
$$

question: 【2119】 $\int \mathrm{sh}x\mathrm{sh}2x\mathrm{sh}3x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \mathrm{sh}x\mathrm{sh}2x\mathrm{sh}3x\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{1}{2} (\mathrm{ch}4x - \mathrm{ch}2x)\mathrm{sh}2x\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \mathrm{ch}4x\mathrm{sh}2x\mathrm{d}x - \frac{1}{2}\int \mathrm{ch}2x\mathrm{sh}2x\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= \frac {1}{4} \int (\operatorname {s h } 6 x - \operatorname {s h } 2 x) \mathrm {d} x - \frac {1}{4} \int \operatorname {s h } 4 x \mathrm {d} x = \frac {1}{24} \operatorname {c h } 6 x - \frac {1}{16} \operatorname {c h } 4 x - \frac {1}{8} \operatorname {c h } 2 x + C.
$$

question: 【2144】 $\int x\sqrt{x^2 + 1}\ln \sqrt{x^2 - 1}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
$解 \int x\sqrt{x^2 + 1}\ln \sqrt{x^2 - 1}\mathrm{d}x = \frac {1}{3}\int \ln \sqrt {x^2 - 1}\mathrm{d}\left [ (x^2 +1)^{\frac {3}{2}} \right ]$ 

$$\begin{aligned} &= \frac {1}{3} (x ^ {2} + 1) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \ln \sqrt {x ^ {2} - 1} - \frac {1}{3} \int (x ^ {2} + 1) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \cdot \frac {x}{x ^ {2} - 1} d x, \end{aligned}$$

对于右端的积分，设 $\sqrt{x^2 + 1} = t$ ，则 $x^{2} + 1 = t^{2}$ ， $x\mathrm{d}x = t\mathrm{d}t.$ 于是，

$$\begin{array}{l} - \frac {1}{3} \int (x ^ {2} + 1) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \frac {x \mathrm {d} x}{x ^ {2} - 1} = - \frac {1}{3} \int \frac {t ^ {4} \mathrm {d} t}{t ^ {2} - 2} = - \frac {1}{3} \int \left(t ^ {2} + 2 + \frac {4}{t ^ {2} - 2}\right) \mathrm {d} t \\= - \frac {1}{9} t ^ {3} - \frac {2}{3} t - \frac {\sqrt {2}}{3} \ln \left| \frac {t - \sqrt {2}}{t + \sqrt {2}} \right| + C = - \frac {x ^ {2} + 7}{9} \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}} - \frac {\sqrt {2}}{3} \ln \frac {\sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}} - \sqrt {2}}{\sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}} + \sqrt {2}} + C. \end{array}$$

最后得到

question: 【2142】 $\int \frac{\arcsin x}{x^2} \cdot \frac{1 + x^2}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}} \, \mathrm{d}x.$
【2148】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sin x\sqrt{1 + \cos x}}.$
solution:
设 $1 + \cos x = t^2$ ，并限制 $t > 0$ ，则 $\sin x = t\sqrt{2 - t^2}$ ， $\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{2}{\sqrt{2 - t^2}}\mathrm{d}t.$ 代入得
$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sin x \sqrt {1 + \cos x}} = - \int \frac {2 \mathrm {d} t}{t ^ {2} (2 - t ^ {2})} = - \int \left(\frac {1}{t ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2 - t ^ {2}}\right) \mathrm {d} t = \frac {1}{t} - \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \frac {\sqrt {2} + t}{\sqrt {2} - t} + C \\ = \frac {1}{\sqrt {1 + \cos x}} - \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \frac {\sqrt {2} + \sqrt {1 + \cos x}}{\sqrt {2} - \sqrt {1 + \cos x}} + C.
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2122】 $\int \sqrt{\mathrm{th}x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \sqrt{\mathrm{th}x}\mathrm{d}x = \int \sqrt{\frac{\mathrm{e}^x - \mathrm{e}^{-x}}{\mathrm{e}^x + \mathrm{e}^{-x}}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{e}^x - \mathrm{e}^{-x}}{\sqrt{\mathrm{e}^{2x} - \mathrm{e}^{-2x}}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{e}^{2x}\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{\mathrm{e}^{4x} - 1}} -\int \frac{\mathrm{e}^{-2x}\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 - \mathrm{e}^{-4x}}}$

$$
= \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {2 x}\right)}{\sqrt {\left(\mathrm {e} ^ {2 x}\right) ^ {2} - 1}} + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {- 2 x}\right)}{\sqrt {1 - \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {- 2 x}\right) ^ {2}}} = \frac {1}{2} \ln \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {2 x} + \sqrt {\mathrm {e} ^ {4 x} - 1}\right) + \frac {1}{2} \arcsin \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {- 2 x}\right) + C.
$$

question: 【2103】 $\int \ln (\sqrt{1 - x} +\sqrt{1 + x})dx.$
answer: x \ln (\sqrt {1 - x} + \sqrt {1 + x}) + \frac {1}{2} \arcsin x - \frac {1}{2} x + C
solution:
解 $\int \ln (\sqrt{1 - x} +\sqrt{1 + x})\mathrm{d}x = x\ln (\sqrt{1 - x} +\sqrt{1 + x}) + \frac{1}{2}\int \frac{1 - \sqrt{1 - x^2}}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x$
$$
= x \ln (\sqrt {1 - x} + \sqrt {1 + x}) + \frac {1}{2} \arcsin x - \frac {1}{2} x + C.
$$

question: 【2089】 $\int \sqrt{\mathrm{e}^{2x} + 4\mathrm{e}^x - 1}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \sqrt{\mathrm{e}^{2x} + 4\mathrm{e}^x - 1}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{e}^{2x} + 4\mathrm{e}^x - 1}{\sqrt{\mathrm{e}^{2x} + 4\mathrm{e}^x - 1}}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \int \frac {2 e ^ {2 x} + 4 e ^ {x}}{2 \sqrt {e ^ {2 x} + 4 e ^ {x} - 1}} d x + 2 \int \frac {e ^ {x} d x}{\sqrt {e ^ {2 x} + 4 e ^ {x} - 1}} - \int \frac {d x}{\sqrt {e ^ {2 x} + 4 e ^ {x} - 1}} \\
= \int \frac {d \left(e ^ {2 x} + 4 e ^ {x} - 1\right)}{2 \sqrt {e ^ {2 x} + 4 e ^ {x} - 1}} + 2 \int \frac {d (e ^ {x} + 2)}{\sqrt {(e ^ {x} + 2) ^ {2} - 5}} + \int \frac {d (e ^ { - x} - 2)}{\sqrt {5 - (e ^ { - x} - 2) ^ {2}}} \\
\end{array}
$$

$$
= \sqrt {e ^ {2 x} + 4 e ^ {x} - 1} + 2 \ln (e ^ {x} + 2 + \sqrt {e ^ {2 x} + 4 e ^ {x} - 1}) - \arcsin \frac {2 e ^ {x} - 1}{\sqrt {5} e ^ {x}} + C.
$$

question: 【2141】 $\int x\ln (4 + x^4)\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
\int x\ln (4 + x^4)\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \ln (4 + x^4)\mathrm{d}(x^2) = \frac{1}{2} x^2\ln (4 + x^4) - 2\int \frac{x^5}{4 + x^4}\mathrm{d}x
$$
= \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \ln (4 + x ^ {4}) - 2 \int \left(x - \frac {4 x}{4 + x ^ {4}}\right) d x = \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \ln (4 + x ^ {4}) - x ^ {2} + 2 \arctan \left(\frac {x ^ {2}}{2}\right) + C.
$$

question: 【2137】 $\int \frac{1 + \sqrt{1 - x^2}}{1 - \sqrt{1 - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{1 + \sqrt{1 - x^2}}{1 - \sqrt{1 - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{(1 + \sqrt{1 - x^2})(1 + \sqrt{1 - x^2})}{(1 - \sqrt{1 - x^2})(1 + \sqrt{1 - x^2})}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \int \frac {2 - x ^ {2} + 2 \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}}{x ^ {2}} d x = - \frac {2}{x} - x - 2 \int \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} d \left(\frac {1}{x}\right) \\
= - \frac {2}{x} - x - \frac {2}{x} \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} - 2 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} = - \frac {2 + x ^ {2}}{x} - \frac {2}{x} \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} - 2 \arcsin x + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2126】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^6(1 + x^2)}.$
solution:
$\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^6(1 + x^2)} = \int \frac{(x^2 + 1) - x^2}{x^6(1 + x^2)}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^6} -\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^4(1 + x^2)} = -\frac{1}{5x^5} -\int \frac{(x^2 + 1) - x^2}{x^4(1 + x^2)}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= - \frac {1}{5 x ^ {5}} - \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{x ^ {4}} + \int \frac {x ^ {2}}{x ^ {4} (1 + x ^ {2})} \mathrm {d} x = - \frac {1}{5 x ^ {5}} + \frac {1}{3 x ^ {3}} + \int \left(\frac {1}{x ^ {2}} - \frac {1}{1 + x ^ {2}}\right) \mathrm {d} x \\
= - \frac {1}{5 x ^ {5}} + \frac {1}{3 x ^ {3}} - \frac {1}{x} - \arctan x + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2139】 $\int \frac{\ln(1 + x + x^2)}{(1 + x)^2}\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: - \frac {\ln (1 + x + x ^ {2})}{1 + x} - \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {(1 + x) ^ {2}}{1 + x + x ^ {2}} + \sqrt {3} \arctan \left(\frac {2 x + 1}{\sqrt {3}}\right) + C
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\ln(1 + x + x^2)}{(1 + x)^2}\mathrm{d}x = -\int \ln (1 + x + x^2)\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{1 + x}\right)$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= - \frac {\ln (1 + x + x ^ {2})}{1 + x} + \int \frac {2 x + 1}{(x + 1) (1 + x + x ^ {2})} d x = - \frac {\ln (1 + x + x ^ {2})}{1 + x} + \int \left(\frac {x + 2}{1 + x + x ^ {2}} - \frac {1}{1 + x}\right) d x \\
= - \frac {\ln (1 + x + x ^ {2})}{1 + x} + \frac {1}{2} \int \left(\frac {2 x + 1}{1 + x + x ^ {2}} + \frac {3}{1 + x + x ^ {2}}\right) d x - \ln | 1 + x | \\
= - \frac {\ln (1 + x + x ^ {2})}{1 + x} + \frac {1}{2} \ln (1 + x + x ^ {2}) + \sqrt {3} \arctan \left(\frac {2 x + 1}{\sqrt {3}}\right) - \ln | 1 + x | + C \\
= - \frac {\ln (1 + x + x ^ {2})}{1 + x} - \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {(1 + x) ^ {2}}{1 + x + x ^ {2}} + \sqrt {3} \arctan \left(\frac {2 x + 1}{\sqrt {3}}\right) + C.
\\\end{array}
$$

question: 【2129】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{x} + \sqrt[3]{x}}.$
solution:
提示 令 $\sqrt[6]{x} = t$

解设 $\sqrt[6]{x} = t$ ，则 $\sqrt{x} = t^3, \sqrt[3]{x} = t^2, \mathrm{d}x = 6t^5\mathrm{d}t.$ 代入得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt {x} + \sqrt [ 3 ]{x}} = 6 \int \frac {t ^ {3} \mathrm {d} t}{t + 1} = 6 \int \left(t ^ {2} - t + 1 - \frac {1}{t + 1}\right) \mathrm {d} t = 2 t ^ {3} - 3 t ^ {2} + 6 t - 6 \ln (1 + t) + C \\ = 2 \sqrt {x} - 3 \sqrt [ 3 ]{x} + 6 \sqrt [ 6 ]{x} - 6 \ln (1 + \sqrt [ 6 ]{x}) + C \quad (x > 0). \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【2154】 $\int \frac{x^3\arccos x}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
\int \frac{x^3\arccos x}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = -\int x^2\arccos x\mathrm{d}(\sqrt{1 - x^2})
$$
\begin{array}{l}
= - x ^ {2} \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} \operatorname {a r c c o s} x + \int \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} \left(2 x \operatorname {a r c c o s} x - \frac {x ^ {2}}{\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}}\right) d x \\
= - x ^ {2} \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} \operatorname {a r c c o s} x - \frac {2}{3} \int \operatorname {a r c c o s} x d [ (1 - x ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} ] - \int x ^ {2} d x \\
= - x ^ {2} \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} \operatorname {a r c c o s} x - \frac {2}{3} (1 - x ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \operatorname {a r c c o s} x - \frac {2}{3} \int (1 - x ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} - \frac {1}{3} x ^ {3} \\
= - x ^ {2} \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} \arccos  x - \frac {2}{3} (1 - x ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \arccos  x - \frac {2}{3} x + \frac {2}{9} x ^ {3} - \frac {1}{3} x ^ {3} + C \\
= - \frac {6 x + x ^ {3}}{9} - \frac {2 + x ^ {2}}{3} \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} \arccos  x + C.
\end{array}
$$

question: [2155] $\int \frac{x^4\arctan x}{1 + x^2}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $$\begin{array}{l} = \frac {1}{3} \int \arctan x d \left(x ^ {3}\right) - \int \arctan x d x + \int \arctan x d (\arctan x) \\ = \frac {1}{3} x ^ {3} \arctan x - \frac {1}{3} \int \frac {x ^ {3} d x}{1 + x ^ {2}} - x \arctan x + \int \frac {x d x}{1 + x ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2} (\arctan x) ^ {2} \\ = \frac {1}{3} x ^ {3} \arctan x - \frac {1}{3} \int \left(x - \frac {x}{1 + x ^ {2}}\right) d x - x \arctan x + \frac {1}{2} \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) + \frac {1}{2} (\arctan x) ^ {2} + C \\ \end{array}$$

question: 【2118】 $\int \mathrm{sh}^3 x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int \mathrm{sh}^3 x\mathrm{d}x = \int \mathrm{sh}^2 x\mathrm{sh}x\mathrm{d}x = \int (\mathrm{ch}^2 x - 1)\mathrm{d}(\mathrm{ch}x) = \frac{1}{3}\mathrm{ch}^3 x - \mathrm{ch}x + C.$

question: [2145] + $\int \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\ln \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\ln \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x}}\mathrm{d}x = -\int \ln \frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x}}\mathrm{d}(\sqrt{1 - x^2})$

$$
= - \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} \ln \frac {x}{\sqrt {1 - x}} + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} (2 - x)}{x (1 - x)} d x.
$$

右端的积分

$$
\begin{array}{l}
\int \frac {\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} (2 - x)}{x (1 - x)} d x = \int \frac {(1 - x ^ {2}) (2 - x)}{x (1 - x) \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} d x = \int \frac {2 + x - x ^ {2}}{x \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} d x \\
= 2 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{x \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} + \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} - \int \frac {x \mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} = - 2 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(\frac {1}{x}\right)}{\sqrt {\left(\frac {1}{x}\right) ^ {2} - 1}} + \arcsin x + \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} \\
= - 2 \ln \left| \frac {1}{x} + \sqrt {\frac {1}{x ^ {2}} - 1} \right| + \arcsin x + \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} + C _ {1} = - 2 \ln \frac {1 + \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}}{x} + \arcsin x + \sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}} + C _ {1}.
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2111】 $\int \frac{\arccos x}{(1 - x^2)^{\frac{3}{2}}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int \frac{\arccos x}{(1 - x^2)^{\frac{3}{2}}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \arccos x\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{x}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\right) = \frac{x\arccos x}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}} +\int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{1 - x^2} = \frac{x\arccos x}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}} -\ln \sqrt{1 - x^2} +C.$

question: [2140] $\int (2x + 3)\arccos (2x - 3)\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: \left(x ^ {2} + 3 x - \frac {55}{8}\right) \arccos (2 x - 3) - \frac {2 x + 21}{4} \sqrt {- x ^ {2} + 3 x - 2} + C
solution:
解 $\int (2x + 3)\arccos (2x - 3)\mathrm{d}x = \int \arccos (2x - 3)\mathrm{d}(x^2 +3x)$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= (x ^ {2} + 3 x) \arccos  (2 x - 3) + \int \frac {x ^ {2} + 3 x}{\sqrt {- x ^ {2} + 3 x - 2}} d x \\
= (x ^ {2} + 3 x) \arccos  (2 x - 3) - \int \sqrt {- x ^ {2} + 3 x - 2} d x - 3 \int \frac {- 2 x + 3}{\sqrt {- x ^ {2} + 3 x - 2}} d x + 7 \int \frac {d x}{\sqrt {- x ^ {2} + 3 x - 2}} \\
= (x ^ {2} + 3 x) \arccos  (2 x - 3) - \int \sqrt {\left(\frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} - \left(x - \frac {3}{2}\right) ^ {2}} d \left(x - \frac {3}{2}\right) - 6 \sqrt {- x ^ {2} + 3 x - 2} \\
+ 7 \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(x - \frac {3}{2}\right)}{\sqrt {\left(\frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} - \left(x - \frac {3}{2}\right) ^ {2}}} \\
= (x ^ {2} + 3 x) \arccos  (2 x - 3) - \frac {2 x - 3}{4} \sqrt {- x ^ {2} + 3 x - 2} - \frac {1}{8} \arcsin (2 x - 3) - 6 \sqrt {- x ^ {2} + 3 x - 2} \\
- 7 \arccos (2 x - 3) + C _ {1} \\
= \left(x ^ {2} + 3 x - \frac {5 5}{8}\right) \arccos  (2 x - 3) - \frac {2 x + 2 1}{4} \sqrt {- x ^ {2} + 3 x - 2} + C \quad (1 <   x <   2). \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2149】 $\int \frac{ax^2 + b}{x^2 + 1}\arctan x\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: a \left[ x \arctan x - \frac {1}{2} \ln \left(1 + x ^ {2}\right) \right] - \frac {a - b}{2} (\arctan x) ^ {2} + C.
solution: 解 $\int \frac{ax^2 + b}{x^2 + 1}\arctan x\mathrm{d}x = \int \left(a - \frac{a - b}{x^2 + 1}\right)\arctan x\mathrm{d}x = ax\arctan x - a\int \frac{x\mathrm{d}x}{1 + x^2} -\frac{a - b}{2} (\arctan x)^2

question: [2147] + $\int \frac{\sin 4x}{\sin^8 x + \cos^8 x} \, \mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\sin^8 x + \cos^8 x = (\sin^4 x + \cos^4 x)^2 - 2\sin^4 x\cos^4 x = \left[(\sin^2 x + \cos^2 x)^2 - 2\sin^2 x\cos^2 x\right]^2 - \frac {1}{8}\sin^4 2x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \left(1 - \frac {1}{2} \sin^ {2} 2 x\right) ^ {2} - \frac {1}{8} \sin^ {4} 2 x = \frac {1}{8} (\sin^ {4} 2 x - 8 \sin^ {2} 2 x + 8) \\
= \frac {1}{8} (\sin^ {2} 2 x - 4 - 2 \sqrt {2}) (\sin^ {2} 2 x - 4 + 2 \sqrt {2}) = \frac {1}{3 2} (\cos 4 x + 7 + 4 \sqrt {2}) (\cos 4 x + 7 - 4 \sqrt {2}). \\
\end{array}
$$

于是， $\int \frac{\sin 4x}{\sin^8 x + \cos^8 x} \mathrm{d}x = 32 \cdot \frac{1}{8\sqrt{2}} \left[ \int \frac{\sin 4x}{\cos 4x + 7 - 4\sqrt{2}} \mathrm{d}x - \int \frac{\sin 4x}{\cos 4x + 7 + 4\sqrt{2}} \mathrm{d}x \right]$

$$
= - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\cos 4 x + 7 - 4 \sqrt {2})}{\cos 4 x + 7 - 4 \sqrt {2}} + \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\cos 4 x + 7 + 4 \sqrt {2})}{\cos 4 x + 7 + 4 \sqrt {2}} = \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \ln \frac {\cos 4 x + 7 + 4 \sqrt {2}}{\cos 4 x + 7 - 4 \sqrt {2}} + C.
$$

question: 【2150】 $\int \frac{ax^2 + b}{x^2 - 1}\ln \left|\frac{x - 1}{x + 1}\right|\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{ax^2 + b}{x^2 - 1}\ln \left|\frac{x - 1}{x + 1}\right|\mathrm{d}x = \int \left(a + \frac{a + b}{x^2 - 1}\right)\ln \left|\frac{x - 1}{x + 1}\right|\mathrm{d}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= a x \ln \left| \frac {x - 1}{x + 1} \right| - a \int \frac {2 x \mathrm {d} x}{x ^ {2} - 1} + \frac {a + b}{2} \int \ln \left| \frac {x - 1}{x + 1} \right| d \left(\ln \left| \frac {x - 1}{x + 1} \right|\right) \\
= a \left(x \ln \left| \frac {x - 1}{x + 1} \right| - \ln | x ^ {2} - 1 |\right) + \frac {a + b}{4} \ln^ {2} \left| \frac {x - 1}{x + 1} \right| + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2163】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{(e^{x + 1} + 1)^2 - (e^{x - 1} + 1)^2}$
answer: - \frac {e ^ {- x}}{4 \operatorname {s h} 1} - \frac {\operatorname {c o t h} 1}{4} [ x - \ln (1 + e ^ {x} \operatorname {c h} 1) ] + C.

question: 【2134】 $\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt[3]{x^2(1 - x)}}.$
solution:
提示 令 $\sqrt[3]{\frac{1 - x}{x}} = t$

解设 $\sqrt[3]{\frac{1 - x}{x}} = t$，则 $x = \frac{1}{t^3 + 1},\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{3t^2}{(t^3 + 1)^2}\mathrm{d}t.$ 代入得

$$
\begin{array}{l}
\int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt [ 3 ]{x ^ {2} (1 - x)}} = - 3 \int \frac {t}{t ^ {3} + 1} \mathrm {d} t = \int \frac {\mathrm {d} t}{t + 1} - \int \frac {t + 1}{t ^ {2} - t + 1} \mathrm {d} t \\
= \ln | t + 1 | - \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {2 t - 1}{t ^ {2} - t + 1} d t - \frac {3}{2} \int \frac {d t}{t ^ {2} - t + 1} = \frac {1}{2} \ln \frac {(t + 1) ^ {2}}{t ^ {2} - t + 1} - \sqrt {3} \arctan \left(\frac {2 t - 1}{\sqrt {3}}\right) + C,
\end{array}
$$

其中 $t = \sqrt[3]{\frac{1 - x}{x}}.$

question: 【2160】 $\int x^{x}(1 + \ln x)\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int x^{x}(1 + \ln x)\mathrm{d}x = \int \mathrm{e}^{x\ln x}(1 + \ln x)\mathrm{d}x = \int \mathrm{e}^{x\ln x}\mathrm{d}(x\ln x) = \mathrm{e}^{x\ln x} + C = x^{x} + C(x > 0).$

question: 【2138】 $\int \frac{(1 + x)\mathrm{d}x}{x + \sqrt{x + x^2}}.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{(1 + x)\mathrm{d}x}{x + \sqrt{x + x^2}} = \int \frac{(1 + x)(x - \sqrt{x + x^2})}{(x + \sqrt{x + x^2})(x - \sqrt{x + x^2})}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \int \frac {x + x ^ {2} - \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}} - x \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}}}{- x} d x = - x - \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} + \int \frac {\sqrt {1 + x}}{\sqrt {x}} d x + \int \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}} d x \\
= - x - \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} + 2 \int \sqrt {1 + (\sqrt {x}) ^ {2}} d (\sqrt {x}) + \int \sqrt {\left(x + \frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2} - \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) ^ {2}} d \left(x + \frac {1}{2}\right) \\
= - x - \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} + \sqrt {x} \sqrt {1 + x} + \ln (\sqrt {x} + \sqrt {1 + x}) + \frac {2 x + 1}{4} \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}} - \frac {1}{8} \ln \left(x + \frac {1}{2} + \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}}\right) + C _ {1} \\
= - x - \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} + \frac {5 + 2 x}{4} \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2} \ln (2 x + 1 + 2 \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}}) - \frac {1}{8} \ln \left(x + \frac {1}{2} + \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}}\right) + C _ {1} \\
\end{array}
$$

$$
= - \frac {1}{2} (x + 1) ^ {2} + \frac {5 + 2 x}{4} \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}} + \frac {3}{8} \ln \left(x + \frac {1}{2} + \sqrt {x + x ^ {2}}\right) + C,
$$

其中设 $x > 0$ ，对于 $x < -1$ ，同样可获得上述结果，但要注意在对数中要加绝对值.

question: 【2113】 $\int x\arctan x\ln (1 + x^2)\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: x - \arctan x + \left(\frac {1 + x ^ {2}}{2} \arctan x - \frac {x}{2}\right) \left[ \ln \left(1 + x ^ {2}\right) - 1 \right] + C
solution:
解 $\int x\arctan x\ln (1 + x^2)\mathrm{d}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
 = \frac {1}{2} \int \arctan x \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) d (x ^ {2}) = \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \arctan x \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) - \frac {1}{2} \int x ^ {2} \left[ \frac {\ln (1 + x ^ {2})}{1 + x ^ {2}} + \frac {2 x \arctan x}{1 + x ^ {2}} \right] d x \\
 = \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \arctan x \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) - \frac {1}{2} \int \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) d x + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\ln (1 + x ^ {2})}{1 + x ^ {2}} d x + \int \frac {x \arctan x}{1 + x ^ {2}} d x - \int x \arctan x d x \\
 = \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \arctan x \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) - \frac {1}{2} x \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {2 x ^ {2} d x}{1 + x ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2} \arctan x \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) - \int \frac {x \arctan x}{1 + x ^ {2}} d x \\
 + \int \frac {x \arctan x}{1 + x ^ {2}} d x - \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \arctan x + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {x ^ {2}}{1 + x ^ {2}} d x \\
 = \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \arctan x \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) - \frac {1}{2} x \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) + x - \arctan x + \frac {1}{2} \arctan x \ln (1 + x ^ {2}) - \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \arctan x + \frac {1}{2} x \\
 - \frac {1}{2} \arctan x + C \\
 = x - \arctan x + \left(\frac {1 + x ^ {2}}{2} \arctan x - \frac {x}{2}\right) \left[ \ln \left(1 + x ^ {2}\right) - 1 \right] + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2167】 $\int x|x|\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int x|x|\mathrm{d}x = (\operatorname {sgn}x)\int x^2\mathrm{d}x = (\operatorname {sgn}x)\frac{x^3}{3} +C = \frac{x^2|x|}{3} +C.$

question: 【2158】 $\int \sqrt{1 - x^2}\arcsin x\mathrm{d}x.$
【2153】+ $\int \frac{\sin 2x\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + \cos^4x}}.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\sin 2x\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + \cos^4x}} = -\int \frac{\mathrm{d}(1 + \cos 2x)}{\sqrt{(1 + \cos 2x)^2 + 4}} = -\ln (1 + \cos 2x + \sqrt{(1 + \cos 2x)^2 + 4}) + C_1$

$$
= - \ln (\cos^ {2} x + \sqrt {1 + \cos^ {4} x}) + C.$$

question: 【2157】 $\int \frac{x\ln(x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})}{(1 - x^2)^2}\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: \frac{\ln(x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})}{2(1 - x^2)} +\frac{1}{4\sqrt{2}}\ln \left|\frac{\sqrt{1 + x^2} - x\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{1 + x^2} + x\sqrt{2}}\right| + C.
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x\ln(x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})}{(1 - x^2)^2}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \ln (x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{1 - x^2}\right)$

$$
= \frac {1}{2 \left(1 - x ^ {2}\right)} \ln \left(x + \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}}\right) - \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\left(1 - x ^ {2}\right) \sqrt {x ^ {2} + 1}}.
$$

对于右端积分设 $x = \tan t$ ，并限制 $-\frac{\pi}{2} < t < \frac{\pi}{2}$ ，则 $\sqrt{1 + x^2} = \sec t$ ， $\mathrm{dx} = \sec^2 t\mathrm{dt}$ 代入得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {d x}{(1 - x ^ {2}) \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}}} = \int \frac {\sec t d t}{1 - \tan^ {2} t} = \int \frac {\cos t d t}{\cos^ {2} t - \sin^ {2} t} = \int \frac {d (\sin t)}{1 - 2 \sin^ {2} t} = \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \frac {1 + \sqrt {2} \sin t}{1 - \sqrt {2} \sin t} \right| + C \\
= \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \ln \left| \frac {\sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}} + x \sqrt {2}}{\sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}} - x \sqrt {2}} \right| + C, \\
\end{array}
$$

于是， $\int \frac{x\ln(x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})}{(1 + x^2)^2}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{\ln(x + \sqrt{1 + x^2})}{2(1 - x^2)} +\frac{1}{4\sqrt{2}}\ln \left|\frac{\sqrt{1 + x^2} - x\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{1 + x^2} + x\sqrt{2}}\right| + C.$

question: 【2165】 $\int \frac{1 + \sin x}{1 + \cos x} \mathrm{e}^x \, \mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{1 + \sin x}{1 + \cos x} \mathrm{e}^x \mathrm{d}x = \int \left( \frac{1 + 2\sin \frac{x}{2}\cos \frac{x}{2}}{2\cos^2 \frac{x}{2}} \right) \mathrm{e}^x \mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{e}^x}{2\cos^2 \frac{x}{2}} \mathrm{d}x + \int \mathrm{e}^x \tan \frac{x}{2} \mathrm{d}x.$

$$= \int e ^ {x} d \left(\tan \frac {x}{2}\right) + \int \tan \frac {x}{2} d \left(e ^ {x}\right) = e ^ {x} \tan \frac {x}{2} - \int \tan \frac {x}{2} d \left(e ^ {x}\right) + \int \tan \frac {x}{2} d \left(e ^ {x}\right) = e ^ {x} \tan \frac {x}{2} + C.$$

question: 【2164】 $\int \sqrt{\mathrm{th}^2x + 1}\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: $\frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \ln \frac {\sqrt {1 + \mathrm {t h } ^ {2} x} + \sqrt {2} \mathrm {t h} x}{\sqrt {1 + \mathrm {t h } ^ {2} x} - \sqrt {2} \mathrm {t h} x} - \ln (\operatorname {t h} x + \sqrt {1 + \operatorname {t h } ^ {2} x}) + C$
solution:
解 $\int \sqrt{\mathrm{th}^2x + 1}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\mathrm{th}^2x + 1}{\sqrt{\mathrm{th}^2x + 1}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \frac{\frac{\mathrm{sh}^2x + \mathrm{ch}^2x}{\mathrm{ch}^2x}\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{\mathrm{th}^2x + 1}}$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= \int \frac {2 \mathrm {c h} ^ {2} x - 1}{\sqrt {1 + \mathrm {t h } ^ {2} x}} \mathrm {d} (\mathrm {t h} x) = 2 \int \frac {\mathrm {c h } ^ {2} x \mathrm {d} (\mathrm {t h} x)}{\sqrt {1 + \mathrm {t h } ^ {2} x}} - \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\mathrm {t h} x)}{\sqrt {1 + \mathrm {t h } ^ {2} x}} \\
= 2 \int \frac {d x}{\sqrt {\operatorname {t h } ^ {2} x + 1}} - \ln (\operatorname {t h} x + \sqrt {1 + \operatorname {t h } ^ {2} x}) = 2 \int \frac {\operatorname {c h} x \mathrm {d} x}{\sqrt {\operatorname {s h } ^ {2} x + \operatorname {c h } ^ {2} x}} - \ln (\operatorname {t h} x + \sqrt {1 + \operatorname {t h } ^ {2} x}) \\
= \sqrt {2} \int \frac {\mathrm {d} (\sqrt {2} \mathrm {s h} x)}{\sqrt {1 + 2 \mathrm {s h } ^ {2} x}} - \ln (\operatorname {t h} x + \sqrt {1 + \operatorname {t h } ^ {2} x}) = \sqrt {2} \ln (\sqrt {2} \mathrm {s h} x + \sqrt {1 + 2 \mathrm {s h } ^ {2} x}) - \ln (\operatorname {t h} x + \sqrt {1 + \operatorname {t h } ^ {2} x}) + C \\
= \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \ln \frac {\sqrt {1 + \mathrm {t h } ^ {2} x} + \sqrt {2} \mathrm {t h} x}{\sqrt {1 + \mathrm {t h } ^ {2} x} - \sqrt {2} \mathrm {t h} x} - \ln (\operatorname {t h} x + \sqrt {1 + \operatorname {t h } ^ {2} x}) + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: [2151] $\int \frac{x\ln x}{(1 + x^2)^2}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x\ln x}{(1 + x^2)^2}\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{2}\int \ln x\mathrm{d}\left(\frac{1}{1 + x^2}\right) = -\frac{\ln x}{2(1 + x^2)} +\frac{1}{2}\int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x(1 + x^2)}$
$$
\begin{array}{l}
= - \frac {\ln x}{2 \left(1 + x ^ {2}\right)} + \frac {1}{2} \int \left(\frac {1}{x} - \frac {x}{1 + x ^ {2}}\right) d x = - \frac {\ln x}{2 \left(1 + x ^ {2}\right)} + \frac {1}{2} \ln x - \frac {1}{4} \ln \left(1 + x ^ {2}\right) + C \\
= - \frac {\ln x}{2 \left(1 + x ^ {2}\right)} + \frac {1}{4} \ln \frac {x ^ {2}}{1 + x ^ {2}} + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2107】 $\int x\arcsin (1 - x)\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int x\arcsin (1 - x)\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int \arcsin (1 - x)\mathrm{d}(x^2)$

$$
= \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} \arcsin (1 - x) + \frac {1}{2} \int \frac {x ^ {2}}{\sqrt {1 - (1 - x) ^ {2}}} d x.
$$

对于积分 $\int \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{1 - (1 - x)^2}}\mathrm{d}x$ ，设 $1 - x = t$ ，则

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int \frac {x ^ {2}}{\sqrt {1 - (1 - x) ^ {2}}} d x = - \int \frac {1 - 2 t + t ^ {2}}{\sqrt {1 - t ^ {2}}} d t = \int \frac {- t ^ {2} + 1}{\sqrt {1 - t ^ {2}}} d t - 2 \int \frac {d t}{\sqrt {1 - t ^ {2}}} + 2 \int \frac {t d t}{\sqrt {1 - t ^ {2}}} \\
= \int \sqrt {1 - t ^ {2}} d t - 2 \arcsin t - 2 \sqrt {1 - t ^ {2}} = \frac {t}{2} \sqrt {1 - t ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2} \arcsin t - 2 \arcsin t - 2 \sqrt {1 - t ^ {2}} + C _ {1} \\
= \frac {- 3 - x}{2} \sqrt {2 x - x ^ {2}} - \frac {3}{2} \arcsin (1 - x) + C _ {1}. \\
\end{array}
$$

于是， $\int x\arcsin (1 - x)\mathrm{d}x = \frac{2x^2 - 3}{4}\arcsin (1 - x) - \frac{3 + x}{4}\sqrt{2x - x^2} +C.

question: 【2162】 $\int \frac{\arctan^{\frac{x}{2}}}{\mathrm{e}^{\frac{x}{2}}(1 + \mathrm{e}^{x})}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\arctan^{\frac{x}{2}}}{\mathrm{e}^{\frac{x}{2}}(1 + \mathrm{e}^{x})}\mathrm{d}x = \int \left(\mathrm{e}^{-\frac{x}{2}} - \frac{\mathrm{e}^{\frac{x}{2}}}{1 + \mathrm{e}^{x}}\right)\arctan^{\frac{x}{2}}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
\begin{array}{l}
= - 2 \int \arctan^{\frac{x}{2}} d \left(e^{-\frac{x}{2}}\right) - 2 \int \arctan^{\frac{x}{2}} d \left(\arctan^{\frac{x}{2}}\right) = - 2 e^{-\frac{x}{2}} \arctan^{\frac{x}{2}} + \int \frac{dx}{1 + e^{x}} - \left(\arctan^{\frac{x}{2}}\right)^{2} \\
= - 2 \mathrm{e}^{-\frac{x}{2}} \arctan^{\frac{x}{2}} + \int \left(1 - \frac{\mathrm{e}^{x}}{1 + \mathrm{e}^{x}}\right) \mathrm{d} x - \left(\arctan^{\frac{x}{2}}\right)^{2} \\
= - 2 \mathrm{e}^{-\frac{x}{2}} \arctan^{\frac{x}{2}} + x - \ln(1 + \mathrm{e}^{x}) - \left(\arctan^{\frac{x}{2}}\right)^{2} + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2176】 求 $\int xf^{\prime \prime}(x)\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int x f^{\prime \prime}(x) \mathrm {d} x = \int x \mathrm {~d} \left[ f^{\prime}(x) \right] = x f^{\prime}(x) - \int f^{\prime}(x) \mathrm {~d} x = x f^{\prime}(x) - f(x) + C.$

question: 【2177】 求 $\int f^{\prime}(2x)\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
$\int f^{\prime}(2x)\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2}\int f^{\prime}(2x)\mathrm{d}(2x) = \frac{1}{2} f(2x) + C.$

\*) 这里暗中分别假定了被积函数 $f^{\prime}, f$ 是连续的.

question: 【2159】 $\int x(1 + x^2)\operatorname{arccot}x\mathrm{d}x.$
answer: \frac {1}{4} (1 + x ^ {2}) ^ {2} \operatorname {a r c c o t} x + \frac {x}{4} + \frac {x ^ {3}}{1 2} + C
solution:
解 $\int x(1 + x^2)\operatorname{arccot}x\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{4}\int \operatorname{arccot}x\mathrm{d}\left[(1 + x^2)^2\right] = \frac{1}{4}(1 + x^2)^2\operatorname{arccot}x + \frac{1}{4}\int (1 + x^2)\mathrm{d}x

$$
= \frac {1}{4} (1 + x ^ {2}) ^ {2} \operatorname {a r c c o t} x + \frac {x}{4} + \frac {x ^ {3}}{1 2} + C.
$$

question: 【2173】 $\int [x]|\sin \pi x|\mathrm{d}x\quad (x\geqslant 0).
solution:
解分别求出在区间 [0,1), [1,2), [2,3), ..., [[x], x] 上满足 $F(0) = 0$ 的原函数 $F(x)$ 的增量如下：

在 [0,1) 上， $\int 0\cdot \sin \pi x\mathrm{d}x = C_1$ ， $F(1) - F(0) = 0$

在 [1,2) 上， $-\int \sin \pi x\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{\pi}\cos \pi x + C_2$ ， $F(2) - F(1) = \frac{2}{\pi};$

在 [2,3) 上， $2\int \sin \pi x\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{2}{\pi}\cos \pi x + C_3,F(3) - F(2) = \frac{2\cdot 2}{\pi};$

在 $[ [x], x ]$ 上， $(-1)^{[x]}[x] \int \sin \pi x \mathrm{d} x = (-1)^{[x]}[x] \left(-\frac{1}{\pi}\right) \cos \pi x + C_{[x] + 1},$

$$
F (x) - F ([ x ]) = \frac {(- 1) ^ {[ x ]} [ x ]}{\pi} (\cos \pi [ x ] - \cos \pi x).
$$

从而，对于 $x \geqslant 0$ ，得到

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int [ x ] | \sin \pi x | d x = F (x) + C \\
= [ F (1) - F (0) ] + [ F (2) - F (1) ] + [ F (3) - F (2) ] + \dots + \frac {(- 1) ^ {[ x ]} [ x ]}{\pi} (\cos \pi [ x ] - \cos \pi x) + C \\
= \frac {2}{\pi} + \frac {2 \cdot 2}{\pi} + \dots + \frac {2 ([ x ] - 1)}{\pi} + \frac {(- 1) ^ {[ x ]} [ x ]}{\pi} (\cos \pi [ x ] - \cos \pi x) + C \\
= \frac {[ x ] ([ x ] - 1)}{\pi} + \frac {(- 1) ^ {[ x ]} [ x ] (- 1) ^ {[ x ]}}{\pi} - \frac {(- 1) ^ {[ x ]} [ x ] \cos \pi x}{\pi} + C \\
= \frac {[ x ]}{\pi} ([ x ] - (- 1) ^ {[ x ]} \cos \pi x) + C. \\
\end{array}
$$

question: 【2161】 $\int \frac{\arcsin x}{e^x} dx.$
answer: x - e ^ {- x} \operatorname {a r c s i n e} ^ {x} - \ln (1 + \sqrt {1 - e ^ {2 x}}) + C \quad (x <   0).
solution:
解 $\int \frac{\arcsin e^x}{e^x} \mathrm{d}x = -\int \arcsin e^x \mathrm{d}(e^{-x}) = -e^{-x} \arcsin e^x + \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 - e^{2x}}}$

$$\begin{array}{l} = - \mathrm {e} ^ {- x} \operatorname {a r c s i n e} ^ {x} - \int \frac {\mathrm {d} \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {- x}\right)}{\sqrt {\left(\mathrm {e} ^ {- x}\right) ^ {2} - 1}} = - \mathrm {e} ^ {- x} \operatorname {a r c s i n e} ^ {x} - \ln \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {- x} + \sqrt {\mathrm {e} ^ {- 2 x} - 1}\right) + C \\ = x - e ^ {- x} \operatorname {a r c s i n e} ^ {x} - \ln (1 + \sqrt {1 - e ^ {2 x}}) + C \quad (x <   0). \\ \end{array}$$

question: 【2166】 $\int |x|\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
提示 注意 $|x| = (\operatorname{sgn} x)x$ .

解 $\int |x|\mathrm{d}x = (\operatorname {sgn}x)\int x\mathrm{d}x = (\operatorname {sgn}x)\frac{1}{2} x^2 +C = \frac{x|x|}{2} +C.$

question: 【2152】 $\int \frac{x\arctan x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $\int \frac{x\arctan x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}}\mathrm{d}x = \int \arctan x\mathrm{d}(\sqrt{1 + x^2}) = \sqrt{1 + x^2}\arctan x - \int \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{1 + x^2}}$

$$
= \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}} \arctan x - \ln (x + \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2}}) + C.
$$

question: 【2184】从积分的定义出发，求 $\int_0^T (v_0 + gt)\mathrm{d}t$ ，其中 $T, v_0, g$ 为常数.
solution:
解 $f(t) = v_{0} + gt$ 在 $[0,T]$ 上为增函数 $(T > 0)$

$$
h = \frac {T}{n}, \quad m _ {i} = v _ {0} + i g h, \quad M _ {i} = v _ {0} + (i + 1) g h \quad (i = 0, 1, 2, \dots , n - 1)
$$

于是， $\underline{S_n} = \sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}(v_0 + igh)h = n v_0 h + gh^2\sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}i = v_0 T + \frac{gT^2}{n^2}\cdot \frac{n(n - 1)}{2} = v_0 T + \frac{gT^2}{2} -\frac{gT^2}{2n},$

$$
\overline {{S _ {n}}} = \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} [ v _ {0} + (i + 1) g h ] h = v _ {0} T + \frac {g T ^ {2}}{2} + \frac {g T ^ {2}}{2 n}.
$$

因为 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\overline{S_n} = \lim_{n\to \infty}\overline{S_n} = v_0T + \frac{gT^2}{2},$

所以， $\int_0^T (v_0 + gt)\mathrm{d}t = v_0T + \frac{gT^2}{2}.$

question: 【2178】设 $f^{\prime}(x^{2}) = \frac{1}{x} (x > 0)$ ，求 $f(x)$
solution:
由 $f^{\prime}(x^{2}) = \frac{1}{x}$ ，得 $f^{\prime}(x) = \frac{1}{\sqrt{x}} (x > 0)$ . 于是，

$$
f (x) = \int f ^ {\prime} (x) d x = \int \frac {d x}{\sqrt {x}} = 2 \sqrt {x} + C.
$$

question: 【2194】证明：不连续函数 $f(x) = \operatorname{sgn}\left(\sin \frac{\pi}{x}\right)$ 在区间 [0,1] 上可积.
solution:
证 首先注意，函数 $f(x) = \operatorname{sgn}\left(\sin \frac{\pi}{x}\right)$ 在 $[0,1]$ 上有界，其不连续点是

$$
0, 1, \frac {1}{2}, \frac {1}{3}, \dots , \frac {1}{n}, \dots
$$

并且， $f(x)$ 在 $[0,1]$ 的任何部分区间上的振幅 $\omega \leqslant 2$

任给 $\epsilon > 0$ . 由于 $f(x)$ 在 $\left[\frac{\epsilon}{5}, 1\right]$ 上只有有限个不连续点，故可积。因此，存在 $\eta > 0$ , 使得对 $\left[\frac{\epsilon}{5}, 1\right]$ 的任何分法，只要 $\max |\Delta x_i'| < \eta$ , 就有 $\sum_{i'} \omega_i' \Delta x_i' < \frac{\epsilon}{5}$ . 显然，若 $[\alpha, \beta] \subset \left[\frac{\epsilon}{5}, 1\right]$ , 则对于 $[\alpha, \beta]$ 的任何分法，只要 $\max |\Delta x_i'| < \eta$ , 也有 $\sum_{i'} \omega_i' \Delta x_i' < \frac{\epsilon}{5}$ .

令 $\delta = \min \left\{\frac{\varepsilon}{5}, \eta\right\}$ . 现设 $0 = x_0 < x_1 < \dots < x_i < x_{i+1} < \dots < x_n = 1$ 是 $[0,1]$ 的满足 $\max |\Delta x_i| < \delta$ 的任一分法，设 $x_{i_0} \leqslant \frac{\varepsilon}{5} < x_{i_0 + 1}$ .

由上述，有 $\sum_{i = i_0 + 1}^{n - 1}\omega_i\Delta x_i <   \frac{\epsilon}{5}.$ 又显然有

故 $\sum_{i=0}^{i_0} \omega_i \Delta x_i \leqslant 2 \sum_{i=0}^{i_0} \Delta x_i < 2 \frac{2\varepsilon}{5} = \frac{4\varepsilon}{5}.$

由此可知 $\lim_{\max |\Delta x_i| \to 0} \sum_{i=0}^{n-1} \omega_i \Delta x_i = 0.$

于是， $f(x)$ 在 [0,1] 可积

question:
【2193】设函数 $f(x)$ 及 \varphi (x) 在 $[a,b]$ 上连续，证明：

$\lim_{\max \left|\Delta x_i\right| \to 0} \sum_{i=0}^{n-1} f(\xi_i) \varphi(\theta_i) \Delta x_i = \int_a^b f(x) \varphi(x) \mathrm{d}x.$

其中 $x_{i}\leqslant \xi_{i}\leqslant x_{i + 1},x_{i}\leqslant \theta_{i}\leqslant x_{i + 1}\quad (i = 0,1,\dots ,n - 1),$ 

且 $\Delta x_{i} = x_{i + 1} - x_{i}\quad (x_{0} = a,x_{n} = b).$
solution:
证 因为 $f(x)$ 及 \varphi (x) 均在 $[a,b]$ 上连续，所以，它们的乘积 $f(x)\varphi (x)$ 也在 $[a,b]$ 上连续.因此，积分
$$
\int_ {a} ^ {b} f (x) \varphi (x) d x = \lim  _ {\max  \left| \Delta x _ {i} \right|\rightarrow 0} \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} f (\xi_ {i}) \varphi (\xi_ {i}) \Delta x _ {i} \tag {1}
$$
存在。由于 $f(x)$ 在 $[a, b]$ 连续，故有界，即存在常数 $M > 0$ , 使 $|f(x)| \leqslant M$ ( $a \leqslant x \leqslant b$ ); 又由于 $\varphi(x)$ 在 $[a, b]$ 连续，故一致连续，因此，任给 $\varepsilon > 0$ , 存在 $\delta > 0$ , 使当 $\max |\Delta x_i| < \delta$ 时，恒有
$$
\left| \varphi \left(\theta_ {i}\right) - \varphi \left(\xi_ {i}\right) \right| <   \frac {\epsilon}{M (b - a)} \quad (i = 0, 1, \dots , n - 1).
$$
从而， $\left|\sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}\left[f(\xi_i)\varphi (\theta_i) - f(\xi_i)\varphi (\xi_i)\right]\Delta x_i\right|\leqslant \sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}\left|f(\xi_i)\right|\bullet \left|\varphi (\theta_i) - \varphi (\xi_i)\right|\bullet \left|\Delta x_i\right|$
$$
<   \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} M \frac {\varepsilon}{M (b - a)} | \Delta x _ {i} | = \varepsilon .
$$
由此可知 $\lim_{\max} \left| \Delta x_i \right| \sum_{i=0}^{n-1} [f(\xi_i) \varphi(\theta_i) - f(\xi_i) \varphi(\xi_i)] \Delta x_i = 0.$ (2)
由 (1) 式和 (2) 式，最后得到 $\int_{a}^{b}f(x)\varphi (x)\mathrm{d}x = \lim_{\max}\left|\Delta x_{i}\right| \to 0\sum_{i = 0} ^ {n - 1}f(\xi_{i})\varphi (\theta_{i})\Delta x_{i}.$

question: 【2187】 $\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 将区间 $[0, \frac{\pi}{2}] n$ 等分，得 $h = \frac{\pi}{2n}$。取 $\xi_i = ih$（$i = 0, 1, \dots, n-1$）。

作和 $S_{n} = \sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}h\sin i h.$

由于 $\sin i h = \frac{1}{2 \sin \frac{h}{2}} \left( \cos \frac{2i - 1}{2} h - \cos \frac{2i + 1}{2} h \right)$ ,

所以， $S_{n} = \frac{h}{2\sin\frac{h}{2}}\sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}\left(\cos \frac{2i - 1}{2} h - \cos \frac{2i + 1}{2} h\right) = \frac{h}{2\sin\frac{h}{2}}\left(\cos \frac{h}{2} -\cos \frac{2n - 1}{2} h\right).$

最后得到 $\lim_{n\to \infty}S_n = \lim_{n\to \infty}\frac{\frac{h}{2}}{\sin\frac{h}{2}}\left(\cos \frac{\pi}{4n} -\cos \frac{2n - 1}{4n}\pi\right) = 1,$

即 $\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin x\mathrm{d}x = 1.$

question: 【2192】计算泊松积分 $\int_{0}^{\infty}\ln (1 - 2\alpha \cos x + \alpha^{2})\mathrm{d}x$ 考虑两种情形：（2） $|\alpha | > 1$
solution: 解 另一方面，我们可以证明 $t^{2n} - 1 = (t^2 - 1) \prod_{i=1}^{n-1} \left(1 - 2t \cos \frac{i\pi}{n} + t^2\right)$ . 事实上，方程 $t^{2n} - 1 = 0$ 共有 $2n$ 个根，记作 1, \varepsilon_ {1}, \varepsilon_ {2}, \dots , \varepsilon_ {n - 1}, \varepsilon_ {n} = - 1, \bar {\varepsilon} _ {1}, \bar {\varepsilon} _ {2}, \dots , \bar {\varepsilon} _ {n - 1}, 其中 \varepsilon_{i} = \cos \frac{i\pi}{n} + i \sin \frac{i\pi}{n} 及 \overline{\varepsilon}_i = \cos \frac{i\pi}{n} - i \sin \frac{i\pi}{n} \quad (i^2 = -1). 于是， $t^{2n} - 1 = (t + 1)(t - 1)\prod_{i = 1}^{n - 1}(t - \varepsilon_i)(t - \bar{\varepsilon}_i)$ $$ = (t ^ {2} - 1) \prod_ {i = 1} ^ {n - 1} \left(t - \cos \frac {i \pi}{n} - i \sin \frac {i \pi}{n}\right) \left(t - \cos \frac {i \pi}{n} + i \sin \frac {i \pi}{n}\right) = (t ^ {2} - 1) \prod_ {i = 1} ^ {n - 1} \left(1 - 2 t \cos \frac {i \pi}{n} + t ^ {2}\right).$$ 当 $t = \alpha$ 时，利用上式就可把 $S_{n}$ 表成下面的形式 $$ S _ {n} = \frac {\pi}{n} \ln \left[ \frac {\alpha + 1}{\alpha - 1} \left(\alpha^ {2 n} - 1\right) \right].$$ (2) 当 $|\alpha| > 1$ 时，把 $S_{n}$ 改写成 $S_{n} = 2\pi \ln |\alpha| + \frac{\pi}{n} \ln \left[\frac{\alpha + 1}{\alpha - 1} \cdot \frac{\alpha^{2n} - 1}{\alpha^{2n}}\right]$ 后，由于 $\lim_{n \to \infty} \frac{\alpha^{2n} - 1}{\alpha^{2n}} = 1$ , 从而， $\lim_{n \to \infty} S_{n} = 2\pi \ln |\alpha|$ , 即 $\int_{0}^{\pi} \ln (1 - 2\alpha \cos x + \alpha^{2}) \mathrm{d}x = 2\pi \ln |\alpha|$ .

question: 【2197】证明：狄利克雷函数 $\chi(x) = \begin{cases} 0, & x \text{为无理数，} \\ 1, & x \text{为有理数} \end{cases}$ 在任意区间上不可积.
answer: 函数 $\chi(x)$ 在 $[a, b]$ 上不可积。
solution:
提示 注意 $\omega_{i} = 1$ 

证 在任意区间 $[a, b]$ 的任何部分区间上均有 $\omega_{i} = 1$ ，所以， $\sum_{i=0}^{n-1} \omega_{i} \Delta x_{i} = b - a$ ，它不趋于零。因此，函数 $\chi(x)$ 在 $[a, b]$ 上不可积。

question: 【2179】+ 设 $f^{\prime}(\sin^{2}x) = \cos^{2}x$ ，求 $f(x)$
solution:
由 $f^{\prime}(\sin^{2}x) = \cos^{2}x = 1 - \sin^{2}x$ 得 $f^{\prime}(x) = 1 - x.$ 于是，

$$
f (x) = \int f ^ {\prime} (x) d x = \int (1 - x) d x = x - \frac {1}{2} x ^ {2} + C \quad (| x | \leqslant 1).
$$

question:
【2198】设函数 $f(x)$ 在 $[a,b]$ 上可积，且

$$
f _ {n} (x) = \sup  f (x) \left(x _ {i} \leqslant x \leqslant x _ {i + 1}\right),
$$

其中 $x_{i} = a + \frac{i}{n} (b - a)(i = 0,1,\dots ,n - 1;n = 1,2,\dots).$

证明： $\lim_{n\to \infty}\int_{a}^{b}f_{n}(x)\mathrm{d}x = \int_{a}^{b}f(x)\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
证明思路 注意 $f_{n}(x)$ 是不超过 $(n + 1)$ 个不连续点的阶梯函数，因此，它在 $[a,b]$ 上可积。于是，有

$$
\left| \int_ {a} ^ {b} f _ {n} (x) d x - \int_ {a} ^ {b} f (x) d x \right| \leqslant \int_ {a} ^ {b} | f _ {n} (x) - f (x) | d x,
$$

从而，命题易获证.

证 $f_{n}(x)$ 是不超过 $n + 1$ 个不连续点的阶梯函数，因此， $f_{n}(x)$ 在 $[a, b]$ 上可积。于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \left| \int_ {a} ^ {b} f _ {n} (x) d x - \int_ {a} ^ {b} f (x) d x \right| \leqslant \int_ {a} ^ {b} | f _ {n} (x) - f (x) | d x \\
= \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} \int_ {x _ {i}} ^ {x _ {i + 1}} | f _ {n} (x) - f (x) | \mathrm {d} x \leqslant \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} \int_ {x _ {i}} ^ {x _ {i + 1}} \omega_ {i} \mathrm {d} x = \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} \omega_ {i} \Delta x _ {i} \rightarrow 0 \quad (\text {当} \max  | \Delta x _ {i} | = \frac {b - a}{n} \rightarrow 0 \text {时}), \\
\end{array}
$$

即 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\int_{a}^{b}f_{n}(x)\mathrm{d}x = \int_{a}^{b}f(x)\mathrm{d}x.$

question: 【2189】 $\int_{a}^{b}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^2}\quad (0 < a < b).$
solution:
提示 将 $[a, b]$ 等分，设分点为 $x_0 = a < x_1 < x_2 < \dots < x_n = b$。并取 $\xi_i = \sqrt{x_i x_{i+1}} (i = 0, 1, 2, \dots ,n-1)$。

解 将区间 $[a, b]n$ 等分，设分点为

$$
x _ {0} = a <   x _ {1} <   x _ {2} <   \dots <   x _ {n} = b.
$$

取 $\xi_{i} = \sqrt{x_{i}x_{i + 1}} (i = 1,2,\dots ,n - 1)$，显然 $\xi_{i}\in [x_{i},x_{i + 1}]$。作和

$$
S _ {n} = \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} \frac {1}{x _ {i} x _ {i + 1}} \left(x _ {i + 1} - x _ {i}\right) = \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} \left(\frac {1}{x _ {i}} - \frac {1}{x _ {i + 1}}\right) = \frac {1}{a} - \frac {1}{b}.
$$

于是， $\lim_{n\to \infty}S_n = \frac{1}{a} -\frac{1}{b}.$

即 $\int_{a}^{b}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^2} = \frac{1}{a} -\frac{1}{b}.$

question: 【2207】 $\int_{D}^{\pi}\sin x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int_{0}^{\pi}\sin x\mathrm{d}x = -\cos x\Bigg|_{0}^{\pi} = 2$ （图 4.3）

question: 【2202】设函数 \varphi (x) 在闭区间 $[A,B]$ 上有定义并连续，函数 $f(x)$ 在 $[a,b]$ 上可积，并且当 $a\leqslant x\leqslant b$ 时 $A\leqslant f(x)\leqslant B.$ 证明：函数 \varphi [f(x)] 在 $[a,b]$ 上可积.
answer: 函数 \varphi [f(x)] 在 $[a,b]$ 上可积
solution:
证 任给 \varepsilon > 0 ，根据函数 \varphi(x) 在 $[A, B]$ 的一致连续性，存在 \eta > 0 ，使得在 $[A, B]$ 中长度小于 \eta 的任一闭区间上，函数 \varphi 的振幅都小于 \frac{\varepsilon}{2(b - a)}$ 。用 \Omega$ 表 \varphi(x) 在 $[A, B]$ 上的振幅。由 $f(x)$ 在 $[a, b]$ 的可积性知，必有 \delta > 0 存在，使对 $[a, b]$ 的任一分法，只要 \max |\Delta x_i| < \delta$ ，就有 \sum_{i=0}^{n-1} \omega_i(f) \Delta x_i < \frac{\eta \varepsilon}{2\Omega}$。（ \omega_i(f)$ 表 $f(x)$ 在 $[x_i, x_{i+1}]$ 上的振幅）。

下证对 $[a, b]$ 的任何分法，只要 \max |\Delta x_i| < \delta$ ，就有

$$ \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} \omega_ {i} (\varphi (f)) \Delta x _ {i} < \varepsilon . $$

事实上，将诸区间 $[x_i, x_{i+1}]$ 分成两组，第一组是满足 \omega_i(f) < \eta 的（其下标以“ $i'" 记之），第二组是满足 \omega_i(f) \geqslant \eta 的（下标以“ $i''" 记之）。于是，

$$ \sum_ {i ^ {\prime}} \omega_ {i ^ {\prime}} (\varphi (f)) \Delta x _ {i ^ {\prime}} + \sum_ {i ^ {\prime}} \omega_ {i ^ {\prime}} (\varphi (f)) \Delta x _ {i ^ {\prime}} < \frac {\epsilon}{2 (b - a)} \sum_ {i ^ {\prime}} \Delta x _ {i ^ {\prime}} + \Omega \sum_ {i ^ {\prime}} \Delta x _ {i ^ {\prime}}, $$

但 $\frac{\eta\epsilon}{2\Omega} >\sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}\omega_i(f)\Delta x_i = \sum_{i'}\omega_{i'}(f)\Delta x_{i'} + \sum_{i'}\omega_{i'}(f)\Delta x_i\geqslant \sum_{i'}\omega_{i'}(f)\Delta x_i\geqslant \eta \sum_{i'}\Delta x_i,$

于是， $\sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}\omega_i(\varphi (f))\Delta x_i < \frac{\epsilon}{2(b - a)} (b - a) + \Omega \frac{\epsilon}{2\Omega} = \varepsilon .$

由此可知， \varphi [f(x)] 在 $[a,b]$ 上可积

question: 【2211】 $\int_0^2 |1 - x|\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: $\int_0^2 |1 - x|\mathrm{d}x = \int_0^1 (1 - x)\mathrm{d}x - \int_1^2 (1 - x)\mathrm{d}x = 1$

question: 【2208】 $\int_{\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}}^{\sqrt{3}} \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + x^2}$ .
solution: 解 $\int_{\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}}^{\sqrt{3}} \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + x^2} = \arctan x \Bigg|_{\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}}^{\sqrt{3}} = \frac{\pi}{6}$ （图 4.4）

question: 【2222】 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\frac{1}{n}\left[\sin \frac{\pi}{n} +\sin \frac{2\pi}{n} +\dots +\sin \frac{(n - 1)}{n}\pi \right].$
solution: $\lim_{n\to \infty}\sum_{i = 1}^{n - 1}\frac{1}{n}\sin \frac{i\pi}{n} = \int_0^1\sin \pi x\mathrm{d}x = -\frac{1}{\pi}\cos \pi x\Bigg|_0^1 = \frac{2}{\pi}$.

question:
【2216】对于下列定积分：
(1) $\int_{-1}^{1}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^2};$
(2) $\int_{0}^{2\pi} \frac{\sec^2 x \, \mathrm{d}x}{2 + \tan^2 x}$ ;
(3) $\int_{-1}^{1}\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}x}\left(\arctan \frac{1}{x}\right)\mathrm{d}x.$

说明为什么运用牛顿一莱布尼茨公式会得到不正确的结果.
answer: 不能运用牛顿一莱布尼茨公式
solution:
解（1）若应用公式得

$$
\int_ {- 1} ^ {1} \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{x ^ {2}} = - \frac {1}{x} \Bigg | _ {- 1} ^ {1} = - 2 <   0.
$$

这是不正确的。事实上，由于函数 $f(x) = \frac{1}{x^2} > 0$ , 所以，当积分存在时，其值必大于零。原因在于该函数在区间 $[-1, 1]$ 上有第二类不连续点 $x = 0$ . 因而，不能运用公式.

question: 【2213】 $\int_0^{2\pi}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \varepsilon\cos x}$ （ $0\leqslant \varepsilon <  1)
solution:
解 令 $\tan \frac{x}{2} = t$ ，并记 $a = \sqrt{\frac{1 - \epsilon}{1 + \epsilon}}$ ，则有

$$
\int \frac {d x}{1 + \varepsilon \cos x} = \frac {2}{(1 + \varepsilon) a} \int \frac {d (a t)}{1 + (a t) ^ {2}} = \frac {2}{\sqrt {1 - \varepsilon^ {2}}} \arctan (a \tan \frac {x}{2}) + C,
$$

故 $\int_{0}^{2\pi}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + \epsilon\cos x} = \frac{2}{\sqrt{1 - \epsilon^2}}\left[\arctan (a\tan \frac{x}{2})\bigg|_{0}^{\pi -0} + \arctan (a\tan \frac{x}{2})\bigg|_{\pi +0}^{2\pi -0}\right]$

question: 【2226】 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\left[\frac{1}{n}\sum_{k = 1}^{n}f\left(a + k\frac{b - a}{n}\right)\right].$
solution: \lim_{n\to \infty}\left[\frac{1}{n}\sum_{k = 1}^{n}f\left(a + k\frac{b - a}{n}\right)\right] = \int_{0}^{1}f[a + (b - a)x]\mathrm{d}x

question: 【2185】 $\int_{-1}^{2}x^{2}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解题思路 由于 $f(x) = x^2$ 在 $[-1,2]$ 上连续，故所给的定积分存在，且它与分法无关，同时也与点 $\xi_i$ 的取法无关。本题将 $[-1,2]$ 等分，得子区间的长 $h = \frac{3}{n}$，并取点 $\xi_i = -1 + ih$ （ $i = 0,1,2,…,n-1$ ），这种和的极限就是所求的定积分。以下各题如无特殊情况，不再说明定积分的存在性，直接对区间分段并取点 $\xi_i$，作和求极限。

解 将区间 $[-1, 2]$ 等分，得 $h = \frac{3}{n}$. 取 $\xi_i = -1 + ih$ $(i = 0, 1, …, n-1)$.

作和 $S_{n} = \sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}(-1 + ih)^{2}h = nh - 2h^{2}\sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}i + h^{3}\sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}i^{2} = 3 + \frac{9 - 9n}{2n^{2}}.$

于是， $\lim_{n\to \infty}S_n = 3.$

由于 $f(x) = x^{2}$ 在 $[-1, 2]$ 上连续，故积分 $\int_{-1}^{2} x^{2} \mathrm{d}x$ 是存在的，且它与分法无关，同时也与点的取法无关。因此，上述和的极限就是所求的积分值，即定积分

$$\int_ {- 1} ^ {2} x ^ {2} \mathrm {d} x = 3.$$

question: 【2223】 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\frac{1^p + 2^p + \cdots + n^p}{n^{p + 1}} (p > 0).$
solution: $\lim_{n\to \infty}\sum_{i = 1}^{n}\left(\frac{i}{n}\right)^{p}\frac{1}{n} = \int_{0}^{1}x^{p}\mathrm{d}x$

question: 【2218】求 $\int_{0}^{100\pi}\sqrt{1 - \cos 2x}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
提示 在每一个区间 $[(k - 1)\pi , k\pi] (k = 1, 2, \dots, 100)$ 上积分，再相加.

解 $\int_{0}^{100\pi}\sqrt{1 - \cos 2x}\mathrm{d}x = \sum_{k = 1}^{100}\sqrt{2}\int_{(k - 1)\pi}^{k\pi}\sqrt{\sin^2x}\mathrm{d}x = \sum_{k = 1}^{100}\sqrt{2}\int_{0}^{\pi}\sqrt{\sin^2x}\mathrm{d}x = 100\sqrt{2}\int_{0}^{\pi}\sin x\mathrm{d}x = 200\sqrt{2}.$

question: 【2232】求：(3) $\frac{{\mathrm{d}}}{{\mathrm{d}x}}\int_{\sin x}^{\cos x}\cos (\pi t^2)\mathrm{d}t.$
solution:
\frac{{\mathrm{d}}}{{\mathrm{d}x}}\int_{\sin x}^{\cos x}\cos (\pi t^2)\mathrm{d}t = \frac{{\mathrm{d}}}{{\mathrm{d}x}}\int_{\sin x}^{0}\cos (\pi t^2)\mathrm{d}t + \frac{{\mathrm{d}}}{{\mathrm{d}x}}\int_{0}^{\cos x}\cos (\pi t^2)\mathrm{d}t

= - \frac {d (\sin x)}{d x} \cdot \frac {d}{d (\sin x)} \int_ {0} ^ {\sin x} \cos (\pi t ^ 2) d t + \frac {d (\cos x)}{d x} \cdot \frac {d}{d (\cos x)} \int_ {0} ^ {\cos x} \cos (\pi t ^ 2) d t
= - \cos x \cos (\pi \sin^ 2 x) - \sin x \cos (\pi \cos^ 2 x)

\cos (\pi \cos^2 x) = \cos (\pi -\pi \sin^2 x) = -\cos (\pi \sin^2 x)

question:
【2182】把所给区间分为 $n$ 个相等的子区间，求下列函数 $f(x)$ 在相应区间上的下积分和 $\underline{S}_n$ 及上积分和 $\overline{S}_n$
(1) $f(x) = x^3$ $(-2\leqslant x\leqslant 3)
【2220】 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\left(\frac{1}{n + 1} +\frac{1}{n + 2} +\dots +\frac{1}{n + n}\right).$
solution: $\lim_{n\to \infty}\sum_{i = 1}^{n}\frac{1}{n + i} = \lim_{n\to \infty}\sum_{i = 1}^{n}\left(\frac{1}{1 + \frac{i}{n}}\cdot \frac{1}{n}\right) = \int_{0}^{1}\frac{1}{1 + x}\mathrm{d}x

question: 【2224】 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\frac{1}{n}\left(\sqrt{1 + \frac{1}{n}} +\sqrt{1 + \frac{2}{n}} +\dots +\sqrt{1 + \frac{n}{n}}\right).
solution: $\lim_{n\to \infty}\sum_{i = 1}^{n}\frac{1}{n}\sqrt{1 + \frac{i}{n}} = \int_{0}^{1}\sqrt{1 + x}\mathrm{d}x$

question: 【2230】 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\left(\frac{2^{\frac{1}{n}}}{n + 1} +\frac{2^{\frac{2}{n}}}{n + \frac{1}{2}} +\dots +\frac{2^{\frac{n}{n}}}{n + \frac{1}{n}}\right).$
solution:
解 由于 $0 < \frac{1}{n} - \frac{1}{n + \frac{1}{k}} = \frac{1}{n(nk + 1)} < \frac{1}{n^2}$ ，故

$$
0 <   \frac {1}{n} \sum_ {k = 1} ^ {n} 2 ^ {\frac {k}{n}} - \sum_ {k = 1} ^ {n} \frac {2 ^ {\frac {k}{n}}}{n + \frac {1}{k}} <   \frac {1}{n ^ {2}} \sum_ {k = 1} ^ {n} 2 ^ {\frac {k}{n}} <   \frac {2}{n} \rightarrow 0 \quad (n \rightarrow \infty).
$$

于是， $\lim_{n\to \infty}\sum_{k = 1}^{n}\left(\frac{1}{n + \frac{1}{k}}\cdot 2^{\frac{k}{n}}\right) = \lim_{n\to \infty}\frac{1}{n}\sum_{k = 1}^{n}2^{\frac{k}{n}} = \int_{0}^{1}2^{x}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{\ln 2}.$

question:
【2216】 对于下列定积分：
(3) $\int_{-1}^{1}\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}x}\left(\arctan \frac{1}{x}\right)\mathrm{d}x.$

说明为什么运用牛顿一莱布尼茨公式会得到不正确的结果.
answer: 原函数 $\arctan \frac{1}{x}$ 在 $x=0$ 为第一类不连续点，不能直接运用公式，积分值必为负。
solution:
解（3）若应用公式得

$$
\int_ {- 1} ^ {1} \frac {\mathrm {d}}{\mathrm {d} x} \left(\arctan \frac {1}{x}\right) \mathrm {d} x = \arctan \frac {1}{x} \Bigg | _ {- 1} ^ {1} = \frac {\pi}{2} > 0.
$$

这是不正确的。因为 $\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}x}\left(\arctan \frac{1}{x}\right) = -\frac{1}{1 + x^2} < 0$ . 所以，积分值必为负。原因在于原函数 $\arctan \frac {1}{x}$ 在 $x = 0$ 为第一类不连续点，故不能直接运用公式。

question: 【2228】 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\sin{\frac{\pi}{n}}\sum_{k = 1}^{n}\frac{1}{2 + \cos{\frac{k\pi}{n}}}$
solution:
解 由于 $\sin \frac{\pi}{n} = \frac{\pi}{n} (1 + \alpha_{n})$ ，式中 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\alpha_n = 0$ 。于是，

$$
\lim  _ {n \rightarrow \infty} \sin \frac {\pi}{n} \sum_ {k = 1} ^ {n} \frac {1}{2 + \cos \frac {k \pi}{n}} = \lim  _ {n \rightarrow \infty} (1 + \alpha_ {n}) \frac {\pi}{n} \sum_ {k = 1} ^ {n} \frac {1}{2 + \cos \frac {k \pi}{n}} = \left(\lim  _ {n \rightarrow 1} \frac {\pi}{n} \sum_ {k = 1} ^ {n} \frac {1}{2 + \cos \frac {k \pi}{n}}\right) \lim  _ {n \rightarrow \infty} (1 + \alpha_ {n})
$$

$$
= \pi \int_ {0} ^ {1} \frac {\mathrm {d} x}{2 + \cos \pi x} = \frac {2}{\sqrt {3}} \arctan \left(\frac {\tan \frac {\pi x}{2}}{\sqrt {3}}\right) \Bigg | _ {0} ^ {1}

question:
[2205] 证明：等式

$$
\int_ {a} ^ {b} f ^ {2} (x) \mathrm {d} x = 0
$$

当且仅当对属于闭区间 $[a,b]$ 内函数 $f(x)$ 连续的一切点有 $f(x) = 0$ 时方成立.
solution:
先证必要性：

采用反证法。设 $f(x)$ 在点 $x_0$ 连续，但 $f(x_0)\neq 0$ ，则存在 $\delta >0,[x_0 - \delta ,x_0 + \delta ]\subset [a,b]$ ，使当 $|x - x_0|\leqslant \delta$ 时

$$
| f (x) | > \frac {| f (x _ {0}) |}{2}.
$$

从而， $\int_{a}^{b}f^{2}(x)\mathrm{d}x\geqslant \int_{x_0 - \delta}^{x_0 + \delta}f^{2}(x)\mathrm{d}x > \frac{f^2(x_0)}{2} 2\delta = \frac{\delta f^2(x_0)}{2} >0.$

这与假设 $\int_{a}^{b}f^{2}(x)\mathrm{d}x = 0$ 矛盾.

再证充分性：

也即要证： $f(x)$ 在 $[a,b]$ 上可积条件下，假设 $f(x)$ 在一切连续点 $\pmb{x_0}$ 上均有 $f(x_0) = 0$ ，则必有

$$
\int_ {a} ^ {b} f ^ {2} (x) \mathrm {d} x = 0.
$$

证明分两个部分。第一，首先要指出当 $f(x)$ 在 $[a, b]$ 上可积时， $f(x)$ 的连续点在 $[a, b]$ 中必定是稠密的。此处所谓“稠密”性是指：对于任意区间 $[\alpha, \beta] \subset [a, b]$ , 总存在一点 $x_0 \in [\alpha, \beta]$ , 使 $f(x)$ 在 $x_0$ 连续。第二，利用假设，并借助于稠密性，可证得充分性。

现在先证第二部分：由 $f(x)$ 在 $[a,b]$ 上的全体连续点 $X$ 的稠密性以及当 $x_0\in X$ 时有 $f(x_0) = 0$ 的假设。即知，对于区间 $[a,b]$ 的任一分法，均可适当地取 $x_{i}\leqslant \xi_{i}\leqslant x_{i + 1}$ ，使 $f(\xi_i) = 0$ 从而积分和 $\sum_{i = 0}^{n - 1}f^2 (\xi_i)\Delta x_i = 0.$ 由此，再注意到 $f^2 (x)$ 在 $[a,b]$ 的可积性，便有

$$
\int_ {a} ^ {b} f ^ {2} (x) \mathrm {d} x = \lim  _ {\max } \left| \Delta x _ {i} \right| \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {n - 1} f ^ {2} (\xi_ {i}) \Delta x _ {i} = 0.
$$

如今再补证第一部分：应当首先指明，若 $f(x)$ 在 $[\alpha, \beta]$ 上可积，则对任给的 $\epsilon > 0$ ，总存在 $[\alpha, \beta]$ 的子区间 $[\alpha', \beta']$ ，使得振幅

$$
\varepsilon \left(\alpha^ {\prime}, \beta^ {\prime}\right) <   \varepsilon .
$$

事实上，如果上述结论不成立，则存在一个 $\varepsilon_0 > 0$ ，使对于 $[\alpha, \beta]$ 的任意分法，有

$$
\sum_ {i} \omega_ {i} \Delta x _ {i} \geqslant \varepsilon_ {0} \sum_ {i} \Delta x = \varepsilon_ {0} (\beta - \alpha) > 0,
$$

这与 $f(x)$ 在 $[\alpha, \beta]$ 可积矛盾，因此，结论为真。

今取 $[\alpha, \beta]$ 为 $[a_1, b_1]$ . 由于 $f(x)$ 在 $[a_1 + \frac{b_1 - a_1}{4}, b_1 - \frac{b_1 - a_1}{4}]$ 上可积，故存在区间 $[a_2, b_2] \subset [a_1 + \frac{b_1 - a_1}{4}, b_1 - \frac{b_1 - a_1}{4}]\subset [a_1, b_1]$ ，使 $\omega[a_2, b_2] < \frac{1}{2}$ . 同样，存在区间

$$
\left[ a _ {3}, b _ {3} \right] \subset \left[ a _ {2} + \frac {b _ {2} - a _ {2}}{4}, b _ {2} - \frac {b _ {2} - a _ {2}}{4} \right] \subset \left[ a _ {2}, b _ {2} \right],
$$

使 $\omega [a_3,b_3] < \frac{1}{3}$ 这样继续下去，得一串闭区间 $[a_n,b_n](n = 1,2,3,\dots)$ ，满足

$$
\alpha = a _ {1} <   a _ {2} <   \dots <   a _ {n} <   \dots <   b _ {n} <   \dots <   b _ {2} <   b _ {1} = \beta ,
$$

并且 $b_{n} - a_{n}\leqslant \frac{\beta - \alpha}{2^{n - 1}}\rightarrow 0,\quad \omega [a_{n},b_{n}] <   \frac{1}{n}\quad (n = 1,2,3,\dots).$

由区间套定理，诸 $[a_n, b_n]$ 具有唯一的公共点 $c$ 。显然 $a_n < c < b_n (n = 1, 2, 3, \dots)$ ，下证 $f(x)$ 在点 $c$ 连续。

任给 $\varepsilon > 0$ ，取正整数 $n_0$ 使 $n_0 > \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$ .再取 $\delta > 0$ 使 $(c - \delta, c + \delta) \subset [a_{n_0}, b_{n_0}]$ .于是，当 $|x - c| < \delta$ 时，必有

$$
\left| f (x) - f (c) \right| \leqslant \omega \left[ a _ {n _ {0}}, b _ {n _ {0}} \right] <   \frac {1} {n _ {0}} <   \varepsilon .
$$

故 $f(x)$ 在点 $x = c$ 连续。到此，充分性证毕

question: 【2212】 $\int_{-1}^{1}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^2 - 2x\cos\alpha + 1}\quad (0 < \alpha < \pi).$
solution:
解 $\int_{-1}^{1}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^2 - 2x\cos\alpha + 1} = \frac{1}{\sin\alpha}\arctan \frac{x - \cos\alpha}{\sin\alpha}\Bigg|_{-1}^{1}$

$$
= \frac {1}{\sin \alpha} \left[ \arctan \left(\tan \frac {\alpha}{2}\right) + \arctan \left(\cot \frac {\alpha}{2}\right) \right]
$$

(\
= \frac{1}{\sin \alpha} \left\{\frac{\alpha}{2} + \arctan \left[\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{2} - \frac{\alpha}{2}\right)\right]\right\} = \frac{\pi}{2 \sin \alpha}
)\

注 以下图形从略.

question: 【2240】 $\int_0^\pi x\sin x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 解 $\int_{0}^{\pi} x \sin x \mathrm{~d} x = -x \cos x \left|_{0}^{\pi} + \int_{0}^{\pi} \cos x \mathrm{~d} x = \pi$

question:
【2326】证明等式：
(1) $\lim_{n\to \infty}\int_{0}^{1}\frac{x^n}{1 + x}\mathrm{d}x = 0;$
solution: 证 (1) $\lim_{n\to \infty}\int_{0}^{1}\frac{x^n}{1 + x}\mathrm{d}x = \lim_{n\to \infty}\frac{1}{1 + \xi_n}\int_{0}^{1}x^n\mathrm{d}x = \lim_{n\to \infty}\left(\frac{1}{1 + \xi_n}\cdot \frac{1}{n + 1}\right) = 0;$

question: 【2335】 $\int_0^1\ln x\mathrm{d}x.$
solution: 由于 $\lim_{\varepsilon \to +0} \int_{\varepsilon}^{1} \ln x \, \mathrm{d}x = \lim_{\varepsilon \to +0} (\varepsilon - \varepsilon \ln \varepsilon - 1) = -1$，所以， $\int_{0}^{1} \ln x \, \mathrm{d}x = -1$

question: 【2336】 $\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + x^2}.$
solution: 解 由于 $\lim_{a\to -\infty}\int_{a}^{0}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + x^2} +\lim_{b\to +\infty}\int_{b}^{b}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + x^2} = \pi$，所以，$\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + x^2} = \pi .$

question: 【2320】求初速度为 $v_{0}$ 之自由落体的速度之平均值.
solution:
解 自由落体的速度为 $v = v_{0} + gt$ ，从 $t = 0$ 到 $t = T$ 时间内的速度的平均值为

$$
M [ v ] = \frac {1}{T} \int_ {0} ^ {T} (v _ {0} + g t) d t = \frac {1}{2} g T + v _ {0} = \frac {1}{2} (v _ {0} + v _ {T}).
$$

物理意义：平均速度等于初速与末速之和的一半.

question:
【2318】求下列函数在所给区间内的平均值：
(4) $f(x) = \sin x \sin (x + \varphi)$ 在 $[0, 2\pi]$ 上.
solution: (4) $M[f] = \frac{1}{2\pi} \int_{0}^{2\pi} \sin x \sin (x + \varphi) \, \mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{2} \cos \varphi.

question:
【2318】求下列函数在所给区间内的平均值：
(1) $f(x) = x^{2}$ 在 $[0, 1]$ 上；
solution: 解（1） $M[f] = \int_0^1 x^2\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{3};$

question:
【2318】求下列函数在所给区间内的平均值：
(2) $f(x) = \sqrt{x}$ 在 [0,100] 上；

【2322】命 $\int_0^x f(t)\mathrm{d}t = xf(\theta x)$ ，求 $\theta$ ，设：
（3）$f(t) = \mathbf{e}^{t}$ $\lim_{r\to 0}\theta$ 及 $\lim_{r\to +\infty}\theta$ 等于什么？
solution:
解 (3) $\int_{0}^{x} f(t) \mathrm{d}t = \int_{0}^{x} \mathrm{e}^{t} \mathrm{~d}t = \mathrm{e}^{x} \Bigg|_{0}^{x} = \mathrm{e}^{x} - 1$ ，从而， $\mathrm{e}^{x} - 1 = x \mathrm{e}^{\beta x}$ ，于是， $\theta = \frac{1}{x} \ln \frac{\mathrm{e}^{x} - 1}{x}$ . 由于 $\lim_{x \to 0} \frac{\mathrm{e}^{x} - 1}{x} = 1$ ，故当 $x \to 0$ 时， $\frac{1}{x} \ln \frac{\mathrm{e}^{x} - 1}{x}$ 是 $\frac{0}{0}$ 型不定式。因此，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \lim  _ {x \rightarrow 0} \theta = \lim  _ {x \rightarrow 0} \frac {1}{x} \ln \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1}{x} = \lim  _ {x \rightarrow 0} \left[ \frac {x}{\mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1} \cdot \frac {x \mathrm {e} ^ {x} - (\mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1)}{x ^ {2}} \right] = \lim  _ {x \rightarrow 0} \frac {x \mathrm {e} ^ {x} - \mathrm {e} ^ {x} + 1}{x (\mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1)} = \lim  _ {x \rightarrow 0} \frac {x \mathrm {e} ^ {x}}{\mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1 + x \mathrm {e} ^ {x}} \\ = \lim  _ {x \rightarrow 0} \frac {1}{\mathrm {e} ^ {- x} \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1}{x} + 1} = \frac {1}{2}, \\ \end{array}
$$

$$
\lim  _ {x \rightarrow + \infty} \theta = \lim  _ {x \rightarrow + \infty} \frac {1}{x} \ln \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1}{x} = \lim  _ {x \rightarrow + \infty} \frac {x \mathrm {e} ^ {x} - \mathrm {e} ^ {x} + 1}{x \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {x} - 1\right)} = \lim  _ {x \rightarrow + \infty} \frac {1 - \frac {1}{x} + \frac {1}{x \mathrm {e} ^ {x}}}{1 - \frac {1}{\mathrm {e} ^ {x}}} = 1.
$$

于是， $\lim_{x\to 0}\theta = \frac{1}{2}$ 及 $\lim_{x\to +\infty}\theta = 1.$

question: 【2334】 $\int_{a}^{+\infty}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^2}\quad (a > 0).$
solution: 由于 $\lim_{b\to +\infty}\int_{a}^{b}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^2} = \lim_{b\to +\infty}\left(\frac{1}{a} -\frac{1}{b}\right) = \frac{1}{a}$，所以，$\int_{a}^{+\infty}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{x^2} = \frac{1}{a}$ .

question:
【2326】证明等式：
（2）$\lim_{n\to \infty}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^{n}x\mathrm{d}x = 0.$
solution:
证（2）任意给定 $\varepsilon > 0$，且设 $\varepsilon < \frac{\pi}{2}$，则

$$
0 \leqslant \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \sin^ {n} x d x \leqslant \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2} - \epsilon} \sin^ {n} x d x + \epsilon \leqslant \epsilon + \left(\frac {\pi}{2} - \epsilon\right) \sin^ {n} \left(\frac {\pi}{2} - \epsilon\right).
$$

当 $n \to \infty$ 时，上述不等式的第二项趋于零，于是，

$$
\lim  _ {n \rightarrow \infty} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \sin^ {n} x d x = 0.
$$

question:
【2316】确定下列定积分的符号：
(1) $\int_{0}^{2\pi} x \sin x \, \mathrm{d}x;$

提示 (2) 及 (3) 使用第一中值定理.
solution: （1） $\int_0^{2\pi}x\sin x\mathrm{d}x = \int_0^\pi x\sin x\mathrm{d}x + \int_\pi^{2\pi}x\sin x\mathrm{d}x = \int_0^\pi x\sin x\mathrm{d}x - \int_0^\pi (t + \pi)\sin t\mathrm{d}t = -\pi \int_0^\pi \sin x\mathrm{d}x < 0.$

question: 【2323】 $\int_0^{2x}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + 0.5\cos x}.$
solution:
解 由于 $\frac{1}{1 + 0.5} \leqslant \frac{1}{1 + 0.5\cos x} \leqslant \frac{1}{1 - 0.5},$

即 $\frac{2}{3} \leqslant \frac{1}{1 + 0.5\cos x} \leqslant 2.$

于是， $\frac{4\pi}{3} \leqslant \int_{0}^{2x} \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + 0.5\cos x} \leqslant 4\pi$

即 $\int_{0}^{2x}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{1 + 0.5\cos x} = \frac{8\pi}{3}\pm \frac{4\pi}{3}\theta (|\theta |\leqslant 1).$

question: 【2325】 $\int_0^{100}\frac{\mathrm{e}^{-x}}{x + 100}\mathrm{d}x.$
solution:
解 $I = \int_{0}^{50}\frac{\mathrm{e}^{-x}}{x + 100}\mathrm{d}x + \int_{50}^{100}\frac{\mathrm{e}^{-x}}{x + 100}\mathrm{d}x = \frac{1}{100 + \xi_1}\int_{0}^{50}\mathrm{e}^{-x}\mathrm{d}x + \frac{1}{100 + \xi_2}\int_{50}^{100}\mathrm{e}^{-x}\mathrm{d}x$

$$
= \frac {1 - e ^ {- 5 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {1}} + \frac {e ^ {- 5 0} - e ^ {- 1 0 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {2}},
$$

其中 $0 \leqslant \xi_{1} \leqslant 50, 50 \leqslant \xi_{2} \leqslant 100$ . 显然

$$
\frac {1 - e ^ {- 5 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {1}} + \frac {e ^ {- 5 0} - e ^ {- 1 0 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {2}} \leqslant \frac {1 - e ^ {- 5 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {1}} + \frac {e ^ {- 5 0} - e ^ {- 1 0 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {1}} = \frac {1 - e ^ {- 1 0 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {1}} <   \frac {1}{1 0 0},
$$

$$
\frac {1 - e ^ {- 5 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {1}} + \frac {e ^ {- 5 0} - e ^ {- 1 0 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {2}} > \frac {1 - e ^ {- 5 0}}{1 0 0 + \xi_ {1}} \geqslant \frac {1 - e ^ {- 5 0}}{1 5 0} > \frac {1}{2 0 0},
$$

故 $\frac{1}{200} < I < \frac{1}{100}$ ，即 $I = 0.01 - 0.005\theta, 0 < \theta < 1$ 。此外，按中值定理，可写

$$
I = \int_ {0} ^ {1 0 0} \frac {\mathrm {e} ^ {- x}}{x + 1 0 0} \mathrm {d} x = \frac {1}{\xi + 1 0 0} \int_ {0} ^ {1 0 0} \mathrm {e} ^ {- x} \mathrm {d} x = \frac {1}{\xi + 1 0 0} \left(1 - \frac {1}{\mathrm {e} ^ {1 0 0}}\right),
$$

其中 $0 \leqslant \xi \leqslant 100$ ，如果改写 $I$ 为 $I = 0.01 - 0.005\theta$ ，则有 $\theta = f(\xi) = \frac{2}{100 + \xi}\left(\xi + \frac{100}{e^{100}}\right)$ .

易见导数 $f^{\prime}(\xi) = \frac{200(1 - e^{-100})}{(100 + \xi)^{2}} > 0,$

$f(\xi)$ 单调上升，故在 $[0,100]$ 上有 $f(0) \leqslant f(\xi) \leqslant f(100)$ ，也即有 $\frac{2}{\mathrm{e}^{100}} \leqslant \theta \leqslant 1 + \frac{1}{\mathrm{e}^{100}}$

根据前面的估计 $0 < \theta < 1$ ，综合起来，便有 $\frac{2}{\mathrm{e}^{100}} \leqslant \theta < 1.$
