故积分也发散。由此可知，积分 $\iint_{x^2 +y^2\leqslant 1}\frac{\varphi(x,y)}{(1 - x^2 - y^2)^p}\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y$ 当 $p <   1$ 时收敛；当 $p\geqslant 1$ 时发散

question: 【4188】 $\int_0^a\mathrm{d}x\int_0^x\frac{\mathrm{d}y}{\sqrt{(a - x)(x - y)}} (a > 0).$
solution:
解 $\int_{0}^{a}\mathrm{d}x\int_{0}^{x}\frac{\mathrm{d}y}{\sqrt{(a - x)(x - y)}} = \int_{0}^{a}\frac{2\sqrt{x}}{\sqrt{a - x}}\mathrm{d}x.$

作变量代换 $x = au$ ，则

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {u} \frac {2 \sqrt {x}}{\sqrt {a - x}} d x = 2 a \int_ {0} ^ {1} u ^ {\frac {1}{2}} (1 - u) ^ {- \frac {1}{2}} d u = 2 a B \left(\frac {3}{2}, \frac {1}{2}\right) = 2 a \frac {\Gamma \left(\frac {3}{2}\right) \Gamma \left(\frac {1}{2}\right)}{\Gamma (2)} = 2 a \cdot \frac {1}{2} \left[ \Gamma \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) \right] ^ {2} = \pi a.
$$

question:
【4190】 $\iint_{x^2 - y^2 \leqslant r} \frac{\mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}.$

提示 由关于 $Ox$ 轴的对称性与被积函数的非负性，采用极坐标即可获解.
solution:
解 由关于 $(\mathcal{X})$ 轴的对称性与被积函数的非负性，采用极坐标，有

$$
\iint_ {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} \leqslant r} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y}{\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}}} = 2 \iint_ {r ^ {2} + y ^ {2} \leqslant r} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y}{\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}}} = 2 \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \mathrm {d} \theta \int_ {0} ^ {\cos \theta} \mathrm {d} r = 2 \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \cos \theta \mathrm {d} \theta = 2.
$$

question:
【4166】证明：若连续函数 $f(x, y)$ 不为负及 $S_{n}(n = 1, 2, \dots)$ 为有界闭区域，并且组成区域 $S$ 的任意一个竭尽递增序列。则

$$
\iint_ {S} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y = \lim  _ {n \rightarrow + \infty} \iint_ {S _ {n}} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y,
$$

这里左端与右端同时有意义或同时无意义
answer: \iint_ {S} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y = \lim  _ {n \rightarrow + \infty} \iint_ {S _ {n}} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y
solution:
证取定一有界闭区域的序列 $S_{n}^{\prime}(n = 1,2,\dots),S_{1}^{\prime}\subset S_{2}^{\prime}\subset \dots \subset S_{n}^{\prime}\subset \dots \subset S$，且 $\bigcup_{n = 1}^{c}S_{n}^{\prime} = S$ 由于 $f(x,y)$ 在 $S$ 上非负，故积分序列 $\iint \limits_{S_n}f(x,y)\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y$ 是递增的，从而，极限

$$
I = \lim  _ {n \rightarrow \infty} \iint_ {S _ {n}} f (x, y) d x d y \tag {1}
$$

存在（是有限数或是 $+\infty$）. 我们要证 $\lim_{n\to \infty}\iint \limits_{S_n}f(x,y)\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y = I.$ (2)

先设 $I$ 为有限数。任给 $\varepsilon >0$，由 (1) 式知，存在 $N$，使当 $n\geqslant N$ 时，恒有

$$
I - \varepsilon <   \iint_ {S _ {n} ^ {\prime}} f (x, y) d x d y <   I + \varepsilon . \tag {3}
$$

又存在 $n_0$，使当 $n\geqslant n_0$ 时，$S_{n}\supset S_{N}^{\prime}$. 从而，根据 $f(x,y)$ 的非负性以及 (3) 式，得

$$
\iint_ {S _ {n}} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \geqslant \iint_ {S _ {N}} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y > I - \epsilon .
$$

另一方面，对每个固定的 $n\geqslant n_0$ 又必存在某个充分大的 $k_{n}(\geqslant N)$ 使 $S_{k_n}^{\prime}\supset S_n$. 于是，再由 (3) 式得

$$
\iint_ {S _ {n}} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \leqslant \iint_ {S _ {n}} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y <   I + \varepsilon .
$$

由此可知，当 $n\geqslant n_0$ 时，恒有

故（2）式成立.

次设 $I = +\infty$ 任给 $M > 0$，由（1）式知，存在 $N_{1}$，使

$$
\iint_ {\tilde {S} _ {1}} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y > M.
$$

又存在 $n_1$，使当 $n\geqslant n_1$ 时，恒有 $S_{n}\supset S_{N_{1}}^{\prime}$，从而，此时有

$$
\iint_ {S _ {n}} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \geqslant \iint_ {S _ {N _ {1}}} f (x, y) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y > M,
$$

故（2）式成立。证毕

question: 【4195】 $\iiint_ {\substack {x \leqslant 1 \\ y \leqslant 1 \\ z \leqslant 1}} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \mathrm {d} z}{| x + y - z | ^ {p}}.$
answer: p < 1 时收敛，p \geqslant 1 时发散
solution:
解我们有（注意被积函数的非负性）

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iiint_ {\substack {x \leqslant 1 \\ y \leqslant 1 \\ z \leqslant 1}} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \mathrm {d} z}{| x + y - z | ^ {p}} = 2 \iiint_ {\substack {| x \leqslant 1, | y | \leqslant 1, | z | \leqslant 1 \\ x - y - z \geqslant 0}} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \mathrm {d} z}{(x + y - z) ^ {p}} \\ = 2 \iint_ {\substack {| x | \leqslant 1, | y | \leqslant 1 \\ | \leqslant x + y \leqslant 1}} \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \int_ {- 1} ^ {x + y} \frac {\mathrm {d} z}{(x + y - z) ^ {p}} + 2 \iint_ {\substack {0 \leqslant x \leqslant 1 \\ 0 \leqslant y \leqslant 1 \\ x + y \geqslant 1}} \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \int_ {- 1} ^ {1} \frac {\mathrm {d} z}{(x + y - z) ^ {p}} = 2 I _ {1} + 2 I _ {2}, \\ \end{array}
$$

其中 $I_{1}$ 表第一个积分， $I_{2}$ 表第二个积分.

若 $p < 1$ ，则

$$
\int_ {1} ^ {r - y} \frac {\mathrm {d} z}{(x + y - z) ^ {p}} = \frac {(x + y + 1) ^ {1 - p}}{1 - p},
$$

$$
\int_ {- 1} ^ {1} \frac {\mathrm {d} z}{(x + y - z) ^ {p}} = \frac {(x + y + 1) ^ {1 - p} - (x + y - 1) ^ {1 - p}}{1 - p} \quad (x + y \geqslant 1),
$$

故 $I_{1} = \frac{1}{1 - p}\iint \limits_{\substack{x\leqslant 1, y\leqslant 1\\ -1\leqslant x - y\leqslant 1}}(x + y + 1)^{1 - p}\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y,$

$$
I _ {2} = \frac {1}{1 - p} \iint_ {\substack {0 \leqslant x \leqslant 1, 0 \leqslant y \leqslant 1 \\ (x + y + 1) ^ {1 - p} - (x + y - 1) ^ {1 - p}}} \left[ (x + y + 1) ^ {1 - p} - (x + y - 1) ^ {1 - p} \right] d x d y.
$$

显然， $I_{1}$ 与 $I_{2}$ 均为常义（二重）积分，当然收敛。因此，当 $p < 1$ 时，积分 $\iiint \limits_{\substack{|x| \leqslant |z| \\ |y| \leqslant |z|}} \frac{\mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y \mathrm{d}z}{|x + y - z|^p}$ 收敛.

若 $p \geqslant 1$ ，则当 $x + y > -1$ 时， $\int_{-1}^{x + y} \frac{\mathrm{d}z}{|x + y - z|^p} = +\infty$ ，故 $I_1 = +\infty$ ，又显然有 $I_2 > 0$ ，故此时积分 $\iiint_{\substack{r < t \\ |x + y - z|^p}} \frac{\mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y \mathrm{d}z}{|x + y - z|^p}$ 发散.

question: 【4198】 $\iiint_{x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \leqslant 1} \frac{\mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y \, \mathrm{d}z}{(1 - x^2 - y^2 - z^2)^p}$ .
solution:
采用球坐标，由于被积函数的非负性，有

$$
\iiint_ {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2} \leqslant 1} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \mathrm {d} z}{(1 - x ^ {2} - y ^ {2} - z ^ {2}) ^ {p}} = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \mathrm {d} \varphi \int_ {- \frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \cos \psi \mathrm {d} \psi \int_ {0} ^ {1} \frac {r ^ {2}}{(1 - r ^ {2}) ^ {p}} \mathrm {d} r = 4 \pi \int_ {0} ^ {1} \frac {r ^ {2}}{(1 - r ^ {2}) ^ {p}} \mathrm {d} r.
$$

作代换 $t = r^2$ ，则当 $p < 1$ 时，有

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {1} \frac {r ^ {2}}{(1 - r ^ {2}) ^ {p}} d r = \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {1} t ^ {\frac {1}{2}} (1 - t) ^ {- p} d t = \frac {1}{2} B \left(\frac {3}{2}, 1 - p\right).
$$

从而，当 $p < 1$ 时，有 $\iiint_{r^2 + y^2 + z^2 \leq 1} \frac{\mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y \, \mathrm{d}z}{(1 - x^2 - y^2 - z^2)^p} = 2\pi \mathrm{B}\left(\frac{3}{2}, 1 - p\right).$

注意，若 $p \geqslant 1$ ，则 $\int_{0}^{1} t^{\frac{1}{2}} (1 - t)^{-p} \mathrm{d}t = +\infty$ ，故此时

$$
\iint_ {x ^ {2} - y ^ {2} - z ^ {2} \leqslant 1} \frac {\mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y \mathrm {d} z}{(1 - x ^ {2} - y ^ {2} - z ^ {2}) ^ {p}} = + \infty .
$$

question:
【4202】设 $f = f(x_{1},x_{2},\dots ,x_{n})$ 为区域 $0\leqslant x_{i}\leqslant x(i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$ 内的连续函数，证明等式：

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} \mathrm {d} x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f \mathrm {d} x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \quad (n \geqslant 2).
$$
answer: $$ \int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} \mathrm {d} x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f \mathrm {d} x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f \mathrm {d} x _ {1} $$
solution:
证 考虑下面三个有界闭区域：

$$
\Omega = \left\{\left(x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}\right) \mid 0 \leqslant x _ {i} \leqslant x, i = 1, 2, \dots , n \right\},
$$

$$
\Omega_ {1} = \left\{\left(x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}\right) \mid 0 \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x, 0 \leqslant x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {1}, \dots , 0 \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n - 1} \right\},
$$

$$
\Omega_ {2} = \left\{\left(x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}\right) \mid 0 \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x, x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n - 1} \leqslant x, \dots , x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x \right\}.
$$

由假定 $f(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})$ 在区域 $\Omega$ 上连续，显然， $\Omega_1\subset \Omega ,\Omega_2\subset \Omega$ ，故 $f(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})$ 在 $\Omega_{1}$ 与 $\Omega_{2}$ 上连续。根据化 $_{n}$ 重积分为累次积分的公式，我们有

$$
\iint_ {\Omega_ {1}} \dots \int f d x _ {1} \dots d x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} d x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} d x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f d x _ {n}, \tag {1}
$$

$$
\iint_ {\Omega_ {2}} \dots \int f d x _ {1} \dots d x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} d x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} d x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f d x _ {1}. \tag {2}
$$

下证 $\Omega_{1} = \Omega_{2}$ ，事实上，若 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{1}$ ，则

$$
0 \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x, 0 \leqslant x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {1}, \dots , 0 \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n - 1}, \tag {3}
$$

从而， $0\leqslant x_{n}\leqslant x_{n - 1}\leqslant x_{n - 2}\leqslant \dots \leqslant x_{2}\leqslant x_{1}\leqslant x.$ (4）

于是， $0\leqslant x_{n}\leqslant x,x_{n}\leqslant x_{n - 1}\leqslant x,\dots ,x_{2}\leqslant x_{1}\leqslant x.$ (5）

由此可知 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{2}$ .反之，若 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{2}$ ，则 (5) 式成立。从而，（4) 式显然成立，由此又知 (3) 式成立，故 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{1}$ ，于是， $\Omega_1 = \Omega_2$ 获证。由此，再根据 (1) 式与 (2) 式，即得

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} \mathrm {d} x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f \mathrm {d} x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f \mathrm {d} x _ {1}.
$$

证毕.

question: 【4211】求 $n$ 维球体 $x_{1}^{2} + x_{2}^{2} + \dots +x_{n}^{2}\leqslant a^{2}$ 的体积.
solution:
解令 $x_{i} = a\xi_{i}$ $(i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$ ，即得体积

$$
V _ {n} = \iint_ {x _ {1} ^ {2} - x _ {2} ^ {2} + \dots + x _ {n} ^ {n} \leqslant a ^ {2}} \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \mathrm {d} x _ {2} \dots \mathrm {d} x _ {n} = a ^ {n} V _ {n} (1).
$$

其中 $V_{n}(1)$ 表示 $a = 1$ 时的 $n$ 维球体的体积。但是

$$
\begin{array}{l} V _ {n} (1) = \iint_ {\xi_ {1} ^ {2} + \xi_ {2} ^ {2} + \dots + \xi_ {n} ^ {2} \leq 1} \mathrm {d} \xi_ {1} \mathrm {d} \xi_ {2} \dots \mathrm {d} \xi_ {n} = \int_ {- 1} ^ {1} \mathrm {d} \xi_ {n} \iint_ {\xi_ {1} ^ {2} + \dots + \xi_ {n - 1} ^ {2} \leq 1 - \xi_ {n} ^ {2}} \mathrm {d} \xi_ {1} \mathrm {d} \xi_ {2} \dots \mathrm {d} \xi_ {n - 1} \\ = V _ {n - 1} (1) \int_ {- 1} ^ {1} \left(1 - \xi_ {n} ^ {2}\right) ^ {\frac {n - 1}{2}} d \xi_ {n} = 2 V _ {n - 1} (1) \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \sin^ {n} \varphi d \varphi \\ = 2 V _ {n - 1} (1) \cdot \frac {1}{2} \frac {\Gamma \left(\frac {n + 1}{2}\right) \Gamma \left(\frac {1}{2}\right)}{\Gamma \left(\frac {n + 2}{2}\right)} = V _ {n - 1} (1) \sqrt {\pi} \frac {\Gamma \left(\frac {n + 1}{2}\right)}{\Gamma \left(\frac {n + 2}{2}\right)}, \\ \end{array}
$$

因为 $V_{1}(1) = 2$ ，故由上述循环公式可得 $V_{n}(1) = \frac{\pi^{\frac{n}{2}}}{\Gamma\left(\frac{n}{2} + 1\right)}.$

因此，所求的体积为 $V_{n} = \frac{\pi^{\frac{n}{2}}}{\Gamma\left(\frac{n}{2} + 1\right)} a^{n}$

对于 $n$ 为偶数及奇数，分别可得公式

$$
V _ {2 m} = \frac {\pi^ {m}}{m !} a ^ {2 m}, \quad V _ {2 m + 1} = \frac {2 \cdot (2 \pi) ^ {m}}{(2 m + 1) ! !} a ^ {2 m + 1}.
$$

特别是，对于 $V_{1}, V_{2}, V_{3}$ 可求得熟知的值： $2a, \pi a^{2}, \frac{4}{3} \pi a^{3}$ .

question: 【4205】 $I_{n} = \iint_{\substack{x_{1}\geqslant 0, x_{2}\geqslant 0, \dots, x_{n}\geqslant 0 \\ x_{1} + x_{2} + \dots + x_{n}\leqslant a}}\mathrm{d}x_{1}\mathrm{d}x_{2}\dots \mathrm{d}x_{n}.$
solution:
解 解法 1：

化为累次积分，有 $I_{n} = \int_{0}^{a}\mathrm{d}x_{1}\int_{0}^{a - x_{1}}\mathrm{d}x_{2}\dots \int_{0}^{a - x_{1} - \dots -x_{n - 2}}\mathrm{d}x_{n - 1}\int_{0}^{a - x_{1} - \dots -x_{n - 1}}\mathrm{d}x_{n},$

我们又知

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 2}} d x _ {n - 1} \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 1}} d x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 2}} (a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 2} - x _ {n - 1}) d x _ {n - 1} \\ = - \frac {1}{2} (a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 2} - x _ {n - 1}) ^ {2} \left| \begin{array}{l} x _ {n - 1} = a + x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 2} \\ x _ {n - 1} = 0 \end{array} = \frac {1}{2} (a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 2}) ^ {2}, \right. \\ \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} \dots - x _ {n - 3}} d x _ {n - 2} \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} \dots - x _ {n - 2}} d x _ {n - 1} \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} \dots - x _ {n - 1}} d x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} \dots - x _ {n - 3}} \frac {1}{2} (a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 2}) ^ {2} d x _ {n - 2} \\ = \frac {1}{3 !} (a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 3}) ^ {3}, \\ \end{array}
$$

中

这样继续下去，显然有

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1}} d x _ {2} \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} - x _ {2}} d x _ {3} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 2}} d x _ {n - 1} \int_ {0} ^ {a - x _ {1} - \dots - x _ {n - 1}} d x _ {n} = \frac {1}{(n - 1) !} (a - x _ {1}) ^ {n - 1}.
$$

于是， $I_{n} = \int_{0}^{a}\frac{1}{(n - 1)!} (a - x_{1})^{n - 1}\mathrm{d}x_{1} = \frac{a^{n}}{n!}.$

解法 2：

我们有 $I_{n} = \int_{0}^{a}\mathrm{d}x_{1}\int_{0}^{a - x_{1}}\mathrm{d}x_{2}\dots \int_{0}^{a - x_{1} - \dots -x_{n - 1}}\mathrm{d}x_{n}.$

在右端的逐次积分中作代换： $x_{1} = a\xi_{1},x_{2} = a\xi_{2},\dots ,x_{n} = a\xi_{n},$

即得

$$
I _ {n} = a ^ {n} \int_ {0} ^ {1} d \xi_ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {1}{\xi_ {1}}} d \xi_ {2} \int_ {0} ^ {1 - \xi_ {1} - \dots - \xi_ {n - 1}} d \xi_ {n} = a ^ {n} \iint_ {\substack {\xi_ {1} \geqslant 0, \xi_ {2} \geqslant 0, \dots , \xi_ {n} \geqslant 0 \\ \xi_ {1} + \xi_ {2} + \dots + \xi_ {n} \leqslant 1}} d \xi_ {1} d \xi_ {2} \dots d \xi_ {n} = a ^ {n} I _ {n} (1),
$$

其中 $I_{n}(1)$ 表示当 $a = 1$ 时积分 $I_{n}$ 的值

另一方面，我们有

$$
I _ {n} (1) = \int_ {0} ^ {1} d \xi_ {n} \iint_ {\substack {\xi_ {1} \geqslant 0, \xi_ {2} \geqslant 0, \dots , \xi_ {n} \geqslant 0 \\ \xi_ {1} + \xi_ {2} + \dots + \xi_ {n - 1} \leqslant 1 - \xi_ {n}}} d \xi_ {1} d \xi_ {2} \dots d \xi_ {n - 1} = I _ {n - 1} (1) \int_ {0} ^ {1} (1 - \xi_ {n}) ^ {n - 1} d \xi_ {n} = \frac {I _ {n - 1} (1)}{n}.
$$

反复运用上述循环公式，可得 $I_{n}(1) = \frac{1}{n!}$

于是，最后得 $I_{n} = \frac{a^{n}}{n!}$

question:
【4208】求以平面 $a_{i1}x_1 + a_{i2}x_2 + \dots+a_{in}x_n = \pm h_i$ （ $i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$

为界的 $n$ 维平行 $2n$ 面体的体积，这里设 $\Delta = |a_{ij}| \neq 0$ .
solution: 令 $a_{i1}x_1 + a_{i2}x_2 + \dots+a_{in}x_n = \xi_i(i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$ ，即得 $2n$ 面体的体积 $$ V = \int_ {- h _ {1}} ^ {h _ {1}} \int_ {- h _ {2}} ^ {h _ {2}} \dots \int_ {- h _ {n}} ^ {h _ {n}} \frac {1}{| \Delta |} d \xi_ {1} d \xi_ {2} \dots d \xi_ {n} = \frac {2 ^ {n} h _ {1} \cdots h _ {n}}{| \Delta |}. $$

question: 【4224】 $\int_{C} xy \, \mathrm{d}s$ 其中 $C$ 为双曲线 $x = a \cosh t, y = a \sinh t (0 \leqslant t \leqslant t_0)$ 的弧.
solution:
解 弧长的微分为 $\mathrm{ds} = \sqrt{a^2\mathrm{sh}^2t + a^2\mathrm{ch}^2t}\mathrm{dt} = a\sqrt{\mathrm{ch}2t}\mathrm{dt}.$

于是， $\int_{C}xy\mathrm{d}s = a^{3}\int_{0}^{t_{0}}\mathrm{ch}t\mathrm{sh}t\sqrt{\mathrm{ch}2t}\mathrm{d}t = \frac{a^{3}}{2}\int_{0}^{t_{0}}\mathrm{sh}2t\sqrt{\mathrm{ch}2t}\mathrm{d}t = \frac{a^{3}}{4}\int_{0}^{t_{0}}\sqrt{\mathrm{ch}2t}\mathrm{d}(\mathrm{ch}2t) = \frac{a^{3}}{6} (\sqrt{\mathrm{ch}^{3}2t_{0}} -1).$

question: 【4227】 $\int_{C} |y| \mathrm{d}s$ 其中 $C$ 为双纽线 $(x^{2} + y^{2})^{2} = a^{2}(x^{2} - y^{2})$ 的弧.
solution:
双纽线的极坐标方程为 $r^2 = a^2\cos 2\varphi$ ，弧长的微分为

$$
\mathrm {d} s = \sqrt {r ^ {2} + r ^ {\prime 2}} \mathrm {d} \varphi = \frac {a}{\sqrt {\cos 2 \varphi}} \mathrm {d} \varphi .
$$

于是， $\int_{C}|y|\mathrm{d}s = 4\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}a\sqrt{\cos2\varphi}\sin \varphi \frac {a}{\sqrt {\cos2\varphi}}\mathrm{d}\varphi = 4a^{2}(-\cos \varphi)\left| \begin{array}{l}\frac{\pi}{4}\\ 0 \end{array} \right. = 2a^{2}(2 - \sqrt{2}).$

question: 【4228】 $\int_{C} x \, \mathrm{d}s$ ，其中 $C$ 为对数螺线 $r = a \mathrm{e}^{k\varphi} (k > 0)$ 在圆 $r = a$ 内的部分。
solution: 解 弧长的微分为 $\mathrm{ds} = ae^{k\varphi}\sqrt{1 + k^2}\mathrm{d}\varphi (-\infty < \varphi < 0).$ 于是， $\int_{C}x\mathrm{d}s = \int_{C}^{0}ae^{k\varphi}\cos \varphi \cdot ae^{k\varsigma}\sqrt{1 + k^2}\mathrm{d}\varphi = a^2\sqrt{1 + k^2}\frac{2k\cos\varphi + \sin\varphi}{1 + 4k^2}\mathrm{e}^{2k\varphi}\Bigg{|}_{-}^{0} = \frac{2ka^2\sqrt{1 + k^2}}{1 + 4k^2}.$

question: 【4226】 $\int_{C} \mathrm{e}^{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} \, \mathrm{d}s$ 其中 $C$ 为由曲线 $r = a, \varphi = 0, \varphi = \frac{\pi}{4}$ （ $r$ 和 $\varphi$ 为极坐标）给出的凸围线.
solution: 解 凸围线由三段组成，分别是：直线段 $\varphi = 0$ （ $0 \leqslant r \leqslant a$ ）；圆弧段 $r = a$ （ $0 \leqslant \varphi \leqslant \frac{\pi}{4}$ ）；直线段 $\varphi = \frac{\pi}{4}$ （ $0 \leqslant r \leqslant a$ ）。弧长的微分相应地是： $\mathrm{ds} = \mathrm{dr}$ ； $\mathrm{ds} = \sqrt{r^2 + r'^2}$ ； $\mathrm{d}\varphi = a\mathrm{d}\varphi$ ； $\mathrm{ds} = \mathrm{dr}$ 。于是，$$ \int_ {c} \mathrm {e} ^ {\sqrt {r ^ {2} - r ^ {2}}} \mathrm {d} s = \int_ {0} ^ {a} \mathrm {e} ^ {r} \mathrm {d} r + \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{4}} \mathrm {e} ^ {a} a \mathrm {d} \varphi + \int_ {0} ^ {a} \mathrm {e} ^ {r} \mathrm {d} r = 2 (\mathrm {e} ^ {a} - 1) + \frac {\pi a \mathrm {e} ^ {a}}{4}. $$

question:
【4220】设 $\sum_{i,j=1}^{n} a_{ij} x_i x_j (a_{ij} = a_{ji})$ 为正定二次型，计算 $n$ 重积分

$$
\int_ {x _ {1}} ^ {+ \infty} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \dots \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} e ^ {- \left\{\sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} x _ {i} x _ {j} + 2 \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} x _ {j} + c \right\}} d x _ {1} d x _ {2} \dots d x _ {n}.
$$
solution:
解 作变量代换

$$
x _ {i} = y _ {i} + \alpha_ {i} \quad (i = 1, 2, \dots , n), \tag {1}
$$

其中诸常数 $a_{i}$ 以下再确定。于是，易得（注意到 $a_{ij} = a_{ji}$）

$$
\begin{array}{l} \sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} x _ {i} x _ {j} + 2 \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} x _ {j} + c \\ = \sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} y _ {i} y _ {j} + 2 \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} \left[ \left(\sum_ {j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} \alpha_ {j}\right) + b _ {i} \right] y _ {i} + \sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} \alpha_ {i} \alpha_ {j} + 2 \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} \alpha_ {i} + c. \\ \end{array}
$$

由于 $\sum_{i,j=1}^{n} a_{ij} x_i x_j$ 是正定形，故必有 $\delta = |a_{ij}| > 0$，从而，线性方程组

$$
\sum_ {j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} \alpha_ {j} + b _ {i} = 0 \quad (i = 1, 2, \dots , n) \tag {2}
$$

有唯一的一组解 $\alpha_{1},\dots ,\alpha_{n}$，今取变换 (1) 式中的诸 $\alpha_{i}$ 即为方程组 (2) 的解。于是，

$$
\sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} x _ {i} x _ {j} + 2 \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} x _ {i} + c = \sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} y _ {i} y _ {j} + c ^ {\prime}, \tag {3}
$$

其中

$$
c ^ {\prime} = \sum_ {i - 1} ^ {n} \left(\sum_ {j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} \alpha_ {j}\right) \alpha_ {i} + 2 \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} \alpha_ {i} + c = - \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} \alpha_ {i} + 2 \sum_ {i - 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} \alpha_ {i} + c = \sum_ {i - 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} \alpha_ {i} + c. \tag {4}
$$

下面我们用诸 $a_{ij}$ 和 $b_{i}$ 及 $c$ 来表示 $c^{\prime}$ , 令

$$
\Delta = \left| \begin{array}{c c c} a _ {i j} & \vdots & b _ {i} \\ \dots \dots \dots \dots \\ b _ {j} & \vdots & c \end{array} \right| = \left| \begin{array}{c c c c} a _ {1 1} & \dots & a _ {1 n} & b _ {1} \\ \vdots & & \vdots & \vdots \\ a _ {n 1} & \dots & a _ {m n} & b _ {n} \\ b _ {1} & \dots & b _ {n} & c \end{array} \right|
$$

$(n + 1$ 阶行列式，即 $\left|a_{ij}\right|$ 的加边行列式).将此行列式的第一列乘上 $\alpha_{1}$，第二列乘上 $\alpha_{2},\dots ,$ 第 $n$ 列乘上 $\alpha_{n}$ 都加到第 $n + 1$ 列上去，并注意到 (2) 式与 (4) 式，得

$$
\Delta = \left| \begin{array}{c c c} a _ {i j} & \vdots & b _ {i} \\ \dots \dots \dots \dots \\ b _ {j} & \vdots & c \end{array} \right| = \left| \begin{array}{c c c} a _ {i j} & \sum_ {j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} \alpha_ {j} + b _ {i} \\ \dots & \dots & \dots \\ b _ {j} & \sum_ {j = 1} ^ {n} b _ {j} \alpha_ {j} + c \end{array} \right| = \left| \begin{array}{c c c} a _ {i j} & \vdots & 0 \\ \dots \dots \dots \dots \\ b _ {j} & \vdots & c ^ {\prime} \end{array} \right| = c ^ {\prime} | a _ {i j} | = c ^ {\prime} \delta ,
$$

故 $c^{\prime} = \frac{\Delta}{\delta}$ (5）

由于 $\sum_{i,j=1}^{n} a_{ij} y_i y_j$ 是正定二次型，故由高等代数中二次型的理论知，存在正交矩阵

$$
P = \left(p _ {i j}\right) = \left[ \begin{array}{c c c} p _ {1 1} & \dots & p _ {1 n} \\ \vdots & & \vdots \\ p _ {n 1} & \dots & p _ {m} \end{array} \right],
$$

使在线性变换

$$
y _ {i} = \sum_ {j = 1} ^ {n} p _ {i j} z _ {j}, \quad (i = 1, 2, \dots , n) \tag {6}
$$

下，二次型变为平方和：

$$
\sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} y _ {i} y _ {j} = \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} \lambda_ {i} z _ {i} ^ {2}, \tag {7}
$$

其中 $\lambda_{i} > 0 (i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$；也即

$$
P ^ {- 1} A P = \left[ \begin{array}{l l l} \lambda_ {1} & & 0 \\ & \ddots & \\ 0 & & \lambda_ {n} \end{array} \right], \tag {8}
$$

其中 $A = (a_{ij}) = \begin{bmatrix} a_{11} & \dots & a_{1n}\\ \vdots & & \vdots \\ a_{n1} & \dots & a_{nn} \end{bmatrix}$ .由于 $P$ 为正交矩阵，故 $P^{-1} = P^{\prime}(P^{\prime}$ 表 $P$ 的转置矩阵)，且 $|P| = |p_{ij}| = \pm 1.$

由（8）式又知

$$
\delta = \left| a _ {i j} \right| = \left| P ^ {- 1} \right| \cdot | A | \cdot | P | = \lambda_ {1} \lambda _ {2} \dots \lambda _ {n}. \tag {9}
$$

根据（1）式与（6）式，可知

$$
\frac {D \left(x _ {1} , \cdots , x _ {n}\right)}{D \left(y _ {1} , \cdots , y _ {n}\right)} = 1, \quad \frac {D \left(y _ {1} , \cdots , y _ {n}\right)}{D \left(z _ {1} , \cdots , z _ {n}\right)} = \left| p _ {i j} \right| = | P | = \pm 1.
$$

于是，利用广义 $n$ 重积分的变量代换公式，并注意到被积函数的非负性，得（注意 (3) 式、（5) 式与 (7) 式）

$$
\begin{array}{l} I = \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \dots \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} e ^ {- \left\{\sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} x _ {i} x _ {j} + 2 \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} x _ {i} + c \right\}} d x _ {1} d x _ {2} \dots d x _ {n} \\ = \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \dots \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} e ^ {- \left\{\sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} y _ {i} y _ {j} + \epsilon^ {\prime} \right\}} \left| \frac {D (x _ {1} , \cdots , x _ {n})}{D (y _ {1} , \cdots , y _ {n})} \right| d y _ {1} d y _ {2} \dots d y _ {n} \\ = \mathrm {e} ^ {- \frac {\Delta}{\delta}} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \dots \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \mathrm {e} ^ {- \left\{\sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} y _ {i} y _ {j} \right\}} d y _ {1} d y _ {2} \dots d y _ {n} \\ = \mathrm {e} ^ {- \frac {\Delta}{\delta}} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \dots \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \mathrm {e} ^ {- \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} \lambda_ {i} z _ {i} ^ {2}} \left| \frac {D (y _ {1} , \cdots , y _ {n})}{D (z _ {1} , \cdots , z _ {n})} \right| d z _ {1} d z _ {2} \dots d z _ {n} \\ = \mathrm {e} ^ {- \frac {\Delta}{\delta}} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \dots \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \mathrm {e} ^ {- \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} \lambda_ {i} z _ {i} ^ {2}} d z _ {1} d z _ {2} \dots d z _ {n} \\ = \mathrm {e} ^ {- \frac {\Delta}{\delta}} \left(\int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \mathrm {e} ^ {- \lambda_ {1} z _ {1} ^ {2}} \mathrm {d} z _ {1}\right) \left(\int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \mathrm {e} ^ {- \lambda_ {2} z _ {2} ^ {2}} \mathrm {d} z _ {2}\right) \dots \left(\int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \mathrm {e} ^ {- \lambda_ {n} z _ {n} ^ {2}} \mathrm {d} z _ {n}\right). \\ \end{array}
$$

作代换 $z_{i} = \frac{u}{\sqrt{\lambda_{i}}}$（i 固定），得

$$
\int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} e ^ {- \lambda_ {i} z _ {i} ^ {2}} d z _ {i} = \frac {1}{\sqrt {\lambda_ {i}}} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} e ^ {- u ^ {2}} d u = \frac {2}{\sqrt {\lambda_ {i}}} \int_ {0} ^ {+ \infty} e ^ {- u ^ {2}} d u = \frac {\sqrt {\pi}}{\sqrt {\lambda_ {i}}} (i = 1, 2, \dots , n).
$$

以此代入上式，并注意到（9）式，最后得

$$
I = \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} \dots \int_ {- \infty} ^ {+ \infty} e ^ {- \left\{\sum_ {i, j = 1} ^ {n} a _ {i j} x _ {i} x _ {j} + 2 \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} b _ {i} x _ {i} + c \right\}} d x _ {1} d x _ {2} \dots d x _ {n} = e ^ {- \frac {\Delta}{\delta}} \frac {\pi^ {\frac {n}{2}}}{\sqrt {\lambda_ {1} \lambda_ {2} \cdots \lambda_ {n}}} = \sqrt {\frac {\pi^ {n}}{\delta}} e ^ {- \frac {\Delta}{\delta}}.
$$

question: 【4231】 $x = 3t, y = 3t^2, z = 2t^3$ ，从 $O(0,0,0)$ 到 $A(3,3,2)$
solution:
解弧长的微分为 $\mathrm{ds} = \sqrt{x'^2 + y'^2 + z'^2}\mathrm{dt} = 3(2t^2 +1)\mathrm{dt}.$

于是，弧长为 $s = \int_{0}^{1}3(2t^{2} + 1)\mathrm{d}t = 5.$

question: 【4221】 $\int_{C} (x + y) \mathrm{d}s$，其中 $C$ 为以 $O(0,0), A(1,0)$ 和 $B(0,1)$ 为顶点的三角形围线.
solution:
解 $\int_{C}(x + y)\mathrm{d}s = \int_{OA}(x + y)\mathrm{d}s + \int_{AB}(x + y)\mathrm{d}s + \int_{BO}(x + y)\mathrm{d}s$

$$
= \int_ {0} ^ {1} x \mathrm {d} x + \int_ {0} ^ {1} \sqrt {2} \mathrm {d} x + \int_ {0} ^ {1} y \mathrm {d} y = 1 + \sqrt {2}.
$$

question: 【4225】$\int_{C} (x^{\frac{1}{3}} + y^{\frac{1}{3}}) \mathrm{d}s$，其中 $C$ 为星形线 $x^{\frac{2}{3}} + y^{\frac{2}{3}} = a^{\frac{2}{3}}$ 的弧.
solution:
解解法 1：

按直角坐标方程计算，弧长的微分为 $\mathrm{ds} = \sqrt{1 + y'^2}\mathrm{dx} = \frac{a^{\frac{1}{3}}}{x^{\frac{1}{3}}}\mathrm{dx}.$

于是，$\int_{C} (x^{\frac{4}{3}} + y^{\frac{4}{3}}) \mathrm{d}s = 4\int_{0}^{a} [x^{\frac{4}{3}} + (a^{\frac{2}{3}} - x^{\frac{2}{3}})^{2}] \frac{a^{\frac{1}{3}}}{x^{\frac{1}{3}}} \mathrm{d}x = 4a^{\frac{1}{3}}\int_{0}^{a} (2x + a^{\frac{4}{3}}x^{-\frac{1}{3}} - 2a^{\frac{2}{3}}x^{\frac{1}{3}}) \mathrm{d}x = 4a^{\frac{7}{3}}.$

解法 2：

按参数方程计算。若令 $x = a\cos^3 t, y = a\sin^3 t$，则

$$
\mathrm {d} s = \sqrt {9 a ^ {2} \cos^ {4} t \sin^ {2} t + 9 a ^ {2} \sin^ {4} t \cos^ {2} t} \mathrm {d} t = 3 a \cos t \sin t \mathrm {d} t \quad (0 \leqslant t \leqslant \frac {\pi}{2}).
$$

于是，$\int_{C} (x^{\frac{4}{3}} + y^{\frac{4}{3}}) \mathrm{d}s = 4a^{\frac{4}{3}} \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}} (\cos^{4} t + \sin^{4} t) 3a \cos t \sin t \mathrm{d}t = 24a^{\frac{7}{3}} \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}} \sin^{5} t \mathrm{d}(\sin t) = 4a^{\frac{7}{3}}.$

question: 【4239】 $\int_{C} z \mathrm{~d}s$ ，其中 $C$ 为圆锥螺旋线 $x = t \cos t, y = t \sin t, z = t (0 \leqslant t \leqslant t_0)$
solution:
弧长的微分为 $\mathrm{ds} = \sqrt{(\cos t - t\sin t)^2 + (\sin t + t\cos t)^2 + 1}\mathrm{dt} = \sqrt{2 + t^2}\mathrm{dt}.$

于是， $\int_{C}z\mathrm{d}s = \int_{0}^{t_0}t\sqrt{2 + t^2}\mathrm{d}t = \frac{1}{3} [(2 + t_0^2)^{\frac{3}{2}} - 2^{\frac{3}{2}}].$

question: 【4234】 $(x - y)^{2} = a(x + y), x^{2} - y^{2} = \frac{9}{8} z^{2}$，从 $O(0,0,0)$ 到 $A(x_{0},y_{0},z_{0})$
solution:
解 由 $(x - y)^2 = a(x + y), x^2 - y^2 = \frac{9}{8} z^2$ 可解得

$$
x = \frac {1}{2} \left[ \frac {1}{a} \sqrt [ 3 ]{\left(\frac {9 a}{8}\right) ^ {2}} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {4}} + \sqrt [ 3 ]{\frac {9 a}{8}} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {2}} \right], \quad y = \frac {1}{2} \left[ \frac {1}{a} \sqrt [ 3 ]{\left(\frac {9 a}{8}\right) ^ {2}} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {4}} - \sqrt [ 3 ]{\frac {9 a}{8}} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {2}} \right].
$$

注意到

$$
\left(\frac {\mathrm {d} x}{\mathrm {d} z}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\mathrm {d} y}{\mathrm {d} z}\right) ^ {2} = \frac {8}{9 a ^ {2}} \sqrt [ 3 ]{\left(\frac {9 a}{8}\right) ^ {4}} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {2}} + \frac {2}{9} \sqrt [ 3 ]{\left(\frac {9 a}{8}\right) ^ {2}} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {- 2}} = \frac {\sqrt [ 3 ]{9 a}}{2 a} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {2}} + \frac {\sqrt [ 3 ]{3 a ^ {2}}}{6} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {- 2}},
$$

于是，弧长为

$$
s = \int_ {0} ^ {z _ {0}} \sqrt {\frac {\sqrt [ 3 ]{9 a}}{2 a} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {2}} + \frac {\sqrt [ 3 ]{3 a ^ {2}}}{6} \sqrt [ 3 ]{z ^ {- 2}} + 1} d z = \int_ {0} ^ {\sqrt [ 3 ]{z _ {0} ^ {2}}} \sqrt {\frac {\sqrt [ 3 ]{9 a}}{2 a} t + \frac {\sqrt [ 3 ]{3 a ^ {2}}}{6} \frac {1}{t} + 1} \frac {3 \sqrt {t}}{2} d t
$$

$$
\begin{array}{l} = \frac {3}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {\sqrt [ 3 ]{z _ {0} ^ {2}}} \sqrt {\frac {\sqrt [ 3 ]{9 a}}{2 a} t ^ {2} + t + \frac {\sqrt [ 3 ]{3 a ^ {2}}}{6}} d t = \frac {3}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {\sqrt [ 3 ]{z _ {0} ^ {2}}} \left(\frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \sqrt [ 3 ]{\frac {3}{a}} t + \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} \sqrt [ 3 ]{\frac {a}{3}}\right) d t \\ = \frac {3}{4 \sqrt {2}} \left(\sqrt [ 3 ]{\frac {3 z _ {0} ^ {4}}{a}} + 2 \sqrt [ 3 ]{\frac {a z _ {0} ^ {2}}{3}}\right). \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【4242】求曲线 $x = at, y = \frac{a}{2} t^2, z = \frac{a}{3} t^3$（$0 \leqslant t \leqslant 1$）的弧的质量，其密度按规律 $\rho = \sqrt{\frac{2y}{a}}$ 而变化.
solution: 弧长的微分为 $\mathrm{ds} = \sqrt{a^2 + a^2t^2 + a^2t^4}\mathrm{dt} = a\sqrt{1 + t^2 + t^4}\mathrm{dt},$ 而密度 $\rho = \sqrt{\frac{2y}{a}} = t.$ 于是，质量为（作代换 $u = t^2$）$$ \begin{array}{l} M = \int_ {C} \sqrt {\frac {2 y}{a}} d s = a \int_ {0} ^ {1} t \sqrt {1 + t ^ {2} + t ^ {4}} d t = \frac {a}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {1} \sqrt {1 + u + u ^ {2}} d u \\ = \frac {a}{2} \left[ \frac {u + \frac {1}{2}}{2} \sqrt {1 + u + u ^ {2}} + \frac {3}{8} \ln \left(u + \frac {1}{2} + \sqrt {1 + u + u ^ {2}}\right) \right] \Bigg | _ {0} ^ {1} \\ = \frac {a}{8} \left[ (3 \sqrt {3} - 1) + \frac {3}{2} \ln \frac {3 + 2 \sqrt {3}}{3} \right]. \\ \end{array} $$

question:
【4255】 $\oint_{ABCDA} \frac{\mathrm{d}x + \mathrm{d}y}{|x| + |y|}$，其中 $ABCDA$ 为以 $A(1,0), B(0,1), C(-1,0), D(0,-1)$ 为顶点的正方形的围线.

提示 注意正方形各边的方程分别为

$$
A B: y = 1 - x; \quad B C: y = 1 + x; \quad C D: y = - 1 - x; \quad D A: y = - 1 + x.
$$
solution:
解 正方形各边的方程分别为

$$
A B: y = 1 - x; \quad B C: y = 1 + x; \quad C D: y = - 1 - x; \quad D A: y = - 1 + x.
$$

于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \oint_ {A B C D A} \frac {\mathrm {d} x + \mathrm {d} y}{| x | + | y |} = \int_ {A B} \frac {\mathrm {d} x + \mathrm {d} y}{x + y} + \int_ {B C} \frac {\mathrm {d} x + \mathrm {d} y}{- x + y} + \int_ {C D} \frac {\mathrm {d} x + \mathrm {d} y}{- x - y} + \int_ {D A} \frac {\mathrm {d} x + \mathrm {d} y}{x - y} \\ = \int_ {1} ^ {0} (1 - 1) d x + \int_ {0} ^ {- 1} 2 d x + \int_ {- 1} ^ {0} (1 - 1) d x + \int_ {0} ^ {1} 2 d x = 0. \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【4243】计算均匀曲线 $y = a \cosh \frac{x}{a}$ 从点 $A(0, a)$ 到点 $B(b, h)$ 的弧的质心的坐标.
answer: x_0 = b - a \sqrt {\frac {h - a}{h + a}}, \quad y_0 = \frac {h}{2} + \frac {a b}{2 \sqrt {h ^ {2} - a ^ {2}}}
solution:
弧长的微分为 $\mathrm{ds} = \sqrt{1 + \mathrm{sh}^2\frac{x}{a}}\mathrm{dx} = \mathrm{ch}\frac{x}{a}\mathrm{dx}.$

质量为 $M = \rho_{0}\int_{0}^{b}\mathrm{ch}\frac{x}{a}\mathrm{d}x = a\rho_{0}\mathrm{sh}\frac{b}{a} = \rho_{0}\sqrt{h^{2} - a^{2}}.$

于是，质心的坐标为

$$
\begin{array}{l} x _ {0} = \frac {\rho_ {0}}{M} \int_ {0} ^ {b} x \operatorname {c h} \frac {x}{a} \mathrm {d} x = \frac {\rho_ {0}}{M} \left[ a b \operatorname {s h} \frac {b}{a} - a ^ {2} \left(\operatorname {c h} \frac {b}{a} - 1\right) \right] = \frac {1}{\sqrt {h ^ {2} - a ^ {2}}} \left[ b \sqrt {h ^ {2} - a ^ {2}} - a ^ {2} \left(\frac {h}{a} - 1\right) \right] \\ = b - a \sqrt {\frac {h - a}{h + a}}; \ \end{array}
$$

$$
\begin{array}{l} y _ {0} = \frac {\rho_ {0}}{M} \int_ {0} ^ {b} y \operatorname {c h} \frac {x}{a} d x = \frac {a \rho_ {0}}{M} \int_ {0} ^ {b} \operatorname {c h} ^ {2} \frac {x}{a} d x = \frac {a \rho_ {0}}{M} \int_ {0} ^ {b} \frac {1 + \operatorname {c h} 2 x}{2} d x = \frac {a \rho_ {0}}{M} \left[ \frac {x}{2} + \frac {a}{4} \operatorname {s h} \frac {2 x}{a} \right] \Bigg | _ {0} ^ {b} \\ = \frac {a \rho_ {0}}{M} \left(\frac {b}{2} + \frac {a}{4} \operatorname {s h} \frac {2 b}{a}\right) = \frac {a}{\sqrt {h ^ {2} - a ^ {2}}} \left(\frac {b}{2} + \frac {h}{2} \frac {\sqrt {h ^ {2} - a ^ {2}}}{a}\right) = \frac {h}{2} + \frac {a b}{2 \sqrt {h ^ {2} - a ^ {2}}}. \ \end{array}
$$

$\star$ 由 $h = a \operatorname{ch} \frac{b}{a}$ 知： $\operatorname{ch} \frac{b}{a} = \frac{h}{a}$ . 从而， $\operatorname{sh} \frac{b}{a} = \sqrt{\operatorname{ch}^2 \frac{b}{a} - 1} = \frac{\sqrt{h^2 - a^2}}{a}$ .

question: 【4229】 $\int_{C} \sqrt{x^2 + y^2} \, \mathrm{d}s$ ，其中 $C$ 为圆周 $x^2 + y^2 = ax$ .
solution:
解 对于上半圆周，弧长的微分为

$$
\mathrm {d} s = \sqrt {1 + \left(\frac {a - 2 x}{2 y}\right) ^ {2}} \mathrm {d} x = \frac {a}{2 y} \mathrm {d} x = \frac {a}{2 \sqrt {a x - x ^ {2}}} \mathrm {d} x \cdot (0 \leqslant x \leqslant a).
$$

于是， $\int_{c} \sqrt{x^2 + y^2} \, \mathrm{d}s = 2\int_{a}^{a} \sqrt{ax} \frac {a}{2\sqrt{ax - x^2}} \, \mathrm{d}x = a\sqrt{a}\int_{a}^{a} \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\sqrt{a - x}} = 2a^2.$

question: 【4257】 $\oint_{\Omega mA nO}\arctan \frac{y}{x}\mathrm{d}y - \mathrm{d}x$ ，其中 $OmA$ 为抛物线段 $y = x^{2},OnA$ 为直线段 $y = x$
solution:
解 如图 8.62 所示，我们有

$$
\begin{array}{l} \oint_ {(m A n)} \arctan \frac {y}{x} d y - d x = \int_ {(m A} \arctan \frac {y}{x} d y - d x + \int_ {A n O} \arctan \frac {y}{x} d y - d x \\ = \int_ {0} ^ {1} 2 x \arctan x d x - \int_ {0} ^ {1} d x + \int_ {1} ^ {\infty} (\arctan 1 - 1) d x \\ = x ^ {2} \arctan x \left| _ {0} ^ {1} - \int_ {0} ^ {1} \frac {x ^ {2}}{1 + x ^ {2}} d x - 1 + \left(\frac {\pi}{4} - 1\right) x \right| _ {1} ^ {0} \\ = \frac {\pi}{4} - (x - \arctan x) \left| _ {0} ^ {1} - 1 - \left(\frac {\pi}{4} - 1\right) = \frac {\pi}{4} - 1 \right. \\ \end{array}
$$

注 原题为 $\int_{(m, m)} \mathrm{d}y \arctan \frac{y}{x} - \mathrm{d}x$ ，若把它理解为

$$
\int_ {(m A n O)} \mathrm {d} \left(y \arctan \frac {y}{x}\right) - \mathrm {d} x,
$$

则其值为零，与原答案不符.

question: 【4265】 $\int_{(x_1,y_1)}^{(x_2,y_2)}\varphi (x)\mathrm{d}x + \psi (y)\mathrm{d}y$ ，其中 $\varphi$ 和 $\psi$ 为连续函数.
solution:
由于 $\varphi, \psi$ 是连续函数，故显然有

$$
\varphi (x) \mathrm {d} x + \psi (y) \mathrm {d} y = \mathrm {d} F (x) + \mathrm {d} G (y) = \mathrm {d} [ F (x) + G (y) ],
$$

其中 $F(x) = \int_{x_1}^x\varphi (u)\mathrm{d}u,G(y) = \int_{y_1}^y\psi (v)\mathrm{d}v.$ 从而， $\varphi (x)\mathrm{d}x + \psi (y)\mathrm{d}y$ 是函数 $F(x) + G(y)$ 的全微分，于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int_ {(x _ {1}, y _ {1})} ^ {(x _ {2}, y _ {2})} \varphi (x) d x + \psi (y) d y = [ F (x) + G (y) ] \left| _ {(x _ {1}, y _ {1})} ^ {(x _ {2}, y _ {2})} = [ F (x _ {2}) + G (y _ {2}) ] - [ F (x _ {1}) + G (y _ {1}) ] \right. \\ = \int_ {x _ {1}} ^ {x _ {2}} \varphi (u) d u + \int_ {y _ {1}} ^ {y _ {2}} \psi (v) d v. \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【4266】 $\int_{(-2, - 1)}^{(3,0)}(x^4 +4xy^3)\mathrm{d}x + (6x^2 y^2 -5y^4)\mathrm{d}y.$
solution:
解 $P = x^4 + 4xy^3, Q = 6x^2y^2 - 5y^4$ . 显然， $P, Q$ 在全平面上具有连续偏导数，并且

$$
\frac {\partial Q}{\partial x} = 1 2 x y ^ {2} \quad \frac {\partial P}{\partial y} = 1 2 x y ^ {2},
$$

故 $\frac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = \frac{\partial P}{\partial y}$ . 由于全平面是单连通区域，故在整个平面上表达式 $P \mathrm{~d}x + Q \mathrm{~d}y$ 是某函数 $u(x, y)$ 的全微分，并且线积分 $\int_{C} P \mathrm{~d}x + Q \mathrm{~d}y$ 与路径无关，因而，可按平行于坐标轴的直线段来计算所给积分，得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int_ {(- 2, - 1)} ^ {(3, 0)} \left(x ^ {4} + 4 x y ^ {3}\right) d x + \left(6 x ^ {2} y ^ {2} - 5 y ^ {4}\right) d y = \int_ {- 2} ^ {3} \left(x ^ {4} + 4 x \cdot 0 ^ {3}\right) d x + \int_ {- 1} ^ {0} \left[ 6 (- 2) ^ {2} y ^ {2} - 5 y ^ {4} \right] d y \\ = 5 5 + 7 = 6 2. \\ \end{array}
$$

注 也可利用简单的技巧求出函数 $u(x, y)$ 来。我们有

$$
(x ^ {4} + 4 x y ^ {3}) \mathrm {d} x + (6 x ^ {2} y ^ {2} - 5 y ^ {4}) \mathrm {d} y = \mathrm {d} \left(\frac {x ^ {5}}{5}\right) + 2 y ^ {3} \mathrm {d} \left(x ^ {2}\right) + 2 x ^ {2} \mathrm {d} \left(y ^ {3}\right) - \mathrm {d} \left(y ^ {5}\right) = \mathrm {d} \left(\frac {x ^ {5}}{5} + 2 x ^ {2} y ^ {3} - y ^ {5}\right),
$$

从而， $\int_{(-2, - 1)}^{(3,0)}(x^4 +4xy^3)\mathrm{d}x + (6x^2 y^2 -5y^4)\mathrm{d}y = \left(\frac{x^5}{5} +2x^2 y^3 -y^5\right)\bigg|_{(-2, - 1)}^{(3,0)} = 62.$

question:
【4270】证明：若 $f(u)$ 为连续函数且 $C$ 为分段光滑的封闭曲线，则

$$
\oint_ {c} f \left(x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}\right) \left(x d x + y d y\right) = 0.
$$
solution:
证明思路 若能求得函数 $F(x,y)$ ，使 $\mathrm{d}F(x,y) = f(x^2 + y^2)(x\mathrm{d}x + y\mathrm{d}y)$ （即 $F'_x(x,y) = xf(x^2 + y^2)$ ， $F'_y(x,y) = yf(x^2 + y^2)$ ），即可证明：

$$
\oint_ {C} f \left(x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}\right) (x d x + y d y) = F (x, y) \left| \begin{array}{l} \left(x _ {0}, y _ {0}\right) \\ \left(x _ {0}, y _ {0}\right) \end{array} = F \left(x _ {0}, y _ {0}\right) - F \left(x _ {0}, y _ {0}\right) = 0, \right.
$$

其中 $(x_0, y_0)$ 为 $C$ 上任意取定的一点。经过分析，易知 $F(x, y) = \frac{1}{2} \int_{0}^{x^2 + y^2} f(u) \, \mathrm{d}u$ 就是这样的函数。

证 令 $F(x, y) = \frac{1}{2} \int_{0}^{x^2 + y^2} f(u) \, \mathrm{d}u$ . 由于 $f(u)$ 是连续函数，故

$$
F _ {r} ^ {\prime} (x, y) = x f \left(x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}\right), \quad F _ {y} ^ {\prime} (x, y) = y f \left(x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}\right),
$$

并且显然 $F_{x}^{\prime}(x,y), F_{y}^{\prime}(x,y)$ 都是 $x, y$ 的连续函数。因此， $F(x,y)$ 可微，且

$$
\mathrm {d} F (x, y) = F _ {x} ^ {\prime} (x, y) \mathrm {d} x + F _ {y} ^ {\prime} (x, y) \mathrm {d} y = f \left(x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}\right) \left(x \mathrm {d} x + y \mathrm {d} y\right).
$$

于是，任取 $C$ 上一点 $(x_0, y_0)$ ，有

$$
\oint_ {C} f \left(x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}\right) \left(x d x + y d y\right) = F (x, y) \left| \begin{array}{l} \left(x _ {0}, y _ {0}\right) \\ \left(x _ {0}, y _ {0}\right) \end{array} = F \left(x _ {0}, y _ {0}\right) - F \left(x _ {0}, y _ {0}\right) = 0. \right.
$$

证毕.

question: 【4267】 $\int_{(0, -1)}^{(1, 0)} \frac{x \mathrm{d}y - y \mathrm{d}x}{(x - y)^2}$ 沿着不与直线 $y = x$ 相交的路径.
solution:
解 $P = -\frac{y}{(x - y)^2}, Q = \frac{x}{(x - y)^2} (x \neq y)$ . 容易验证：

$$
\frac {\partial Q}{\partial x} = \frac {\partial P}{\partial y} = - \frac {x + y}{(x - y) ^ {3}} \quad (x \neq y).
$$

考虑平面上的区域 $\Omega = \{(x, y) | x > y\}$ . 由于 $\Omega$ 是单连通区域，且在其上 $\frac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = \frac{\partial P}{\partial y}$ ，故在 $\Omega$ 上， $P \mathrm{d}x + Q \mathrm{d}y$ 是某函数 $u = u(x, y)$ 的全微分，从而，在 $\Omega$ 上线积分 $\int_{C} P \mathrm{d}x + Q \mathrm{d}y$ 与路径无关。因此，可按平行于坐标轴的直线段来计算所给积分，得

$$
\int_{(0, -1)}^{(1, 0)} \frac {x \mathrm {d} y - y \mathrm {d} x}{(x - y) ^ {2}} = \int_ {0} ^ {1} \frac {- (- 1) \mathrm {d} x}{(x + 1) ^ {2}} + \int_ {1} ^ {0} \frac {\mathrm {d} y}{(1 - y) ^ {2}} = \frac {1}{2} + \frac {1}{2} = 1.
$$

注 也可利用简单的技巧求出函数 $u(x, y)$ 来。我们有

$$
\frac {x \mathrm {d} y - y \mathrm {d} x}{(x - y) ^ {2}} = \frac {(x - y) \mathrm {d} y - y \mathrm {d} (x - y)}{(x - y) ^ {2}} = \mathrm {d} \left(\frac {y}{x - y}\right),
$$
从而， $\int_{(0,1)}^{(1,0)}\frac{x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}x}{(x - y)^2} = \frac{y}{x - y}\Big|_{(0,1)}^{(1,0)} = 1.$

question: 【4268】 $\int_{(1,\pi)}^{(2,\pi)}\left(1 - \frac{y^2}{x^2}\cos \frac{y}{x}\right)\mathrm{d}x + \left(\sin \frac{y}{x} +\frac{y}{x}\cos \frac{y}{x}\right)\mathrm{d}y$ 沿着不与 $Oy$ 轴相交的路径.
solution:
解当 $x\neq 0$ 时，有

$$
\begin{array}{l} P = 1 - \frac {y ^ {2}}{x ^ {2}} \cos \frac {y}{x}, \quad Q = \sin \frac {y}{x} + \frac {y}{x} \cos \frac {y}{x}, \quad \frac {\partial P}{\partial y} = - \frac {2 y}{x ^ {2}} \cos \frac {y}{x} + \frac {y ^ {3}}{x ^ {3}} \sin \frac {y}{x}, \\ \frac {\partial Q}{\partial x} = - \frac {y}{x ^ {2}} \cos \frac {y}{x} - \frac {y}{x ^ {2}} \cos \frac {y}{x} + \frac {y ^ {2}}{x ^ {3}} \sin \frac {y}{x} = - \frac {2 y}{x ^ {2}} \cos \frac {y}{x} + \frac {y ^ {2}}{x ^ {3}} \sin \frac {y}{x}. \\ \end{array}
$$

考虑右半平面 $\Omega = \{(x,y)|x > 0\}$ . 由于 $\Omega$ 是单连通区域，且在其上 $\frac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = \frac{\partial P}{\partial y}$ , 故在 $\Omega$ 上必是某函数 $u(x,y)$ 的全微分，且可取

$$
u (x, y) = \int_ {1} ^ {x} \left(1 - \frac {y ^ {2}}{x ^ {2}} \cos \frac {y}{x}\right) d x + \int_ {\pi} ^ {y} (\sin y + y \cos y) d y = \left(x + y \sin \frac {y}{x}\right) \left| _ {1} ^ {x} + y \sin y \right| _ {n} ^ {y} = x - 1 + y \sin \frac {y}{x}.
$$

于是， $\int_{(1,\pi)}^{(2,\pi)}\left(1 - \frac{y^2}{x^2}\cos \frac{y}{x}\right)\mathrm{d}x + \left(\sin \frac{y}{x} +\frac{y}{x}\cos \frac{y}{x}\right)\mathrm{d}y = \left(x - 1 + y\sin \frac{y}{x}\right)\bigg|_{(1,\pi)}^{(2,\pi)} = \pi +1.$

question: 【4272】 $\mathrm{dz} = \frac{y\mathrm{d}x - x\mathrm{d}y}{3x^2 - 2xy + 3y^2}$
solution:
解 $z = \int_{0}^{x}\frac{y\mathrm{d}x}{3x^2 - 2xy + 3y^2} +\int_{1}^{y}0\mathrm{d}y + C = \frac{y}{3}\int_{0}^{x}\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\left(x - \frac {1}{3}y\right)^2 + \frac {8y^2}{9}} +C$

$$
= \frac {y}{3} \cdot \frac {3}{2 \sqrt {2} y} \arctan \frac {3 \left(x - \frac {y}{3}\right)}{2 \sqrt {2} y} \Bigg | _ {0} ^ {x} + C = \frac {1}{2 \sqrt {2}} \arctan \frac {3 x - y}{2 \sqrt {2} y} + C _ {1}.
$$

question: 【4259】 $\int_{(0,1)}^{(3, - 1)}x\mathrm{d}x + y\mathrm{d}y.$
solution:
解 显然， $x\mathrm{d}x + y\mathrm{d}y = \mathrm{d}\left(\frac{x^2 + y^2}{2}\right)$ 是全微分。于是，

$$
\int_ {(0, 1)} ^ {(3, - 4)} x \mathrm {d} x + y \mathrm {d} y = \int_ {(0, 1)} ^ {(3, - 4)} \mathrm {d} \left(\frac {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}}{2}\right) = \frac {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}}{2} \Bigg | _ {(0, 1)} ^ {(3, - 4)} = 1 2.
$$

question: 【4276】 $\mathrm{d}z = \frac{\partial^{n + m + 1}}{\partial x^{n + 2}\partial y^{m - 1}}\left(\ln \frac{1}{r}\right)\mathrm{d}x - \frac{\partial^{n + m + 1}}{\partial x^{n - 1}\partial y^{m + 2}}\left(\ln \frac{1}{r}\right)\mathrm{d}y$ ，其中 $r = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}$
solution:
易知（当 $(x,y)\neq (0,0)$ 时）

$$
\begin{array}{l} \frac {\partial}{\partial x} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) = - \frac {x}{r ^ {2}}, \quad \frac {\partial}{\partial y} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) = - \frac {y}{r ^ {2}}, \\ \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial x ^ {2}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) = - \frac {r ^ {2} - 2 x ^ {2}}{r ^ {4}}, \quad \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial y ^ {2}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) = - \frac {r ^ {2} - 2 y ^ {2}}{r ^ {4}}, \\ \end{array}
$$

故（当 $(x,y)\neq (0,0)$ 时）

$$
\frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial x ^ {2}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) + \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial y ^ {2}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) = 0. \tag {1}
$$

令 $P = \frac{\partial^{n + m + 1}}{\partial x^{n + 2}\partial y^{m - 1}}\left(\ln \frac{1}{r}\right), Q = -\frac{\partial^{n + m + 1}}{\partial x^{n - 1}\partial y^{m + 2}}\left(\ln \frac{1}{r}\right),$

则当 $(x,y)\neq (0,0)$ 时，由（1）式知

$$
\frac {\partial P}{\partial y} - \frac {\partial Q}{\partial x} = \frac {\partial^ {n + m}}{\partial x ^ {n} \partial y ^ {m}} \left[ \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial x ^ {2}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) + \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial y ^ {2}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) \right] = 0.
$$

因此，在任何不含原点 (0,0) 的单连通域中， $P\mathrm{d}x + Q\mathrm{d}y$ 都是某函数 $\textbf{z}$ 的全微分，并且对上半平面的点 $(x,y)$ （即 $y > 0$ )，可取

$$
\begin{array}{l} z (x, y) = \int_ {0} ^ {x} P (x, y) d x + \int_ {1} ^ {y} Q (0, y) d y + C \\ = \int_ {0} ^ {x} \frac {\partial^ {n + m - 1}}{\partial x ^ {n + 2} \partial y ^ {m - 1}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) d x - \int_ {1} ^ {y} \left[ \frac {\partial^ {n + m + 1}}{\partial x ^ {n - 1} \partial y ^ {m + 2}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) \right] \Bigg | _ {x = 0} d y + C \\ = \frac {\partial^ {n + m}}{\partial x ^ {n + 1} \partial y ^ {m - 1}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) - \left[ \frac {\partial^ {n + m}}{\partial x ^ {n + 1} \partial y ^ {m - 1}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) \right] \Bigg | _ {r = 0} - \left[ \frac {\partial^ {n + m}}{\partial x ^ {n - 1} \partial y ^ {m + 1}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) \right] \Bigg | _ {x = 0} \\ + \left[ \frac {\partial^ {n + m}}{\partial x ^ {n - 1} \partial y ^ {n + 1}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) \right] \Bigg | _ {\substack {x = 0 \\ y = 1}} + C \\ = \frac {\partial^ {n + m - 1}}{\partial x ^ {n} \partial y ^ {m - 1}} \left(\frac {\partial}{\partial x} \ln \frac {1}{r}\right) - \frac {\partial^ {n + m - 2}}{\partial x ^ {n - 1} \partial y ^ {m - 1}} \left[ \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial x ^ {2}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) + \frac {\partial^ {2}}{\partial y ^ {2}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) \right] \Bigg | _ {r = 0} + C _ {1} \\ = \frac {\partial^ {n + m - 1}}{\partial x ^ {n} \partial y ^ {m - 1}} \left(- \frac {x}{r ^ {2}}\right) + C _ {1} = \frac {\partial^ {n + m - 1}}{\partial x ^ {n} \partial y ^ {m - 1}} \left(\frac {\partial}{\partial y} \arctan \frac {x}{y}\right) + C _ {1} = \frac {\partial^ {n + m}}{\partial x ^ {n} \partial y ^ {m}} \left(\arctan \frac {x}{y}\right) + C _ {1}, \\ \end{array}
$$

其中 $C_1 = \left[\frac{\partial^{n + m}}{\partial x^{n - 1}\partial y^{m + 1}}\left(\ln \frac{1}{r}\right)\right]\Big|_{\substack{x = 0\\ y = 1}} + C$ 是任意常数。

同理，对下半平面上的点 $(x,y)$ （即 $y < 0$ ），可取

$$
z (x, y) = \int_ {0} ^ {x} P (x, y) d x + \int_ {- 1} ^ {y} Q (0, y) d y + C.
$$

经过和前面完全类似的计算，可得 $z(x,y) = \frac{\partial^{n + m}}{\partial x^n\partial y^m}\left(\arctan \frac{x}{y}\right) + C_2$

其中

$$
C _ {2} = \left[ \frac {\partial^ {n + m}}{\partial x ^ {n - 1} \partial y ^ {m + 1}} \left(\ln \frac {1}{r}\right) \right] \Big | _ {\substack {r = 0 \\ y = -1}} + C
$$

也是任意常数。

question: 【4300】 $\oint_{C} e^{x}[(1 - \cos y) \mathrm{d}x - (y - \sin y) \mathrm{d}y]$ ，其中 $C$ 为区域 $0 < x < \pi, 0 < y < \sin x$ 的边界，并且积分时的围绕方向为正.
solution:
解 由于 $\frac{\partial Q}{\partial x} - \frac{\partial P}{\partial y} = \mathrm{e}^{x} (\sin y - y) - \mathrm{e}^{x} \sin y = -y \mathrm{e}^{x},$

故有 $\oint_{C} \mathrm{e}^{x}[(1 - \cos y) \mathrm{d}x - (y - \sin y) \mathrm{d}y] = -\iint_{\substack{0 \leqslant x \leqslant \pi \\ 0 \leqslant y \leqslant \sin x}} y \mathrm{e}^{x} \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y = -\int_{0}^{\pi} \mathrm{e}^{x} \mathrm{d}x \int_{0}^{\sin x} y \mathrm{d}y$

$$
\begin{array}{l} = - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \mathrm {e} ^ {x} \sin^ {2} x \mathrm {d} x = - \frac {1}{4} \left(\int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \mathrm {e} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x - \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \mathrm {e} ^ {x} \cos 2 x \mathrm {d} x\right) \\ = - \frac {1}{4} \left[ \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {\pi} - 1\right) - \frac {\cos 2 x + 2 \sin 2 x}{5} \mathrm {e} ^ {x} \right] _ {0} ^ {\pi} = - \frac {1}{5} \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {\pi} - 1\right). \\ \end{array}
$$

question:
求原函数 z，设：

【4271】 $\mathrm{dz} = (x^{2} + 2xy - y^{2})\mathrm{dx} + (x^{2} + 2xy - y^{2})\mathrm{dy}.$

【4282】 $\int_{C}y^{2}\mathrm{d}x + z^{2}\mathrm{d}y + x^{2}\mathrm{d}z$ ，式中 $C$ 为维维亚尼曲线 $x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2} = a^{2},x^{2} + y^{2} = ax(z\geqslant 0,a > 0)$

若从 $Ox$ 轴的正向 $(x > 0)$ 看去，沿逆时针方向为正
solution:
解 柱面 $x^{2} + y^{2} = ax$ 可变为 $\left(x - \frac{a}{2}\right)^{2} + y^{2} = \left(\frac{a}{2}\right)^{2},$

故若令 $x - \frac{a}{2} = \frac{a}{2}\cos t, y = \frac{a}{2}\sin t (0 \leqslant t \leqslant 2\pi)$ ，则

$$
z = \sqrt {a ^ {2} - (x ^ {2} + y ^ {2})} = \sqrt {a ^ {2} - \left[ \frac {a ^ {2} (1 + \cos t) ^ {2}}{4} + \frac {a ^ {2} \sin^ {2} t}{4} \right]} = a \sin \frac {t}{2}.
$$

从而，曲线的参数方程为 $x = \frac{a(1 + \cos t)}{2}, y = \frac{a\sin t}{2}, z = a\sin \frac{t}{2} (0 \leqslant t \leqslant 2\pi).$

于是， $\int_{C}y^{2}\mathrm{d}x + z^{2}\mathrm{d}y + x^{2}\mathrm{d}z = \int_{0}^{2\pi}\left(-\frac{a^{3}\sin^{3}t}{8} +\frac{a^{3}\sin^{2}\frac{t}{2}\cos t}{2} +\frac{a^{3}\cos^{3}\frac{t}{2}}{2}\right)\mathrm{d}t$

$$
\begin{array}{l} = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \frac {a ^ {3}}{8} (1 - \cos^ {2} t) d (\cos t) + \frac {a ^ {3}}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \frac {1 - \cos t}{2} \cos t d t + a ^ {3} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \left(1 - \sin^ {2} \frac {t}{2}\right) d \left(\sin \frac {t}{2}\right) \\ = \frac {a ^ {3}}{8} \left(\cos t - \frac {1}{3} \cos^ {3} t\right) \left| _ {0} ^ {2 \pi} + \frac {a ^ {3}}{4} \left[ \sin t - \left(\frac {t}{2} + \frac {1}{4} \sin 2 t\right) \right] \right| _ {0} ^ {2 \pi} + a ^ {3} \left(\sin \frac {t}{2} - \frac {1}{3} \sin^ {3} \frac {t}{2}\right) \left| _ {0} ^ {2 \pi} = - \frac {\pi a ^ {3}}{4}. \right. \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【4295】当单位质量从点 $M_{1}(x_{1},y_{1},z_{1})$ 移动到点 $M_2(x_2,y_2,z_2)$ 时，求引力 $F = \frac{G}{r^2}$（其中 $r = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2 + z^2}$）对它所作的功，其中 $G$ 是引力常量.
solution:
解引力指向坐标原点，故它的方向余弦为

$$
\cos a = - \frac {x}{r}, \quad \cos \beta = - \frac {y}{r}, \quad \cos \gamma = - \frac {z}{r},
$$

而引力的投影为 $X = -\frac{Gx}{r^3}, \quad Y = -\frac{Gy}{r^3}, \quad Z = -\frac{Gz}{r^3}.$

于是，引力所作的功为

$$
\begin{array}{l} A = - G \int_ {\left(x _ {1}, y _ {1}, z _ {1}\right)} ^ {\left(x _ {2}, y _ {2}, z _ {2}\right)} \frac {x d x + y d y + z d z}{r ^ {3}} = - \frac {G}{2} \int_ {\left(x _ {1}, y _ {1}, z _ {1}\right)} ^ {\left(x _ {2}, y _ {2}, z _ {2}\right)} \frac {d \left(x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}\right)}{\left(x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}\right) ^ {\frac {3}{2}}} = \frac {G}{\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}} \Bigg | _ {\left(x _ {1}, y _ {1}, z _ {1}\right)} ^ {\left(x _ {2}, y _ {2}, z _ {2}\right)} \\ = k \left(\frac {1}{x _ {2} ^ {2} + y _ {2} ^ {2} + z _ {2} ^ {2}} - \frac {1}{x _ {1} ^ {2} + y _ {1} ^ {2} + z _ {1} ^ {2}}\right). \\ \end{array}
$$

当然，这里假设从 $M_{1}$ 点到 $M_{2}$ 点的路径是不经过原点的，上式表明功与路径无关，仅决定于起始点的坐标.

question:
【4289】 $\int_{(x_1,y_1,z_1)}^{(r_2,y_2,z_2)}f(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2 + z^2})(xdx + ydy + zdz),$ 

式中 $f$ 为连续函数.
solution:
解题思路 令 $F(x,y,z) = \frac{1}{2}\int_{0}^{x^2 +y^2 +z^2}f(\sqrt{v})\mathrm{d}v.$ 注意

$$
F _ {r} ^ {\prime} (x, y, z) = x f \left(\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}\right), F _ {y} ^ {\prime} (x, y, z) = y f \left(\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}\right), F _ {z} ^ {\prime} (x, y, z) = z f \left(\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}\right),
$$

及 $\mathrm{d}F(x,y,z) = f(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2 + z^2})(x\mathrm{d}x + y\mathrm{d}y + z\mathrm{d}z),$

再令 $\sqrt{v} = u$ ，即可得结果 $\int \frac{\sqrt{x_2^2 - y_2^2 - z_2^2}}{\sqrt{x_1^2 + y_1^2 + z_1^2}} u f(u) \, \mathrm{d}u.$

解 令 $F(x, y, z) = \frac{1}{2} \int_{0}^{x^2 + y^2 + z^2} f(\sqrt{v}) \, \mathrm{d}v$ . 由于 $f$ 是连续函数，故

$$
F _ {x} ^ {\prime} (x, y, z) = x f \left(\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}\right), F _ {y} ^ {\prime} (x, y, z) = y f \left(\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}\right), F _ {z} ^ {\prime} (x, y, z) = z f \left(\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}\right),
$$

并且这些偏导数都是连续的。因此，$F(x, y, z)$ 可微，且

$$
\mathrm {d} F (x, y, z) = F _ {x} ^ {\prime} (x, y, z) \mathrm {d} x + F _ {y} ^ {\prime} (x, y, z) \mathrm {d} y + F _ {z} ^ {\prime} (x, y, z) \mathrm {d} z = f (\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}) (x \mathrm {d} x + y \mathrm {d} y + z \mathrm {d} z).
$$

于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int_ {\left(x _ {1}, y _ {1}, z _ {1}\right)} ^ {\left(x _ {2}, y _ {2}, z _ {2}\right)} f \left(\sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}\right) \left(x d x + y d y + z d z\right) = F \left(x _ {2}, y _ {2}, z _ {2}\right) - F \left(x _ {1}, y _ {1}, z _ {1}\right) = \frac {1}{2} \int_ {x _ {1} ^ {2} + y _ {1} ^ {2} + z _ {1} ^ {2}} ^ {x _ {2} ^ {2} + y _ {2} ^ {2} + z _ {2} ^ {2}} f (\sqrt {v}) d v ^ {*}) \\ = \int_ {\sqrt {x _ {1} ^ {2} - y _ {1} ^ {2} - z _ {1} ^ {2}}} ^ {\sqrt {x _ {2} ^ {2} + y _ {2} ^ {2} + z _ {2} ^ {2}}} u f (u) d u, \\ \end{array}
$$

*) 这里已作代换 $\sqrt{v} = u$ （ $v = u^2$ ， $\mathrm{d}v = 2u\mathrm{d}u)$

question:
在参数增加的方向，沿所指示的曲线来计算下列第二型曲线积分：

【4250】 $\int_{C} (x^{2} - 2xy) \, \mathrm{d}x + (y^{2} - 2xy) \, \mathrm{d}y$ ，其中 $C$ 为抛物线 $y = x^{2} (-1 \leqslant x \leqslant 1)$ .
solution:
解 由题设 $y = x^2$ ，从而， $\mathrm{dy} = 2x\mathrm{dx}$ 于是，

$$
\int_ {c} (x ^ {2} - 2 x y) \mathrm {d} x + (y ^ {2} - 2 x y) \mathrm {d} y = \int_ {1} ^ {1} \left[ \left(x ^ {2} - 2 x ^ {3}\right) + 2 x \left(x ^ {4} - 2 x ^ {3}\right) \right] \mathrm {d} x = - \frac {1 4}{1 5}.
$$

question: 【4310】抛物线 $(x + y)^2 = ax(a > 0)$ 和轴 $Ox$
solution:
解题思路 令 $y = tx$，即得曲线的参数方程为

$$
x = \frac {a}{(1 + t) ^ {2}}, \quad y = \frac {a t}{(1 + t) ^ {2}} \quad (0 \leqslant t <   + \infty).
$$

它与 $\mathcal{O}x$ 轴的交点为 $(a,0)$ 及 $(0,0)$ .

注意在 $Ox$ 轴上从点 $(0,0)$ 到点 $(a,0)$ 的一段上，有 $x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}x = 0$；而在抛物线这一段上，则有

$$
x \mathrm {d} y - y \mathrm {d} x = \frac {a ^ {2}}{(1 + t) ^ {4}} \mathrm {d} t (0 \leqslant t \leqslant + \infty),
$$

从而，问题易获解.

解 作代换 $y = tx$，则原方程化为 $x^{2}(1 + t)^{2} = ax$。从而，曲线的参数方程为

$$
x = \frac {a}{(1 + t) ^ {2}}, \quad y = \frac {a t}{(1 + t) ^ {2}} \quad (0 \leqslant t <   + \infty).
$$

它与 $Ox$ 轴的交点为 $(a,0)$ 与 $(0,0)$ . 在 $Ox$ 轴上从点 $(0,0)$ 到点 $(a,0)$ 的一段上，有

$$
x \mathrm {d} y - y \mathrm {d} x = 0.
$$

在抛物线上，有 $x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}dx = \frac{a^2}{(1 + t)^4}\mathrm{d}t.$

于是，面积为 $S = \frac{1}{2}\oint_{C}x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}x = \frac{a^2}{2}\int_{0}^{+\infty}\frac{\mathrm{d}t}{(1 + t)^4} = -\frac{a^2}{6}\left.\frac{1}{(1 + t)^3}\right|_{0}^{+\infty} = \frac{a^2}{6}.$

question: 【4312】双纽线 $(x^{2} + y^{2})^{2} = a^{2}(x^{2} - y^{2}).$
solution:
解题思路 利用极坐标 $x = r\cos \varphi, y = r\sin \varphi$ ，得双纽线的方程为 $r^2 = a^2\cos 2\varphi$ ，故有

$$
x = a \cos \varphi \sqrt {\cos 2 \varphi}, \quad y = a \sin \varphi \sqrt {\cos 2 \varphi}.
$$

及在曲线上， $x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}x = a^{2}\cos 2\varphi \mathrm{d}\varphi$ 在 $Ox$ 轴上， $x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}x = 0$

注意，对应于 $\frac{1}{4}$ 的面积（第一象限内）部分有 $0 \leqslant \varphi \leqslant \frac{\pi}{4}$ . 从而，问题易获解.

解 考虑到对称性，只需求曲线所围的区域的 $\frac{1}{4}$ 面积 (位于第一象限). 利用极坐标 $x = r\cos \varphi$ , $y = r\sin \varphi$ , 得双纽线的方程为 $r^2 = a^2\cos 2\varphi$ , 故

$$
x = a \cos \varphi \sqrt {\cos 2 \varphi}, \quad y = a \sin \varphi \sqrt {\cos 2 \varphi}.
$$

从而，在曲线上 $x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}x = a^2\cos 2\varphi \mathrm{d}\varphi$ ；在 $Ox$ 轴上， $x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}x = 0$ ，且 $0 \leqslant \varphi \leqslant \frac {\pi}{2}$ ，于是，面积为

$$
S = 4 \frac {1}{2} \oint_ {C} x d y - y d x = 2 \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{4}} a ^ {2} \cos 2 \varphi d \varphi = a ^ {2}.
$$

question:
【4303】计算曲线积分 $\int_{A_m(0)} (\mathrm{e}^x \sin y - my) \, \mathrm{d}x + (\mathrm{e}^x \cos y - m) \, \mathrm{d}y,$

其中 $AmO$ 为由点 $A(a,0)$ 至点 $O(0,0)$ 的上半圆周 $x^{2} + y^{2} = ax$ .

提示 在 $Ox$ 轴上连接点 $O(0,0)$ 与点 $A(a,0)$ , 这样，便构成封闭的半圆形 $AmOA$ , 利用格林公式即易获解.
solution:
解在 $Ox$ 轴上连接点 $O(0,0)$ 与点 $A(a,0)$ ，这样，便构成封闭的半圆形 AmOA，且在线段 OA 上，

$$
\int_ {\Omega A} \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {x} \sin y - m y\right) \mathrm {d} x + \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {x} \cos y - m\right) \mathrm {d} y = 0.
$$

从而， $\oint_{AmOA} = \int_{AmO} + \int_{OA} = \int_{AmO}$ .另一方面，利用格林公式可得

$$
\oint_ {A m O A} \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {x} \sin y - m y\right) \mathrm {d} x + \left(\mathrm {e} ^ {x} \cos y - m\right) \mathrm {d} y = \iint_ {r ^ {2} + y ^ {2} \leqslant a x} m \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y = \frac {\pi m a ^ {2}}{8}.
$$

于是， $\int_{A\cap O}(\mathrm{e}^x\sin y - my)\mathrm{d}x + (\mathrm{e}^x\cos y - m)\mathrm{d}y = \frac{\pi ma^2}{8}.$

question: 【4320】计算圆柱面 $x^{2} + y^{2} = ax$ 被曲面 $x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2} = a^{2}$ 所截那部分的面积.
solution:
解两曲面的交线为 $x^{2} + y^{2} = ax,\quad z^{2} = a^{2} - ax.$

若将平面 $Oxy$ 上的圆周 $x^{2} + y^{2} = ax$ 记以 $C$，其弧长记以 $s$，则所求的面积显然可表为

$$
S = 2 \oint_ {C} \sqrt {a ^ {2} - a x} d s.
$$

图 8.65

由于 $x^{2} + y^{2} = ax$ 即为 $\left(x - \frac{a}{2}\right) + y^{2} = \left(\frac{a}{2}\right)^{2}$，故令

$$
x = \frac {a}{2} + \frac {a}{2} \cos \varphi , \quad y = \frac {a}{2} \sin \varphi ,
$$

从而，弧长的微分为 $\mathrm{ds} = \frac{a}{2}\mathrm{d}\varphi$ 于是，面积为

$$
S = 2 \oint_ {C} \sqrt {a ^ {2} - a x} d s = 2 \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \sqrt {\frac {a}{2} (1 - \cos \varphi)} \cdot \frac {a}{2} d \varphi = 2 \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} a ^ {2} \sin \frac {\varphi}{2} d \left(\frac {\varphi}{2}\right) = 4 a ^ {2}.
$$

question: 【4319】一个半径为 $r$ 的圆周沿半径为 $R$ 的固定圆周内部滚动而无滑动，动圆周上的一点所描绘的曲线称为内摆线.假定比值 $\frac{R}{r} = n$ 是整数 $(n\geqslant 2)$ ，求内摆线所围的面积.研究特殊情况 $r = \frac{R}{4}$ （星形线）.
solution:
解仿上题，容易求得内摆线的参数方程为

$$
x = R \left(1 - \frac {1}{n}\right) \cos \frac {t}{n} + \frac {R}{n} \cos \left(1 - \frac {1}{n}\right) t. \quad y = R \left(1 - \frac {1}{n}\right) \sin \frac {t}{n} - \frac {R}{n} \sin \left(1 - \frac {1}{n}\right) t.
$$

若以 $\varphi = \frac{t}{n}$ 为参数，并注意到 $R = nr$ ，则得

$$
x = (n - 1) r \cos \varphi + r \cos (n - 1) \varphi , \quad y = (n - 1) r \sin \varphi - r \sin (n - 1) \varphi .
$$

注意到 $x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}x = r^2 (n - 1)(n - 2)(1 - \cos n\varphi)\mathrm{d}\varphi ,$

于是，所求的面积为 $S = \frac{1}{2}\oint_{c}x\mathrm{d}y - y\mathrm{d}x = \frac{r^2(n - 1)(n - 2)}{2}\int_{0}^{2\pi}(1 - \cos n\varphi)\mathrm{d}\varphi = \pi r^2 (n - 1)(n - 2).$

特别是，当 $\frac{R}{r} = 4$ 时，即 $n = 4$ ，则得星形线所围的面积为 $S = 6\pi r^2$

question:
【4323】证明：若 $C$ 为封闭围线， $\pmb{l}$ 为任意的方向，则有

$$
\oint_ {C} \cos (l, n) d s = 0,
$$

式中 $n$ 为围线 $C$ 的外法向量.
solution:
证 如图 8.66 所示。不妨规定 $C$ 的方向为逆时针的，以 $\pmb{t}$ 表示。由于夹角

$$
(l, n) = (l, x) - (n, x),
$$

故得 $\cos (l, n) = \cos (l, x) \cos (n, x) + \sin (l, x) \sin (n, x)$ .

但是， $\sin (n,x) = \sin \left[(t,x) - \frac{\pi}{2}\right] = -\cos (t,x),$

$$
\cos (n, x) = \cos \left[ (t, x) - \frac {\pi}{2} \right] = \sin (t, x),
$$

且 $\cos (t,x) = \frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\mathrm{d}s},\quad \sin (t,x) = \frac{\mathrm{d}y}{\mathrm{d}s}$ ，因此，有

$$
\cos (l, n) d s = \cos (l, x) d y - \sin (l, x) d x.
$$

再利用格林公式，并注意到 $\sin (l,x)$ 和 $\cos (l,x)$ 均为常数，即得

$$
\oint_ {c} \cos (l, n) d s = \oint_ {c} \left[ - \sin (l, x) d x + \cos (l, x) \right] d y = \iint_ {S} 0 d x d y = 0.
$$

question:
【4328】采用极坐标 $\rho$ 和 $\varphi$ ，计算单层的对数势

$$
I _ {1} = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m \psi \mathrm {l n} \frac {1}{r} \mathrm {d} \psi \quad \text {和} \quad I _ {2} = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \sin m \psi \mathrm {l n} \frac {1}{r} \mathrm {d} \psi ,
$$

式中 $r$ 为点 $(\rho, \varphi)$ 与动点 $(1, \psi)$ 间的距离，$m$ 为正整数。
answer:
综上所述，得 $I_{1} = \frac{\pi}{m}\rho^{m}\cos m\varphi ,\qquad I_{2} = \frac{\pi}{m}\rho^{m}\sin m\varphi ,\quad 0\leqslant \rho \leqslant 1;$

$$
I _ {1} = \frac {\pi}{m} \rho^ {- m} \cos m \varphi , \quad I _ {2} = \frac {\pi}{m} \rho^ {- m} \sin m \varphi , \quad \rho > 1.
$$
solution:
解由于

$$
r = \sqrt {(\rho \cos \varphi - \cos \psi) ^ {2} + (\rho \sin \varphi - \sin \psi) ^ {2}} = \sqrt {1 - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi) + \rho^ {2}},
$$

于是，当 $\rho < 1$ 时，我们有

$$
\begin{array}{l} I _ {1} = - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \cos m \psi \ln [ 1 - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi) + \rho^ {2} ] d \psi = - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {- \varphi} ^ {- \varphi + 2 \pi} \cos (m u + m \varphi) \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u \\ = - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {- \varphi} ^ {- \varphi + 2 \pi} \cos m \varphi \cos m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u + \frac {1}{2} \int_ {- \varphi} ^ {- \varphi + 2 \pi} \sin m \varphi \sin m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u. \\ \end{array}
$$

因为上述右端两个积分中被积函数均为以 $2\pi$ 为周期的函数，并注意到奇偶函数在对称区间上的积分性质，则有

$$
\begin{array}{l} I _ {1} = - \cos m \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \cos m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u + \frac {\sin m \varphi}{2} \int_ {- \pi} ^ {\pi} \sin m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u \\ = - \cos m \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \cos m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u = - (\cos m \varphi) \left(- \frac {\pi}{m} \rho^ {m}\right) = \frac {\pi}{m} \rho^ {m} \cos m \varphi^ {*}. \\ \end{array}
$$

同理，我们有

$$
\begin{array}{l} I _ {2} = - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \sin m \psi \ln [ 1 - 2 \rho \cos (\psi - \varphi) + \rho^ {2} ] d \psi = - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {- \varphi} ^ {- \varphi + 2 \pi} \sin (m u + m \varphi) \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u \\ = - \frac {\cos m \varphi}{2} \int_ {- \pi} ^ {\pi} \sin m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u - \sin m \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \cos m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u \\ = - \sin m \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \cos m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u = - (\sin m \varphi) \left(- \frac {\pi}{m} \rho^ {m}\right) = \frac {\pi}{m} \rho^ {m} \sin m \varphi . \\ \end{array}
$$

当 $\rho > 1$ 时，则有

$$
\begin{array}{l} I _ {1} = - \cos m \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \cos m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u = - \cos m \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \cos m u \ln \rho^ {2} \left(1 - 2 \frac {1}{\rho} \cos u + \frac {1}{\rho^ {2}}\right) d u \\ = - \cos m \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \cos m u \ln \left(1 - 2 \frac {1}{\rho} \cos u + \frac {1}{\rho^ {2}}\right) d u = - (\cos m \varphi) \left(- \frac {\pi}{m \rho^ {m}}\right) = \frac {\pi}{m} \rho^ {- m} \cos m \varphi^ {* *} \\ \end{array}
$$

同理，我们有 $I_{2} = -\sin m\varphi \int_{0}^{\pi}\cos m\mathrm{u}\ln \left(1 - 2\frac{1}{\rho}\cos u + \frac{1}{\rho^{2}}\right)\mathrm{d}u = -(\sin m\varphi)\left(-\frac{\pi}{m\rho^{m}}\right) = \frac{\pi}{m}\rho^{-m}\sin m\varphi .$

对于 $\rho = 0$，显然有 $I_{1} = I_{2} = 0.$

现在来研究当 $\rho = 1$ 的情况。首先，积分

$$
I _ {1} = \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \cos m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u
$$

对于 $\rho$ 在区间 $[1, 1 + \delta]$ 上是一致收敛的，其中 $\delta$ 为很小的正数。事实上，对于充分小的 $\eta$，当 $u$ 在 $(0, \eta)$ 内取值时，有

$$
1 > 1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2} = (1 - \rho) ^ {2} + 2 \rho (1 - \cos u) \geqslant 2 (1 - \cos u) > 0.
$$

于是，当 $1 \leqslant \rho \leqslant 1 + \delta, u \in (0, \eta)$ 时，有

$$
| \cos m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) | \leqslant | \ln 2 (1 - \cos u) |.
$$

而积分 $\int_{0}^{\eta}|\ln 2(1 - \cos u)|\mathrm{d}u$ 是收敛的。这是由于当 $0 <   2\beta <  1$，有

$$
\lim  _ {u \rightarrow + \infty} u ^ {2 \beta} | \ln 2 (1 - \cos u) | = \lim  _ {u \rightarrow + \infty} - [ 2 (1 - \cos u) ] ^ {\beta} \ln [ 2 (1 - \cos u) ] \frac {u ^ {2 \beta}}{2 ^ {\beta} (1 - \cos u) ^ {\beta}} = 0 \cdot 1 = 0.
$$

于是，积分 $\int_0^\eta \cos m u \ln (1 - 2\rho \cos u + \rho^2) \, \mathrm{d}u$

在 $1 \leqslant \rho \leqslant 1 + \delta$ 上一致收敛，故知积分

$$
I _ {1} = \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \cos m u \ln (1 - 2 \rho \cos u + \rho^ {2}) d u
$$

在 $1 \leqslant \rho \leqslant 1 + \delta$ 上一致收敛，从而，$I_{1}$ 作为参数 $\rho = 1$ 的函数在 $\rho = 1$ 是右连续的。由此，根据上面已求出 $\rho > 1$ 时 $I_{1} = \frac{\pi}{m} \rho^{-m} \cos m\varphi$ , 得知：当 $\rho = 1$ 时，

$$
I _ {1} = \lim  _ {\rho \rightarrow 1 + 0} \frac {\pi}{m} \rho^ {- m} \cos m \varphi = \frac {\pi}{m} \cos m \varphi .
$$

同理，可得 $I_{2} = \lim_{\rho \to 1 + 0}\frac{\pi}{m}\rho^{-m}\sin m\varphi = \frac{\pi}{m}\sin m\varphi .$

\*）参看 H.M.雷日克、H.C.格拉德什坦编著的“函数表与积分表"3.765 公式 1.

$\star \star$）根据上面公式，当 $p^2 >1$ 时，有

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \ln (1 - 2 p \cos x + p ^ {2}) \cos \alpha x d x = \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \ln p ^ {2} \left(1 - 2 \frac {1}{p} \cos x + \frac {1}{p ^ {2}}\right) \cos \alpha x d x \\ = \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} 2 \ln p \cdot \cos \alpha x d x + \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \ln \left(1 - 2 \frac {1}{p} \cos x + \frac {1}{p ^ {2}}\right) \cos \alpha x d x \\ = \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} \ln \left(1 - 2 \frac {1}{p} \cos x + \frac {1}{p ^ {2}}\right) \cos \alpha x d x = - \frac {\pi}{\alpha} p ^ {- \alpha}, \\ \end{array}
$$

其中 $\alpha$ 为正整数.

question: 【4339】设 $u = u(x,y)$ 和 $v = v(x,y)$ 为定常流的速度分量，$C$ 为区域 $S$ 的边界，求区域 $S$ 内流体质量的变化率。若流体是不可压缩的，且在区域 $S$ 内没有源和汇，则函数 $u$ 和 $v$ 满足怎样的方程？
solution:
解设流体的速度为 $\pmb{w}$，则 $w = u i + v j$，又 $\mathrm{ds} = \mathrm{dx} + \mathrm{dy}j.$ 于是，流体量为

$$
Q = \oint_ {C} w \cdot n d s = \oint_ {C} [ u \cos (n, x) + v \sin (n, x) ] d s = \oint_ {C} u d y - v d x ^ {*}) = \iint_ {S} \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial x} + \frac {\partial v}{\partial y}\right) d x d y,
$$

其中 $\pmb{n}$ 表示曲线 $C$ 的外法线上的单位矢量，并且此处已假定流体的面密度等于 1.若流体是不可压缩的，且在区域 $S$ 内没有源和汇，则流体的流出量与流入量的差 $Q$ 应等于零，即

$$
\iint_ {S} \left(\frac {\partial u}{\partial x} + \frac {\partial v}{\partial y}\right) d x d y = 0.
$$

又显然，对于任意的围线 $C$，上述结果均正确。于是，连续函数 $u,v$ 应满足方程：

$$
\frac {\partial u}{\partial x} + \frac {\partial v}{\partial y} = 0.
$$

question: 【4343】$\iint_{S} (x + y + z) \, \mathrm{d}S$，式中 $S$ 为曲面 $x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = a^2, z \geqslant 0$ .
solution:
解 由于

$$
\sqrt {1 + \left(\frac {\partial z}{\partial x}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial z}{\partial y}\right) ^ {2}} = \sqrt {1 + \frac {x ^ {2}}{z ^ {2}} + \frac {y ^ {2}}{z ^ {2}}} = \frac {a}{\sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2} - y ^ {2}}},
$$

故有

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S} (x + y + z) \mathrm {d} S = \int_ {- a} ^ {a} \mathrm {d} x \int_ {- \sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2}}} ^ {\sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2}}} \frac {a}{\sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2} - y ^ {2}}} (x + y + \sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2} - y ^ {2}}) \mathrm {d} y \\ = \int_ {- a} ^ {a} (\pi a x + 2 a \sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2}}) d x = 4 a \int_ {0} ^ {a} \sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2}} d x = 4 a \frac {\pi a ^ {2}}{4} = \pi a ^ {3}. \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【4338】证明黎曼公式： $\iint_{S}\left| \begin{array}{cc}L[u] & M[v]\\ u & v \end{array} \right|\mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y = \oint_{C}P\mathrm{d}x + Q\mathrm{d}y,$ 式中 $L[u] = \frac{\partial^2u}{\partial x\partial y} +a\frac{\partial u}{\partial x} +b\frac{\partial u}{\partial y} +cu,\quad M[v] = \frac{\partial^2v}{\partial x\partial y} -a\frac{\partial v}{\partial x} -b\frac{\partial v}{\partial y} +cv,$ $(a,b,c$ 为常数）， $P$ 和 $Q$ 为某些确定的函数，围线 $C$ 是有界区域 $S$ 的边界.
answer: $P = u\frac{\partial v}{\partial x} - buv,\quad Q = v\frac{\partial u}{\partial y} + auv.$
solution:
证 因为

$$
\begin{array}{l} \left| \begin{array}{c c} L [ u ] & M [ v ] \\ u & v \end{array} \right| = v L [ u ] - u M [ v ] = v \frac {\partial^ {2} u}{\partial x \partial y} + a v \frac {\partial u}{\partial x} + b v \frac {\partial u}{\partial y} + c u v - u \frac {\partial^ {2} v}{\partial x \partial y} + a u \frac {\partial v}{\partial x} + b u \frac {\partial v}{\partial y} - c u v \\ = \frac {\partial}{\partial x} \left(v \frac {\partial u}{\partial y}\right) - \frac {\partial}{\partial y} \left(u \frac {\partial v}{\partial x}\right) + a \frac {\partial}{\partial x} (v u) + b \frac {\partial}{\partial y} (u v) = \frac {\partial}{\partial x} \left(v \frac {\partial u}{\partial y} + a u v\right) - \frac {\partial}{\partial y} \left(u \frac {\partial v}{\partial x} - b u v\right), \\ \end{array}
$$

故利用格林公式，即得

$$
\iint_ {S} \left| \begin{array}{c c} L [ u ] & M [ v ] \\ u & v \end{array} \right| d x d y = \oint_ {C} P d x + Q d y,
$$

其中 $P = u\frac{\partial v}{\partial x} - buv,$ $Q = v\frac{\partial u}{\partial y} + auv.$

question:
【4342】计算 $\iint_{S} z \, \mathrm{d}S,$

式中 $S$ 为曲面 $x^{2} + z^{2} = 2az(a > 0)$ 被曲面 $z = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}$ 所割下的部分.
solution:
解 作变换

$$
x = a r \sin \theta , \quad y = y, \quad z = a + a r \cos \theta ,
$$

则两曲面分别化为

$$
r = 1, \quad \text {和} \quad y ^ {2} = 2 a ^ {2} \cos \theta (1 + \cos \theta).
$$

两曲面交线的参数方程为

$$
x = a \sin \theta , \quad y = \pm \sqrt {2} a \sqrt {\cos \theta (1 + \cos \theta)}, \quad z = a + a \cos \theta \quad (- \frac {\pi}{2} \leqslant \theta \leqslant \frac {\pi}{2}).
$$

于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S} z \mathrm {d} S = \int_ {- \frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \mathrm {d} \theta \int_ {- \sqrt {2} a \sqrt {\cos \theta (1 + \cos \theta)}} ^ {\sqrt {2} a \sqrt {\cos \theta (1 - \cos \theta)}} (a + a \cos \theta) a \mathrm {d} y = \int_ {- \frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} 2 \sqrt {2} a ^ {3} \sqrt {\cos \theta} \sqrt {(1 + \cos \theta) ^ {3}} \mathrm {d} \theta \\ = - 4 \sqrt {2} a ^ {3} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \frac {\sqrt {\cos \theta} \sqrt {(1 + \cos \theta) ^ {3}}}{\sin \theta} d (\cos \theta) = - 4 \sqrt {2} a ^ {3} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \frac {\sqrt {\cos \theta} (1 + \cos \theta)}{\sqrt {(1 - \cos \theta)}} d (\cos \theta) \\ = 4 \sqrt {2} a ^ {3} \int_ {0} ^ {1} \left[ t ^ {\frac {1}{2}} (1 - t) ^ {\frac {1}{2}} + t ^ {\frac {3}{2}} (1 - t) ^ {- \frac {1}{2}} \right] d t = 4 \sqrt {2} a ^ {3} \left[ B \left(\frac {3}{2}, \frac {1}{2}\right) + B \left(\frac {5}{2}, \frac {1}{2}\right) \right] = \frac {7}{2} \sqrt {2} \pi a ^ {3}. \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【4346】$\iint_{S}|xyz|\mathrm{d}S$，式中 $s$ 为曲面 $z = x^{2} + y^{2}$ 被平面 $z = 1$ 所截下的部分.
solution:
解 由于 $\sqrt{1 + \left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2} = \sqrt{1 + 4(x^2 + y^2)}$

若利用极坐标，并注意到对称性，即得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S} | x y z | \mathrm {d} S = 4 \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \mathrm {d} \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {1} r ^ {4} \cos \varphi \sin \varphi \sqrt {1 + 4 r ^ {2}} r \mathrm {d} r = 2 \int_ {0} ^ {1} r ^ {5} \sqrt {1 + 4 r ^ {2}} \mathrm {d} r = \int_ {0} ^ {1} t ^ {2} \sqrt {1 + 4 t} \mathrm {d} t ^ {*}) \\ = \int_ {1} ^ {\sqrt {5}} \frac {1}{3 2} (y ^ {2} - 1) ^ {2} y ^ {2} d y ^ {* *} = \frac {1}{3 2} \left(\frac {y ^ {7}}{7} - \frac {2 y ^ {3}}{5} + \frac {y ^ {3}}{3}\right) \Bigg | _ {1} ^ {\sqrt {5}} = \frac {1 2 5 \sqrt {5} - 1}{4 2 0}. \\ \end{array}
$$

\*) 作代换 $r^2 = t$

$\star \star)$ 作代换 $\sqrt{1 + 4t} = y.$

question: 【4347】 $\iint_{S} \frac{\mathrm{d}S}{\rho}$ , 式中 $S$ 为椭球面，$\rho$ 为椭球中心到与椭球面微元 $\mathrm{d}S$ 相切的平面的距离.
solution:
解 设椭球面方程为 $\frac{x^2}{a^2} + \frac{y^2}{b^2} + \frac{z^2}{c^2} = 1,$

则曲面上任一点 $(x,y,z)$ 的法矢向为 $\left\{\frac{x}{a^2},\frac{y}{b^2},\frac{z}{c^2}\right\}$ . 从而，由题设知： $\rho = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2 + z^2} \cos (n,r)$ , 其中 $n,r$ 分别表示点 $(x,y,z)$ 处的法向量和径向量，即 $\rho = \frac{1}{\sqrt{\frac{x^2}{a^4} + \frac{y^2}{b^4} + \frac{z^2}{c^4}}}$ ,

而法线与 $Oz$ 轴夹角的余弦为 $\frac{\frac{z}{c^2}}{\sqrt{\frac{x^2}{a^4} + \frac{y^2}{b^4} + \frac{z^2}{c^4}}}$ .

于是， $\iint_{S} \frac{\mathrm{d}S}{\rho} = \iint_{\substack{\frac{x^2}{a^2} + \frac{y^2}{b^2} \leqslant 1 \\ \frac{x^2}{a^2} + \frac{y^2}{b^2} \leqslant 1}} \frac{c^2\left(\frac{x^2}{a^4} + \frac{y^2}{b^4} + \frac{z^2}{c^4}\right)}{|z|} \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y = 2 \iint_{\substack{\frac{x^2}{a^2} + \frac{y^2}{b^2} \leqslant 1 \\ \frac{x^2}{a^2} + \frac{y^2}{b^2} \leqslant 1}} \frac{c\left[\left(\frac{x^2}{a^4} + \frac{y^2}{b^4}\right) + \frac{1}{c^2}\left(1 - \frac{x^2}{a^2} - \frac{y^2}{b^2}\right)\right]}{\sqrt{1 - \left(\frac{x^2}{a^2} + \frac{y^2}{b^2}\right)}} \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y$

$$
\begin{array}{l} = 2 \int_ {0} ^ {1} \mathrm {d} r \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \frac {c}{\sqrt {1 - r ^ {2}}} \left(\frac {r ^ {2} \cos^ {2} \theta}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {r ^ {2} \sin^ {2} \theta}{b ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{c ^ {2}} - \frac {r ^ {2}}{c ^ {2}}\right) a b r \mathrm {d} \theta^ {*}) \\ = 2 \pi a b c \int_ {0} ^ {1} \left[ \frac {1}{\sqrt {1 - r ^ {2}}} \left(\frac {1}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{b ^ {2}}\right) - \sqrt {1 - r ^ {2}} \left(\frac {1}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{b ^ {2}}\right) + 2 \frac {\sqrt {1 - r ^ {2}}}{c ^ {2}} \right] r d r ^ {\dots} \\ = - \pi a b c \left[ 2 \sqrt {1 - r ^ {2}} \left(\frac {1}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{b ^ {2}}\right) - \frac {2}{3} (1 - r ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \left(\frac {1}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{b ^ {2}}\right) + \frac {4}{3 c ^ {2}} (1 - r ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \right] \Bigg | _ {0} ^ {1} \\ = \frac {4 \pi}{3} a b c \left(\frac {1}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{b ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{c ^ {2}}\right). \\ \end{array}
$$

*）作广义极坐标变换 $x = a r \cos \theta ,y = b r \sin \theta .$

$\star \star)$ 利用关系式： $\frac{r^2}{\sqrt{1 - r^2}} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{1 - r^2}} -\sqrt{1 - r^2}.$

question: 【4348】 $\iint_{S} z \mathrm{~d} S$ ，式中 $S$ 为螺旋面的一部分： $x = u \cos v, y = u \sin v, z = v (0 < u < a; 0 < v < 2\pi)$ .
solution:
解由于

$$
E = \left(\frac {\partial x}{\partial u}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial y}{\partial u}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial z}{\partial u}\right) ^ {2} = \cos^ {2} v + \sin^ {2} v = 1,
$$

$$
G = \left(\frac {\partial x}{\partial v}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial y}{\partial v}\right) ^ {2} + \left(\frac {\partial z}{\partial v}\right) ^ {2} = u ^ {2} \sin^ {2} v + u ^ {2} \cos^ {2} v + 1 = 1 + u ^ {2},
$$

$$
F = \frac {\partial x}{\partial u} \frac {\partial x}{\partial v} + \frac {\partial y}{\partial u} \frac {\partial y}{\partial v} + \frac {\partial z}{\partial u} \frac {\partial z}{\partial v} = - u \sin v \cos v + u \cos v \sin v = 0,
$$

故得 $\sqrt{EG - F^2} = \sqrt{1 + u^2}$ . 于是，

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S} z \mathrm {d} S = \int_ {0} ^ {a} \mathrm {d} u \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} v \sqrt {1 + u ^ {2}} \mathrm {d} v = 2 \pi^ {2} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \sqrt {1 + u ^ {2}} \mathrm {d} u = 2 \pi^ {2} \left[ \frac {u}{2} \sqrt {1 + u ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2} \ln (u + \sqrt {1 + u ^ {2}}) \right] \Bigg | _ {0} ^ {a} \\ = \pi^ {2} [ a \sqrt {1 + a ^ {2}} + \ln (a + \sqrt {1 + a ^ {2}}) ] \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【4349】 $\iint_{S} z^{2} \mathrm{~d} S$ ，式中 $S$ 为圆锥面的一部分： $x = r \cos \varphi \sin \alpha, y = r \sin \varphi \sin \alpha, z = r \cos \alpha (0 \leqslant r \leqslant a; 0 \leqslant \varphi \leqslant 2\pi)$ 和 $\alpha$ 为常数（ $0 < \alpha < \frac{\pi}{2}$ ）.
solution: 由于 $$ E = \cos^ {2} \varphi \sin^ {2} \alpha + \sin^ {2} \varphi \sin^ {2} \alpha + \cos^ {2} \alpha = 1, $$ $$ G = r ^ {2} \cos^ {2} \varphi \sin^ {2} \alpha + r ^ {2} \sin^ {2} \varphi \sin^ {2} \alpha = r ^ {2} \sin^ {2} \alpha , $$ $$ F = (\cos \varphi \sin \alpha) (- r \sin \varphi \sin \alpha) + \sin \varphi \sin \alpha (r \cos \varphi \sin \alpha) = 0, $$ 故得 $\sqrt{EG - F^2} = r\sin \alpha$ 于是， $\iint_{S}z^{2}\mathrm{d}S = \int_{0}^{2\pi}\mathrm{d}\varphi \int_{0}^{a}r^{2}\cos \alpha \cdot r\sin \alpha \mathrm{d}r = \frac{\pi a^{4}}{2}\sin \alpha \cos^{2}\alpha .$

question: 【4350】 $\iint_{S} (xy + yz + zx) \, \mathrm{d}S$ ，式中 $S$ 为圆锥面 $z = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}$ 被曲面 $x^2 + y^2 = 2ax$ 所割下的部分.
solution:
解 由于 $\sqrt{1 + \left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2} = \sqrt{1 + \frac{x^2}{x^2 + y^2} + \frac{y^2}{x^2 + y^2}} = \sqrt{2}.$

又曲面 $S$ 在平面 $Oxy$ 上的投影域为 $x^{2} + y^{2}\leqslant 2ax.$ 于是，利用极坐标，即得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S} (x y + y z + z x) d S = \sqrt {2} \int_ {- \frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} d \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {2 a \cos \varphi} [ r ^ {2} \cos \varphi \sin \varphi + r ^ {2} (\cos \varphi + \sin \varphi) ] r d r \\
= \sqrt {2} \int_ {- \frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \frac {1}{4} (2 a \cos \varphi) ^ {4} \cos \varphi d \varphi = 8 \sqrt {2} a ^ {4} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \cos^ {5} \varphi d \varphi = \frac {6 4}{1 5} \sqrt {2} a ^ {4}. \\
\end{array}
$$

question:
【4341】两个积分 $I_{1} = \iint_{S}(x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2})\mathrm{d}S$ 和 $I_{2} = \iint_{P}(x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2})\mathrm{d}P,$

（式中 $S$ 为球面 $x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2} = a^{2}, P$ 为其内接八面体的表面 $|x| + |y| + |z| = a$ ）相差若何？
solution:
解若令 $x = a\sin \varphi \cos \theta ,y = a\sin \varphi \sin \theta ,z = a\cos \varphi ,$

则有

$$
I _ {1} = \iint_ {S} (x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}) d S = \int_ {0} ^ {\pi} d \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} a ^ {2} \cdot a ^ {2} \sin \varphi d \theta = 4 \pi a ^ {4}.
$$

为求 $I_{2}$ ，只要注意到 $|z| = a - (|x| + |y|)$ ，并利用对称性，即得

$$
\begin{array}{l} I _ {2} = \iint_ {P} (x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + z ^ {2}) d P = 8 \int_ {0} ^ {a} d x \int_ {0} ^ {a - x} \sqrt {3} [ x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + (a - x - y) ^ {2} ] d y \\
= 1 6 \sqrt {3} \int_ {0} ^ {a} d x \int_ {0} ^ {a - x} \left[ x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} + x y + \frac {a ^ {2}}{2} - a (x + y) \right] d y \\
= 1 6 \sqrt {3} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \left[ x ^ {2} (a - x) - \frac {1}{6} (a - x) ^ {3} - a x (a - x) + \frac {a ^ {2}}{2} (a - x) \right] d x \\
= 1 6 \sqrt {3} \left(\frac {1}{3} - \frac {1}{4} - \frac {1}{2 4} - \frac {1}{2} + \frac {1}{3} + \frac {1}{2} - \frac {1}{4}\right) a ^ {4} = 2 \sqrt {3} a ^ {4}. \\
\end{array}
$$

于是，两积分之差为 $I_{1} - I_{2} = 2(2\pi - \sqrt{3})a^{4}$

question:
【4351】证明泊松公式：

$$
\iint_ {S} f (a x + b y + c z) \mathrm {d} S = 2 \pi \int_ {- 1} ^ {1} f (u \sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2} + c ^ {2}}) \mathrm {d} u,
$$

式中 $S$ 是球面 $x^{2} + y^{2} + z = 1$ .
answer: \iint_ {S} f (a x + b y + c z) \mathrm {d} S = 2 \pi \int_ {- 1} ^ {1} f (u \sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2} + c ^ {2}}) \mathrm {d} u
solution:
证取新坐标系 $Ouvw$ ，其中原点不变，平面 $ax + by + cz = 0$ 即为 $Ovw$ 面， $\pmb{u}$ 轴垂直于该面，则有

$$
u = \frac {a x + b y + c z}{\sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2} + c ^ {2}}}.
$$

在新坐标系下，公式左端的积分可写为 $\iint_{S} f(u \sqrt{a^2 + b^2 + c^2}) \, \mathrm{d}S.$

显然，球面 $S$ 的方程为 $u^{2} + v^{2} + w^{2} = 1$ 或 $v^{2} + w^{2} = (\sqrt{1 - u^{2}})^{2}$

若表示成参数式，则为

$$
u = u, \quad v = \sqrt {1 - u ^ {2}} \cos w, \quad w = \sqrt {1 - u ^ {2}} \sin w,
$$

其中 $-1 \leqslant u \leqslant 1, 0 \leqslant w \leqslant 2\pi.$ 从而， $\mathrm{d}S = \sqrt{EG - F^2} \mathrm{d}u \mathrm{d}w = \sqrt{\frac{1}{1 - u^2} (1 - u)^2 - 0} \mathrm{d}u \mathrm{d}w = \mathrm{d}u \mathrm{d}w.$

于是，最后得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {S} f (a x + b y + c z) \mathrm {d} S = \iint_ {S} f (u \sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2} + c ^ {2}}) \mathrm {d} S = \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} \mathrm {d} w \int_ {- 1} ^ {1} f (u \sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2} + c ^ {2}}) \mathrm {d} u \\ = 2 \pi \int_ {- 1} ^ {1} f (u \sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2} + c ^ {2}}) d u. \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【4353】求密度为 $\rho_0$ 的均质球面壳 $x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2} = a^{2}$（ $z \geq 0$ ）对于 $Oz$ 轴的转动惯量.
solution:
解转动惯量为

$$
\begin{array}{l} I _ {z} = \iint_ {S} (x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}) \rho_ {0} d S = \rho_ {0} \iint_ {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} \leqslant a ^ {2}} (x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}) \frac {a}{\sqrt {a ^ {2} - x ^ {2} - y ^ {2}}} d x d y = a \rho_ {0} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} d \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {a} \frac {r ^ {3}}{\sqrt {a ^ {2} - r ^ {2}}} d r \\ = 2 \pi a ^ {4} \rho_ {0} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \sin^ {3} \theta d \theta = \frac {4}{3} \pi a ^ {4} \rho_ {0}. \\ \end{array}
$$

question: 【4352】求抛物面壳 $z = \frac{1}{2} (x^2 + y^2) (0 \leqslant z \leqslant 1)$ 的质量，此壳的面密度按规律 $\rho = z$ 而变.
solution:
解 质量为

$$
\begin{array}{l} M = \iint_ {S} \rho d S = \iint_ {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} \leqslant 2} z \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}} d x d y = \frac {1}{2} \iint_ {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} \leqslant 2} (x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}) \sqrt {1 + x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}} d x d y \\ = \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {2 \pi} d \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {\sqrt {2}} r ^ {3} \sqrt {1 + r ^ {2}} d r = \pi \int_ {0} ^ {\sqrt {2}} r ^ {3} \sqrt {1 + r ^ {2}} d r = \frac {\pi}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {\sqrt {2}} r ^ {2} \sqrt {1 + r ^ {2}} d (r ^ {2}) \\ = \frac {\pi}{2} \left[ \frac {2}{5} (1 + r ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \left| _ {0} ^ {\sqrt {2}} - \frac {2}{3} (1 + r ^ {2}) ^ {\frac {3}{2}} \right| _ {0} ^ {\sqrt {2}} \right] = \frac {2 \pi (1 + 6 \sqrt {3})}{15}. \\ \end{array}
$$

question:
【4354】求密度为 $\rho_0$ 的均质锥面壳

$$
\frac {x ^ {2}}{a ^ {2}} + \frac {y ^ {2}}{a ^ {2}} - \frac {z ^ {2}}{b ^ {2}} = 0 \quad (0 \leqslant z \leqslant b)
$$

对直线 $\frac{x}{1} = \frac{y}{0} = \frac{z - b}{0}$

的转动惯量.
solution:
解设 $(x,y,z)$ 为均质锥面壳上任一点，它到直线

$$
\frac {x}{1} = \frac {y}{0} = \frac {z - b}{0}
$$

的距离为

$$
| d | = \frac {\sqrt {\left| \begin{array}{l l} y - 0 & z - b \\ 0 & 0 \end{array} \right| + \left| \begin{array}{l l} z - b & x - 0 \\ 0 & 1 \end{array} \right| + \left| \begin{array}{l l} x - 0 & y - 0 \\ 1 & 0 \end{array} \right|}}{\sqrt {1 ^ {2} + 0 ^ {2} + 0 ^ {2}}} = \sqrt {\left(\frac {b}{a} \sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}} - b\right) ^ {2} + y ^ {2}}.
$$

又因 $\sqrt{1 + \left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2} = \frac{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}}{a}.$

于是，所求的转动惯量为

$$
\begin{array}{l} I = \iint_ {r ^ {2} + y ^ {2} \leqslant a ^ {2}} \left[ \left(\frac {b}{a} \sqrt {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2}} - b\right) ^ {2} + y ^ {2} \right] \rho_ {0} \frac {\sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}}{a} d x d y = \frac {\sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}}a \rho_ {0} \int_ {0} ^ {2 n} d \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {a} \left[ \left(\frac {b}{a} r - b\right) ^ {2} + r ^ {2} \sin^ {2} \varphi \right] r d r \\ = \frac {\sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}} \rho_ {0}}{a} \left[ 2 \pi a ^ {2} b ^ {2} \left(\frac {1}{4} - \frac {2}{3} + \frac {1}{2}\right) + \frac {\pi a ^ {4}}{4} \right] = \frac {\pi a \rho_ {0} \left(3 a ^ {2} + 2 b ^ {2}\right) \sqrt {a ^ {2} + b ^ {2}}}{1 2}. \\ \end{array}
$$

question:
【4357】密度为 $\rho_0$ 的均质截圆锥面

$$
x = r \cos \varphi , \quad y = r \sin \varphi , \quad z = r (0 \leqslant \varphi \leqslant 2 \pi , 0 <   b \leqslant r \leqslant a),
$$

以怎样的力吸引质量为 $m$ 位于该圆锥面顶点的质点？
solution:
解 显然截圆锥面顶点为原点 $O(0,0,0)$ . 对应于半径 $r$ 处取斜高为 $\mathrm{ds}$ 的锥面带，其面积为

$$
\mathrm {d} S = 2 \pi r \mathrm {d} s = 2 \sqrt {2} \pi r \mathrm {d} r.
$$

它与顶点 $O$ 处质量为 $m$ 的质点的引力在 $Ox$ 轴和 $Oy$ 轴上的射投影显见为零，而在 $Oz$ 轴上的投影为

$$
\mathrm {d} Z = \frac {k m \cdot 2 \sqrt {2} \pi r \mathrm {d} r \rho_ {0}}{r ^ {2} + z ^ {2}} \frac {z}{\sqrt {r ^ {2} + z ^ {2}}} = \frac {k \pi m \rho_ {0} \mathrm {d} r}{r}.
$$

于是，截圆锥面吸引质量为 $m$ 的质点（在顶点处）的引力在坐标轴上的投影为

$$
X = 0, \quad Y = 0, \quad Z = \int_ {b} ^ {a} \frac {k \pi m \rho_ {0} \mathrm {d} r}{r} = k \pi m \rho_ {0} \ln \frac {a}{b}.
$$

question: 【4355】求均质曲面 $z = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}$ 被曲面 $x^{2} + y^{2} = ax$ 所割下部分的质心坐标.
solution:
解 质量为 $M = \iint_{S} \rho_0 \mathrm{d}S = \sqrt{2} \rho_0 \iint_{\substack{x^2 + y^2 \leqslant a x}} \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y = \sqrt{2} \rho_0 \left(\frac{a}{2}\right)^2 \pi = \frac{\sqrt{2} \pi a^2 \rho_0}{4}.$

从而，质心坐标为

$$
x _ {0} = \frac {1}{M} \cdot \sqrt {2} \rho_ {0} \iint_ {x ^ {2} + y ^ {2} \leqslant a x} x d x d y = \frac {4}{\pi a ^ {2}} \int_ {0} ^ {a} x d x \int_ {- \sqrt {a x - x ^ {2}}} ^ {\sqrt {a x - x ^ {2}}} d y = \frac {8}{\pi a ^ {2}} \int_ {0} ^ {a} x \sqrt {a x - x ^ {2}} d x
$$

$$
\begin{array}{l} = \frac {8}{\pi a ^ {2}} \int_ {- \frac {a}{2}} ^ {\frac {a}{2}} \left(\frac {a}{2} + t\right) \sqrt {\left(\frac {a}{2}\right) ^ {2} - t ^ {2}} d t ^ {* *} = \frac {8}{\pi a ^ {2}} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {a}{2}} \sqrt {\left(\frac {a}{2}\right) ^ {2} - t ^ {2}} d t = \frac {a}{2}, \\ y _ {1 0} = \frac {1}{M} \cdot \sqrt {2} \rho_ {0} \int_ {0} ^ {a} d x \int_ {\sqrt {a r - x ^ {2}}} ^ {\sqrt {a r - x ^ {2}}} y d y = 0, \\ z _ {n} = \frac {1}{M} \cdot \sqrt {2} \rho_ {0} \iint_ {r ^ {2} \cdot y ^ {2} \cdot z _ {a r}} z d x d y = \frac {4}{\pi a ^ {2}} \int_ {- \frac {\pi}{2}} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} d \varphi \int_ {0} ^ {a \cos \varphi} r ^ {2} d r = \frac {8 a}{3 \pi} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \cos^ {3} \varphi d \varphi = \frac {1 6 a}{9 \pi}, \\ \end{array}
$$

即质心为 $(\frac{a}{2},0,\frac{16a}{9\pi})$

\*）作变换 $t = x - \frac{a}{2}$

question: 【4363】 $\iint_{S} f(x) \, \mathrm{d}y \, \mathrm{d}z + g(y) \, \mathrm{d}z \, \mathrm{d}x + h(z) \, \mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y$ ，式中 $f(x), g(y), h(z)$ 为连续函数， $S$ 为平行六面体 $0 \leqslant x \leqslant a; 0 \leqslant y \leqslant b; 0 \leqslant z \leqslant c$ 的外表面.
answer: a b c \left[ \frac {f (a) - f (0)}{a} + \frac {g (b) - g (0)}{b} + \frac {h (c) - h (0)}{c} \right]
solution:
解 只要计算任何一个积分，其他两个可类似地写出结果。例如，下面计算 $\iint_{S} h(z) \, \mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}y$ 。由于六面体有四个面垂直于 $Oxy$ 平面，故曲面积分应为零。从而，

$$
\iint_ {S} h (z) \mathrm {d} r \mathrm {d} y = \iint_ {\substack {0 \leqslant x \leqslant a \\ 0 \leqslant y \leqslant b}} h (c) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y - \iint_ {\substack {0 \leqslant x \leqslant a \\ 0 \leqslant y \leqslant b}} h (0) \mathrm {d} x \mathrm {d} y = a b c \frac {h (c) - h (0)}{c}.
$$

类似地，可得到 $\iint_{S} f(x) \, \mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}z$ 及 $\iint_{S} g(y) \, \mathrm{d}x \, \mathrm{d}z$ 的值。于是，所求的积分为

$$
